body:
The left will never see it coming
| [View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1107432/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvQ0tZeHVZQnVzaA/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTEyMjI/LbmNsMURvaGE3Nw/qP2hpZHM9bmNsNEdGZE1NSDZRQXZscw/gaUlUSw/s8k772b7909)

---
2026 is the firewall.
If we lose the House or fail to take back the Senate, the left finishes the job they started.
That’s why Turning Point PAC is deploying the most sophisticated ballot-chasing operation the conservative movement has ever built — bigger and more advanced than anything we've done before.
**In Arizona, Georgia, Nevada, Pennsylvania, Wisconsin, and Michigan we are:**

* **Identifying** every single low-propensity America First voter

* **Registering** unregistered Patriots

* **Chasing** every legal ballot with thousands of paid chasers using our first-of-its-kind mobile app

* **Curing** ballots and building authentic relationships door by door, call by call, text by text

* **Constructing** a permanent Red Wall that no Democrat can breach in 2026, 2028, or beyond

The left had a decade head start and billions from their billionaire donors. We're not just catching up — _we're surpassing them in the states that decide everything, right now._
**[Whether it’s $1 or $100 — every dollar you give today fuels paid ballot chasers in the field, banking the votes that secure Senate seats, House majorities, and the America First agenda.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1107432/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90cHBhYy9zYl9lbS0zX2Rvbl8yMDI1MTIyMS8/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTEyMjI/LbmNsMURvaGE3Nw/qP3V0bV9tZWRpdW09YnImdXRtX3Rlcm09MjIxNTdfd3Ix/gaUlUSw/s6p7784be1a)**
Help us build the unbreakable machine and chart a path to victory.
[SUPPORT TURNING POINT PAC TODAY!](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e1107432/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS90cHBhYy9zYl9lbS0zX2Rvbl8yMDI1MTIyMS8/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTEyMjI/LbmNsMURvaGE3Nw/qP3V0bV9tZWRpdW09YnImdXRtX3Rlcm09MjIxNTdfd3Ix/gaUlUSw/s6p7784be1a)
Yours in Freedom,
Turning Point PAC Team
|

Non-Contribution Account (For TTPAC, Inc.’s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees)

As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee’s name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account are not tax-deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc. (www.tppac.com) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Bring wholesome messaging back to childrenâ€™s entertainment
body:
Please – for the sake of all our families

| | | You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with "entertainment" that grooms children.
---
| |
---
| | Dear Friend in Faith,Please – for the sake of all our families – take it from me as someone who’s lived and worked in Hollywood my whole life... You are absolutely right if you think Hollywood is reaching right into your family living room with “entertainment” that grooms children.You may remember shows with wholesome messages like Father Knows Best, Marcus Welby, M.D., and even Dennis the Menace.But today when children turn on the TV, they see a Drag Queen leading the Pride Parade on _Blue’s Clues_...
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zscqi8gigp0mqa034qm1fhqj8uhqvv28gerrro0o_rp22sh2s8i6eor3c5j60p74cph2bs)
---
| | Or Sesame Street using YOUR tax-dollars to normalize same-sex parents and men in dresses.And the result is an upside-down world where children lecture YOU about what you can and cannot say... ...and they try to “educate” YOU about your “old-fashioned” and “mean” ideas.Today you have a very special chance to stop the Hollywood groomers who are turning our children and grandchildren against us and the Godly values we love. **[Today, I’m inviting you to be a Founding Supporter of the very first children’s television show that actively fights back against the groomers in Hollywood AND reinforces the traditional biblical values that made America great.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zdqmp8kvk7gq7mb3iikaskjcfi46clcnh4c85f58_rp22sh2s8i6eor3c5j60p74cph2bs)** Introducing: _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.I’m making this ground-breaking live-action television show with the great folks at **Brave Books**.If you’ve seen me and **Brave Books** on _Fox News_ , you know we’ve already countered those awful “Drag Queen Story Hours” the Left has been pushing on children in our taxpayer funded libraries. Thanks to support from parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens just like you, we started hosting Godly and patriotic “Story Hours” of our own.And now, THOUSANDS of children and parents can gather to pledge allegiance to our flag, read wholesome books, and pray together in their libraries.It’s encouraging to see we can win when we fight back! Now we’re working to have that same impact in television.
---
>> Imagine a children's show that leaves your child or grandchild with a greater sense of right and wrong and an understanding of truth.Courage, honesty, discernment, forgiveness, empathy, all taught through a biblical and traditional lens. >> Imagine a children's show that brings families together instead of driving them apart.>> Now imagine YOU are the one who makes that show possible. Because we can’t beat the Hollywood groomers without your help as a **Founding Supporter**.
---
The great news is that we’ve already completed and released the first ten character-building episodes of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_! We premiered it recently to a small group of children and parents and I wish you could have seen the smiles on those innocent little faces.And I wish you could have experienced _the parents_ watching their children absorb the beautiful Gospel messages.It was quite a moment for everyone – including folks just like you – who worked so hard to get us that far. But now **Brave Books** has an urgent two-fold problem that I hope you can help with.
---
_**#1. Brave Books needs to launch a massive advertising blitz to get around the groomers on the Left.**_
---
You see, we’ve made the first five episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ available absolutely FREE. That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately.
---
_**#2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production.**_
---
I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. **[That’s why I’m asking you to please contribute $35, $50, $250, $500, $2,500 or more to help us reach our fundraising goal of $250,000 for advertising and $250,000 for Season 2.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z62qjks5qd3i1b314fkbppss929ua30ktljijfd0_rp22sh2s8i6eor3c5j60p74cph2bs) ** As our special “Thank You” for becoming a **Founding Supporter** at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ FREE on DVD.This exclusive _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_ DVD is only offered to **Founding Supporters**. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with **[**your gift of $50**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkd98ke1n1d8her7e8oakpmunogidmu3d0125ilo_rp22sh2s8i6eor3c5j60p74cph2bs)** , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. **[So please – whether you can send $50, $5,000, $25,000, or anything higher or lower, please respond quickly and know that gifts of EVERY size are needed and greatly appreciated.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zj9q9if21p3v6j3f8hq1v3lu17sgv1mu5kudtgjo_rp22sh2s8i6eor3c5j60p74cph2bs)** There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a **Founding Supporter** of _Iggy and Mr. Kirk_.
---
Sincerely,
---
| | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z99dhrv8epa99o862ech8g4rhrrh8h0sgl1jqp88_rp22sh2s8i6eor3c5j60p74cph2bs)
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpujf8v2pad4q9pjt8205rt45apc7qvunv0aj9k8_rp22sh2s8i6eor3c5j60p74cph2bs)
---
**Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)** **Actor, Author, and Father**
---
|
---
| | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in _history_ made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. **[Please send in your Founding Supporter gift and help me reclaim America with the Biblical values our country was founded upon.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zs1f2s2upk9jsqvgibb1iriiadflfajamm2mvrtg_rp22sh2s8i6eor3c5j60p74cph2bs)** Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk
---
[ **DONATE **](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfu59vijk05mhe9dmoet7p5pfg17kdquemh4bi0o_rp22sh2s8i6eor3c5j60p74cph2bs)
---
| | **Brave Books** 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304
---
| | Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.
---

Pop Acta Media | American Action News
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjjsskopt12clfhdda3me6qbqise06niq0d7u09o_rp22sh2s8i6eor3c5j60p74cph238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8ddl69qbcd1jmgr32t5nmepradrmeej3fddnklprctbi6pr34t5i6krqfp9ls4o7et5hm6qbcsr7c0bjbd1km6pqcdtlmcibbp35c5hmaor3c8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztio7kmmgcsus7vlbvbkv7q7qpjmb445v021rrj0_rp22sh2s8i6eor3c5j60p74cph2bs)_

That’s the best way we can reach MILLIONS of families with our Gospel-inspired messaging.But no one will see it if we can’t get the word out. And the Left will try to bury Iggy and Mr. Kirk at every turn. The price tag for an advertising blitz of this magnitude is $250,000 – and with the recent launch, we need to raise the funds immediately. #2. We must complete Season 2 to keep our momentum going and that cost is $250,000 for post production. I know that’s a lot of money but it’s actually a fraction of what it would cost if we made our show with a major Hollywood studio. And obviously, we won’t work through Hollywood.Hollywood has done quite enough already to destroy American culture and hijack our children.We parents, grandparents, and concerned citizens must take over to rebuild a thriving, healthy, GOOD and GODLY culture. As our special “Thank You” for becoming a Founding Supporter at the $50 level, we’ll send you all ten episodes of Season 1 of Iggy and Mr. Kirk FREE on DVD.This exclusive Iggy and Mr. Kirk DVD is only offered to Founding Supporters. It won’t be available for sale anywhere. So with , you’ll be part of a small select group of people who own our wholesome TV show on DVD. You’ll have it ready to watch with the children in your life. Or you can drop your DVD by your local school, church, mission, or even leave it in the waiting room at your doctor’s office. So many children have no way of hearing God’s message in their lives. Your random act of kindness may change a child’s life. There’s no time to waste. Hollywood groomers have destroyed America’s Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes.And it starts by ensuring the most innocent among us are filled with faith and family – not filth.Thank you for being a part of history by becoming a Founding Supporter of Iggy and Mr. Kirk. Sincerely, | | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!)Actor, Author, and Father | | | Kirk Cameron (and Iggy!) Actor, Author, and Father | | | P.S. The #1 thing you can do today to stop the Hollywood groomers who are tearing families apart – maybe even yours – is to support the very first children’s television show in history made possible by contributions from grandparents and seniors like you. Thank you and God bless you and your family! -- Kirk | | Brave Books 13618 Poplar Cir, Suite 302Conroe, TX 77304 | | Hollywood groomers have destroyed America's Godly culture. But today we rebuild from the ashes. Pop Acta Media | American Action News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

# [One Standard in Court: The Constitution.](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1526781&post_id=182235271&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgyMjM1MjcxLCJpYXQiOjE3NjY0MTM3MjMsImV4cCI6MTc2OTAwNTcyMywiaXNzIjoicHViLTE1MjY3ODEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.HO1dDkDBdbEBL4b0MDDStI4H_IAnIU8OfD7BBbMVQHw)
### American Rights, American Courts
| | [Dana Criswell](https://substack.com/@danacriswell)
---
| Dec 22
---
| [](https://substack.com/@danacriswell)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1526781&post_id=182235271&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgyMjM1MjcxLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc2NjQxMzcyMywiZXhwIjoxNzY5MDA1NzIzLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMTUyNjc4MSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.zu3rmcuc4HxFDWGE-g9xIxaP3t4TlNbiieoGIuIVHYo&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1526781&post_id=182235271&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgyMjM1MjcxLCJpYXQiOjE3NjY0MTM3MjMsImV4cCI6MTc2OTAwNTcyMywiaXNzIjoicHViLTE1MjY3ODEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.HO1dDkDBdbEBL4b0MDDStI4H_IAnIU8OfD7BBbMVQHw&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1526781&post_id=182235271&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgyMjM1MjcxLCJpYXQiOjE3NjY0MTM3MjMsImV4cCI6MTc2OTAwNTcyMywiaXNzIjoicHViLTE1MjY3ODEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.HO1dDkDBdbEBL4b0MDDStI4H_IAnIU8OfD7BBbMVQHw)

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/danacriswell/p/can-we-ban-sharia-law?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/530573bf-da76-4d45-ac2e-e8e6240de2c9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Photo by [Defrino Maasy](https://substack.com/redirect/3617cf9a-f08c-49a8-add5-b17b8b22080d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on [Unsplash](https://substack.com/redirect/108675af-e132-4c1f-b04b-828667ad9a61?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Foreign-law restriction bills--sometimes branded "No Sharia," sometimes packaged as "American Laws for American Courts"--keep resurfacing because the concern behind them is real. And pretending it isn't real is how you end up with slow-motion "workarounds" that only get noticed after somebody gets hurt.
Start with first principles: when an American walks into a courthouse, the Constitution is supposed to be the floor. Due process. Equal protection. Basic fairness. That's not negotiable, and it's not something parties can sign away for convenience. A statute that makes this explicit can serve as a clean, simple firewall: **our courts will not enforce any rule, judgment, or arbitration outcome that strips away core constitutional rights**.
That's not paranoia. It's prudence.
### Why these laws have a stronger case than critics admit
**1) They put a bright line in writing.**
Yes, courts already have "public policy" doctrines that can block enforcement of rights-violating foreign judgments or contracts. But "already can" and "will, consistently, under pressure, in edge cases" are not the same thing. A narrowly written statute gives judges clearer direction and gives citizens clearer expectations--especially in family-law and custody situations where people are vulnerable and power imbalances are real.
**2) They address a predictable channel: private agreements + arbitration + foreign judgments.**
In a global economy, cross-border contracts and arbitration happen every day. Most of it is normal commerce. But the same machinery can be used to smuggle in rules that would never survive direct scrutiny in a U.S. court--particularly in disputes involving divorce, custody, inheritance, or coercive "agreements." The UK's experience is instructive: the government's independent review concluded that "sharia councils" have **no legal jurisdiction** and their decisions aren't legally binding under civil law--yet the review still raised concerns about how these councils can function in practice, especially around religious marriage/divorce and women's rights.
**3) They respond to the real "parallel system" problem--without pretending it's always official.**
The strongest warning sign in Europe hasn't been Parliament literally replacing national law with religious law. It's been the growth of informal or community-based dispute resolution that operates **alongside** the official legal system and can pressure people--again, often women--into outcomes they wouldn't freely choose. Germany has wrestled publicly with the concept of "Paralleljustiz" (parallel justice) and what it means for the rule of law in a plural society.

And German courts, like other European courts, sometimes apply **foreign law** in family or inheritance matters under conflict-of-laws rules--meaning law "shaped by Islam" can enter the analysis in certain cases, even as public-order limits still apply.
So if the point is "make sure our courts never enforce outcomes that violate constitutional rights," that's a defensible legislative goal.
### Where lawmakers still screw this up
Being more favorable doesn't mean pretending the bad drafts don't exist--because they do.
**1) Overreach can punish ordinary commerce.**
If a bill is written so loosely that any foreign element becomes suspect, it can destabilize normal choice-of-law clauses and arbitration--raising costs, inviting litigation, and chilling investment. That's not limited government; that's lawmakers playing lawyer.
**2) Naming a religion is a self-inflicted wound.**
If you write a statute that singles out Islam by name, you're asking for constitutional trouble and you're handing opponents the easiest narrative imaginable. Worse, it shifts focus away from the only thing that should matter: **rights**. Even the UK's own public discussion has been plagued by exaggerations and sloppy language (calling councils "courts," inflating their number, etc.), which muddies the issue and makes serious policy harder.
**3) Don 't accidentally outlaw voluntary religious practice.**
Adults are allowed to seek religious counseling and mediation. The state should intervene only when coercion, fraud, or rights violations are in play. A good bill protects liberty; a bad bill tries to micromanage private life.
### A better, more liberty-minded model
If a state is going to pass one of these laws, here's the clean way to do it:
* **Make it "as-applied"**: courts may not enforce _outcomes_ that violate constitutional rights--period.
* **Avoid religion-specific language** : write it as a neutral rights firewall.
* **Protect voluntary private ordering** : mediation and arbitration are fine **so long as** they meet due-process standards and do not produce rights-denying results.
* **Be explicit about existing federal limits** (treaties, federal arbitration rules, supremacy issues), so you don't create a new mess while trying to prevent one.

### Bottom line
Liberty doesn't require us to wait until the worst-case headline happens. A narrowly drafted foreign-law restriction can be a legitimate defensive measure: not a culture-war trophy, not a smear job, and not a new excuse for government to reach into contracts--but a clear statement that constitutional rights are not up for bargaining, importing, or "creative" arbitration.
Done right, these laws don't undermine freedom. They reinforce the one thing the state is actually supposed to do: **protect rights.**

You've been with us through thick and thin this year, and I can't thank you enough.
**But 2026 is coming fast, and the MAGA machine is already gearing up to steamroll the midterm elections.**
We've seen their playbook unfold piece by piece. And we’ve had enough.
* They gutted health care access for millions.
* They ripped food assistance away from kids and families who needed it most.
* They attacked Social Security like it's a luxury — instead of what our seniors earned.
* They handed out tax cuts to their ultra-rich buddies, all while working families are choosing between groceries and gas.

We set an ambitious goal to raise $100,000 from grassroots supporters like you before the deadline. We can get there, but it will depend on this entire grassroots team stepping up and doing their part. This is the most important fundraising deadline we’ve faced this cycle. When we file our FEC report, everyone — national Republicans, super PACs and the press — will be watching to see if our grassroots movement has what it takes to flip the Senate. That's why I'm personally asking: = | = = | | **= You've been with us through thick and thin this year, and I can't thank you enough. But 2026 is coming fast, and the MAGA machine is already gearing up to steamroll the midterm elections. We've seen their playbook unfold piece by piece. And we’ve had enough. They gutted health care access for millions. They ripped food assistance away from kids and families who needed it most. They attacked Social Security like it's a luxury — instead of what our seniors earned. They handed out tax cuts to their ultra-rich buddies, all while working families are choosing between groceries and gas. I don't know about you, but I'm done playing defense. Here's the deal: MAGA extremists are raising money hand over fist to buy themselves more power to dismantle our democracy. We're building something better – a movement that’s tough as nails. name: AMAC Action
subject: American elections should be decided by American citizens
body:
It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math.

| |
---
| | It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math.
---
| |
---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zqn46k26r9fda4prnev5qo524mtkosq31eal3qr8_rp22sh2s8i6eor3c5j68o76c1h2bs)
---
| | **“****A disproportionate number of illegal immigrants go to blue states, they amplify the effect of a blue state vote. My understanding is that Democrats would lose approximately 20 seats in the house if illegals were not counted in census. And that’s also 20 less electoral votes for president.**** ** **So, illegals absolutely do impact who controls the House and the presidency.”****~** Elon Musk
---
| | Fellow Conservative,Elon Musk is right. It isn’t rocket-science. It’s basic math. It’s also a ticking time-bomb set by Joe Biden and Kamala Harris – in the form of 11.5 million illegals entering our country on their watch – one which will explode shortly after President Trump leaves office in 2029.While you and I have no doubt President Trump will deliver on his promise to secure the border, this threat will not go away. The truth is, without immediate action, these illegal aliens will be counted in the U.S. Census, which determines both the apportionment of seats in the House of Representatives _and_ the number of electoral votes given to each state. Whether they came because, four years ago, Kamala Harris and Joe Biden prompted them to “surge to the border” for asylum or because of blue-states offering sanctuary status, “free” health care, “free” cell phones, “free” housing, and “free” college...it doesn’t matter. The result is the same.Your vote is _already_ being **watered down** in Congress. Your vote is _already_ being **watered down** in the Electoral College.And every day reports are popping up of non-citizens, illegal aliens, and convicted felons being registered to vote in cities and entire swing-states across the country, which means your vote may be fully **canceled out in future elections**. **_American elections should be decided by American citizens._****[If you agree then please sign your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution so the chaos we’re seeing now _never_ happens again in America.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z5nl15k4vcdn9iu1u1vhl49g87imdcjholson1r0_rp22sh2s8i6eor3c5j68o76c1h2bs)**Because, here’s the scary part:The last census took place in 2020. That was _before_ the 11.5 million illegal aliens who invaded our country under Joe Biden and Kamala Harris. To put it in context, there are only 8 states in America with a population over 11 million. So, it’s as if the radical Left just imported the 9th largest state in America. That’s more than North Carolina (10.8 million), Michigan (10 million), New Jersey (9.2 million), or Virginia (8.7 million).You get the picture. That’s why urgent action is needed to pass a Constitutional Amendment to ban illegal aliens from voting and from being counted for purposes of congressional and electoral vote apportionment. The next census in less than 6 years away. If those 11.5 million illegal aliens are counted in the census or are allowed to vote in the intervening years, you and I simply won’t have a country. **[It’s vitally important that your representatives in Washington and in your state legislature hear this demand directly from you.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z51d4t9i7k7fb9drvh92bdr6emorq6gfrege4bto_rp22sh2s8i6eor3c5j68o76c1h2bs)** Because, quite honestly, they think they can pull a fast one on you. They think you and I will be so relieved to see the border secure again and criminal illegal aliens deported, that you and I will be oblivious to this threat lying dormant under our very eyes.No way.My name is Rebecca Weber. I’m the chairwoman of AMAC Action. **AMAC Action is the most influential advocacy group in the country when it comes to standing for the values of conservative Seniors.****We’ve got 72 chapters and 300 volunteer delegates, who are the “feet on the street” advocates who contact Members of Congress and state legislators in their district offices.** **Moreover, our chapters and delegates help organize Town Hall meetings with elected officials and candidates to enable those locally of our 2,000,000 AMAC members to meet, hear, and question them.****And you should also know that we now have more than 337,000 AMAC members who respond to our “calls-to-action” and weigh in with members of the** **U.S. House and Senate, as well as their state legislators on the issues.** Quite simply, when we speak, Washington listens. [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zvscq2279cr552hqamuq6688uo2chbjr7dmsqj10_rp22sh2s8i6eor3c5j68o76c1h2bs)**[And AMAC Action needs your help today in this do-or-die battle to pass a Constitutional Amendment to protect your vote from being canceled out by an illegal alien or a convicted felon.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zdbepe59508mkugds4qfo8nd1uu72stnk3sio0q0_rp22sh2s8i6eor3c5j68o76c1h2bs)** But I can’t do it without you. **No matter what issue you care about the most, if you and I don’t have a secure,_honest_ elections... none of it matters.**Inflation. Illegal immigration. Violent Crime. Drug use. Homelessness. The 2nd Amendment. Out of control spending. Social Security and Medicare insolvency. Right to Life. Indoctrination in our schools. Endless foreign wars. You name it. **[So please follow this link to sign your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zefalu9n4teir9spnsv9osm0l36bfj16ggmn0tio_rp22sh2s8i6eor3c5j68o76c1h2bs)** so that AMAC Action can put your representatives in Washington and in the state legislature on notice with a simple demand: Namely, that you will not tolerate this erosion of your vote.Now, here’s the bad news:Most state constitutions grant voting rights to “every” citizen, open-ended language that liberal activists argue permits localities to authorize non-citizen and even illegal alien voting. States should amend their constitutions to instead permit “only” citizens to vote. But there’s good news, too:Seven states have _expressly_ banned non-citizen voting already: Alabama, Arizona, Colorado, Florida, Louisiana, North Dakota, and Ohio.**What’s more, voters approve of constitutional amendments to ban non-citizen voting by overwhelming margins. Nearly 77% of Ohio voters approved a measure in 2022, while nearly 63% of Colorado voters approved one in 2020.** This is a solution whose time has come. You and I can do this. **[That’s why, when you’ve signed your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zj576pgd7d9tbap9mfre9ukhtgb4u0pv47da1240_rp22sh2s8i6eor3c5j68o76c1h2bs), I'm also asking you to make a one-time contribution of $35 to give AMAC Action the resources to send out, collect, process, and tabulate millions of petitions.** The reality is, we don’t get a dime of taxpayer funding. Our funding comes from grassroots conservatives like you who care deeply about the future of America. This is important. _It means we can’t be bought._ On the other hand, the leftwing election fraud machine is funded by leftwing billionaires like Mark Zuckerberg and George Soros who are actively funneling _billions_ to dark money “non-profit” groups to “**reshape** ” our elections and our electorate.With that said, if you’re able to make a larger contribution – say $50, $75, $125, $250, $500, or even $1,000 – it would really be a life saver. Please hurry. In order to secure your vote in all future elections – and with 11.5 million illegals chomping to be included in the next census – **[your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution is vitally important.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z5k3psff5dcubm1urd2oqcandqs0cdloo3edlkuo_rp22sh2s8i6eor3c5j68o76c1h2bs)** Yes, this is about saving your vote from being canceled. It’s also about saving America.And it all starts with the straightforward premise that non-citizens and illegal aliens – no matter how many Kamala Harris and Joe Biden imported on their watch – should be banned from voting _and_ banned from being counted for apportioning congressional seats and electoral votes. Thank you in advance for joining the fight to secure your vote
---
[ **SIGN THE PETITION**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z94cc62u6vshsbqr26f12c7i1od6v8e33slnlnp0_rp22sh2s8i6eor3c5j68o76c1h2bs)
---
| | For Freedom,
---

---
**Rebecca Weber,_Chairwoman_****AMAC Action**

| | P.S. American elections should be decided by American citizens. It’s not rocket-science. And it shouldn’t be controversial. Yet, the radical left is pouring billions into their scheme to “**reshape** ” our elections and our electorate. Nothing less than an amendment to the U.S. Constitution will suffice when it comes to stopping this threat. [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z63eimje0a0s8d0u9tft5obd9nllnb8a5vc650fg_rp22sh2s8i6eor3c5j68o76c1h2bs) **[So please sign your “BAN NON-CITIZEN VOTING” Petition to Amend the U.S. Constitution right away.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zqmtootituos2v1fu2uukldchga9u3i4t85mii20_rp22sh2s8i6eor3c5j68o76c1h2bs)**

body:
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=1168%2E181023%2EcKafe5)
Team,
**[Can you donate $8.30 today for each of the 83 counties in Michigan to help us spread Jocelyn’s message about making Michigan the best place to be a kid, have a kid, and call home when she’s elected governor?](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/851?c0=jmb-em-q42025.F3k39j&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251222_AM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=1168%2E181023%2EcKafe5)**
[DONATE $8.30](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/850?c0=jmb-em-q42025.0W4A22&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251222_AM1_V1_S1&t=3&akid=1168%2E181023%2EcKafe5)
---
Jocelyn is running for a future in Michigan where every family can afford childcare, buy a home in the community they want to live in, and have access to quality education and well-paying jobs.
Her message is resonating with voters across the state — from our cities to our rural communities in both peninsulas.
Over the next year, she’ll continue to reach Michiganders in every corner of the state. _She’s leaving no family behind._
But to do that, we need your help. From digital ad campaigns to snow tires for our team’s cars to yard signs, there are a lot of upcoming campaign expenses to make sure we can share Jocelyn’s message.
**[That’s why we’re hoping you can chip in $8.30 to help us reach voters in all 83 counties. What do you say, can you pitch in today?](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/851?c0=jmb-em-q42025.F3k39j&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251222_AM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=1168%2E181023%2EcKafe5)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

In 2022, Republican John James won this seat by just **0.5%** – not even a full 1%. Now that he is vacating the seat to run for governor, MI-10 has become the most critical battleground in the country. **All of the other U.S. House races in swing districts have Republican incumbents.**

In 2018, John James said he is “100% Pro-Life” and compared abortion to “genocide.” Most recently, **Representative James proudly voted YES on Trump’s “Big Beautiful Bill,”** which is one of the worst bills to become law in modern history.

Here’s how Christina responded:

_“The Republicans passed their bill. It's a direct hit to the people who work the hardest and carry the heaviest burdens – and it will make life more expensive for almost all of us. As a prosecutor and as an advocate, I believe that public servants are supposed to work FOR the people, not against them.

I’m running for Congress because I want to make sure my neighbors - the working families in our community - have affordable healthcare, housing, groceries, and daycare. We have a lot of work to do, but together, we can continue to fight for a better future.”_

**Larry Sabato’s ‘Crystal Ball’ has rated MI-10 as a Tossup in 2026, and this district is one of the DCCC’s targeted races for 2026.** When Christina was on the ballot as the Democratic Nominee for County Prosecutor in 2024, she **outperformed** both the Democratic congressional nominee AND Kamala Harris. She can do this. Her constituents – and ALL American women – would be very lucky to have her representing them in congress.

**This is our _most realistic opportunity_ of the entire 2026 cycle to flip a House seat from red to blue – and we need your help to make that happen.**

[****We know you’re crazy busy this holiday season, but _end of year_ is the time that Christina needs the most help, as institutional support groups are evaluating where to invest. Help us ensure Christina has what she needs to catch up to her 10 male opponents by rushing a contribution to her campaign before the year comes to a close. →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121769111/590526874/1733627654?refcode=EM_F_251222Hines_N_DB_90DO_13_NG_N_L2&amount=20.26&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjU4ZTRhMmNmLTQ0ZGYtZjAxMS04MTk0LTAwMGQzYTFlYzhjNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=gjUQBPmskJqWzb4zSdfZvOBrokms6xGNIS1jQEp6Sk8=)

For a brighter 2026,

Diana Bula
Political Manager
Her Bold Move

subject: National Republicans see New Hampshire as their best opportunity to expand their Senate majority

body:
Electing Chris Pappas and keeping this seat blue is step one to taking back the Senate from Republicans
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98438?refcode=em20251222-9854&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9854%2E614464%2En6Ei-N)
Peter, it’s Illinois Gov. JB Pritzker.
I’m writing to you today because **[I hope you’ll split a donation between my friend Chris Pappas’s campaign for Senate and Heartland Patriots.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98438?refcode=em20251222-9854&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9854%2E614464%2En6Ei-N)**

Our small businesses don’t deserve to be bankrupted by unsustainable tariffs. Our citizens don’t deserve to lose health care because Republicans want to hand tax cuts to billionaires.
National Republicans see New Hampshire as their best opportunity to expand their Senate majority. After all, the Granite State just elected a Republican governor — so it’s clear: _this isn't a safe blue seat, folks._
Electing Chris Pappas and keeping this seat blue is step one to taking back the Senate from Republicans. **[So if you can, please split $10 between Chris’s campaign and Heartland Patriots today.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98438?refcode=em20251222-9854&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9854%2E614464%2En6Ei-N)**

clean_body: 2026 is almost here. | Here are 3 things you need to know right now, Peter: 1️⃣ Republicans in Congress are rubber-stamping Trump's extremist agenda — giving billionaires massive tax breaks while pushing to slash Medicaid, cut food assistance programs, and ban federal funds for abortion care. They're prioritizing their wealthy donors over working families. 2️⃣ 2026 is our only shot to flip the House and stop this madness — but we need to start building that movement TODAY. The only way to put a check on Trump's extremist agenda is to elect Democrats who will actually hold him accountable. 3️⃣ We’ve set a bold 1,000 donors goal for this quarter, and time is running out. The resources we raise today determine whether we can mount a serious challenge to flip the House and restore accountability. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = ---|---|--- = | = | = Thanks for your support, Unite the Country | Unite the Country is dedicated to electing Democrats who support common sense policies, champion middle class values and are willing to engage Americans regardless of where they live — but we can’t do it without you! At this critical moment in American history, we’re calling on you to join Unite the Country in this fight. = = = Follow along: | Paid for by Unite the Country, , and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. name: Eva Piatek, Evergreen
subject: FWD: Let us explain: A winning strategy 🌟
body:
Building a durable, affordable clean energy future
| | |
---
| Hi—

Did you see Beth’s note? I know you’re busy so here’s the TL;DR:Evergreen isn’t waiting for changes in Washington to keep pushing for real climate progress today. We’re working with newly-elected governors, providing data-backed playbooks to lower costs for families AND deploy clean energy at the state level.

But Big Oil and other special interest groups are already on the ground, trying to block these cost-saving measures. **Your generous donation helps us build research and policies that we can deliver straight into the hands of governors** —who can turn them into laws that make life more affordable for Americans AND take on the climate crisis.

[**Better yet, a generous donor has pledged a double match—meaning every dollar you give goes twice as far, up to $50,000. $50 becomes $100, $100 becomes $200, and so on.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/4385418/87SdQ4wZ)

This is how we build a durable clean energy future that no president can undo: by making clean energy the cornerstone of a thriving, affordable economy in every state around the country. **Thank you for your generous donation.** |
---
[GIVE NOW](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/4385419/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| Sincerely,

Eva Piatek
Digital Lead - Email
Evergreen Collaborative

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Beth Poole, Evergreen Collaborative
Date: Tue, Dec 16, 2025
Subject: Let us explain: A winning strategy |
| [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/4385420/87SdQ4wZ) |
---|---|---
---
| Hi Friend,

While the Trump regime continues to dismantle federal climate progress, Evergreen isn’t sitting back and waiting for changes in Washington.

We’re pushing for progress where it’s possible–right _now._ That’s always been our North Star: Championing the most ambitious policies that are politically possible at this moment.

The real battle for clean energy has shifted to the states—**and a generous donor has stepped up with a**[**$50,000 matching challenge**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/4385421/87SdQ4wZ)**, doubling every dollar donated by****December 31****to accelerate a proven strategy that’s winning today.** Let me explain.

Families across the country are feeling the pinch of rising costs. For too long, they’ve been told that clean energy is expensive.**Evergreen is flipping that script.** We are proving that the path to lower bills runs directly through state-level clean energy deployment.

**This isn’t just rhetoric; it’s a winning strategy.**

This year, we rapidly put together key policies for newly elected governors like Mikie Sherrill in New Jersey and Abigail Spanberger in Virginia, who both secured decisive victories by campaigning on energy affordability.

As they head into office in 2026, **we are handing them the specific, data-backed playbooks to deliver on those promises.**

This is the innovative, results-oriented work that separates us from the pack: we aren't just asking for climate action; we are building the exact policies that will make life more affordable for working families.

[**We need your help to turn these plans into reality in New Jersey, Virginia, and beyond.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/4385422/87SdQ4wZ) Fossil fuel interests are already working to block these cost-saving measures, and with the federal government stepping back, the pressure on states to lead has never been higher.

We have the data, but we need resources to build momentum and support for policies we are delivering to leaders. To help us meet this moment, a generous donor has agreed to match every dollar you give, **up to $50,000, before December 31.**

Please, don’t wait. This is your chance to drive climate progress that produces real financial relief for American families, defying the gridlock in Washington. [**Donate $25, $50, or whatever you can today to double your impact and help us build an affordable clean energy future.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/4385423/87SdQ4wZ) |
---
[MAKE A YEAR-END GIFT](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/4385424/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| With gratitude, |
---
| | |
---
### Beth Poole
Senior Fundraising Director
Evergreen Collaborative
---
---
* * *
---
| _Evergreen is building the ambitious, actionable policy roadmap for an all-out mobilization to defeat climate change—and to create millions of jobs in a thriving, just, and inclusive clean energy future. None of this would be possible without your support._ |
---
---
| | [ ](https://evergreenaction.com/?utm_source=digital_template&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=evergreen&utm_content=footer)
---

And follow our new project, **Hope This Helps.**

name: Mark Lamb
subject: Something bigger is broken.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MARK LAMB FOR CONGRESS
body:
When something is broken, you don't complain — you fix it. |
---

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=17270de6bbc541139f529278174f94b9&_e=GTil3XJ0rfs4yS9IX4h-u2P-y4bXla4sbgYVNt7duwokYELXh0bfmuOfL7lSLLC2PDEjbYH35VFadi5o1vU4vL1FvCVrjk11qpXJ-In1ATy3IsnwTJ344PpNZ4Ee_2nxvgrXutCKumVxdZCwkpr2rwn4I7EcjUQumjX8l8r0ExVwuQNz3nIkRqJzMpAEmIv-BL04M1WOhhPurFeWOcXGv3BSb0tbp0hr0SttcghSDZzM51ADdEiPN7y_XadKTMDyrN5zLOFKN4xy_bwUhKjRm8fuwkRS2LkqIiTXqo_iBKwJOcqtq6AYRn25c2pyJvJgwZUed5nkBSm0qSHjYPF08uI6Bw0StHbFC5CGlzivmm6TZMhIvAgIGyT9xiv7Fx5dDfPofjp4p7kPETgnNF0uihIpwA01t-95fMs6xpJFAQVF5KC4bIwM-r2iX7omNUZ4qCpOMbLWI2TrqJKBxc9zu2qw-2jrXy8LFmSbjCNQQfwLpSPlmHshniJ_nQPag8NKR9fyTj-Kc7UKf4PkDyliirmDokQMbHXxV238wA1W7wFmnJvyQnJHj8DcoqWtFZsKVmRIdIW1iUouTkytc3Umes6eeSKX7WlOYlbfP3bCCZceErTT976K-1PZUM-IBn6vZ99XwtviKvSbII4ApLde7wc6gPJdxr1rLmpgE87P6Dg%3D)

Peter,

Long before I ever put on a badge, I made a simple promise to myself:

When something is broken, you don't complain - _you fix it._

That philosophy guided me through eight years as Sheriff. It's why I stood up to cartels, why I defended our border communities, and why I backed our deputies even when it wasn't politically convenient.

But today, something bigger is broken.

Washington has stopped listening to the people who make this country work. Not the lobbyists. Not the bureaucrats. _The people_.

The ranchers who wake up before dawn. The small business owners who sign both sides of the paycheck. The parents who are fighting to protect their kids' future. The families who still believe in God, Family, and Freedom.

They deserve a voice that won't fold when things get tough.

**That's why I'm running for Congress - not to join the political class, but to challenge it.** To restore the kind of leadership that answers to the people, not to the unelected and unaccountable. And I'm going to fight for that every single day. But I can't do it alone.

If you believe America needs leaders who show up, tell the truth, and stand firm - **[I'm asking you to join this mission.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=17270de6bbc541139f529278174f94b9&_e=GTil3XJ0rfs4yS9IX4h-u2P-y4bXla4sbgYVNt7duwokYELXh0bfmuOfL7lSLLC2PDEjbYH35VFadi5o1vU4vL1FvCVrjk11qpXJ-In1ATy3IsnwTJ344PpNZ4Ee_2nxvgrXutCKumVxdZCwkpr2rwn4I7EcjUQumjX8l8r0ExVwuQNz3nIkRqJzMpAEmIv-BL04M1WOhhPurFeWOcXGv3BSb0tbp0hr0SttcghSDZxUMS0Tp_ADY4nWxvrJA2-kGoMjtAVDCuENJLxTA4ZxjNJLxb9Sl59o5UKHApvimmy-HSY0TvrH7k5w1sNSmL48VyyS8jXrGpOhqY4CcjFZab78TFanMxq3OcdiGNtFsSoLAp5W5emveeF_ThSNJ6Lyye409hgrChL6fd6hJYtwoL9MpRHiaizlUroX9DQZ91QyHUBLY2S1yxBSRKpM1gXQQt1oXyc7phVXLLlggfC-NE8RRmvN8LhKNr2HnTlKwSC6yOjM-1VAD0ktP0orATEWpuhHnT94jhH7Qi0nlVt8LluQl9cplJW2vwoSfl06-NCnUxuBrH6PNkWX09yZUiNZXL0Vo8kXjPizJgiVeEUIv5YjG6gd4VCd1rKLDg4EiZ5xkX6KA2A8VuQ2JIgtVhKLgdI1shKzNGSox_cAwzTI0SJiOjRpWV8nMQw8rd0ST6Q%3D)**

**[Grassroots supporters are the backbone of this campaign. clean_body: When something is broken, you don't complain — you fix it. | Peter, Long before I ever put on a badge, I made a simple promise to myself: When something is broken, you don't complain - you fix it. That philosophy guided me through eight years as Sheriff. It's why I stood up to cartels, why I defended our border communities, and why I backed our deputies even when it wasn't politically convenient. But today, something bigger is broken. Washington has stopped listening to the people who make this country work. Not the lobbyists. Not the bureaucrats. The people. The ranchers who wake up before dawn. The small business owners who sign both sides of the paycheck. The parents who are fighting to protect their kids' future. The families who still believe in God, Family, and Freedom. They deserve a voice that won't fold when things get tough. That's why I'm running for Congress - not to join the political class, but to challenge it. To restore the kind of leadership that answers to the people, not to the unelected and unaccountable. And I'm going to fight for that every single day. But I can't do it alone. If you believe America needs leaders who show up, tell the truth, and stand firm - Thank you for being in this fight, Mark Lamb Republican for Congress, AZ-5 Join Mark Lamb on social media! | | PAID FOR BY MARK LAMB FOR CONGRESS Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go: .

subject: He came for you. Let this devotional help you prepare your heart.
body:
Christmas is not just a time to celebrate, it’s a time to remember why we needed saving. | | | | _Please see a special message from our sponsor. If you would like to unsubscribe, visit this[link](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/u/6AvCzYe8saXKhUWs4Dq5uswpIjuqUc3O3bKwpNllWKJIWzWOSQj06Z8WucSWYlguMerUMk0DOP527KbN5OJEzuUaIq7FtU800dQdX1xz5A-Lx7MhZJY65MAdVtv2on6gU4sEWet1DGm_n9XHG9QAdswxj1QS06zf6UK6YYP0xyfYuMFuTMYDoNXu/5eiJPGwlMUDQ7L0KBvFrUrHGF1NUwWB8/16)_

Hi Friend, Christmas is not just a time to celebrate, it's a time to remember why we needed saving. Jesus didn't come to start a holiday. He came to rescue us from sin and bring us back to God. That's what this season is really about, a divine rescue mission. And at PreBorn!, we've created a simple devotional to help you prepare your heart with that truth at the center. [**It’s called**** _Unto Us a Child Is Born: 12 Scriptures to Prepare Your Heart for Christmas._**](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/i2mndD1dwCRa32u2uzm4_uEvELjxu6eafvV5McpFUG6eeT71lB6GaOhykRBtc62AcVgSaFOsiFYm7i5t_LY8R8ye25r383Ilks1NTvgCFq-1bspK-WFo4bqUFJjMIEGO42JbT3JItf0CwzfuvP3Vi5-sQYnKVinT26MjMF6DlL4l3RkQFan9V9pZKE3ffdb_ek3xCZVqAlgqpTnLjP3n744YBvh9vMxcP52ZMdlXGtrzMmfeKkO-oAx3RGTEzcKhpG00HJWEXwT_OlvwmyaIFQI0DuFEhjMW1wy2EV_gwAfx_07_dIS2SHGz6IDXpJC637KPPY6hbOnjNDZaY3ujV2w2tTIiOBUU6HnBV0Aqlx5RydwbxFmS96S2wnc23muHmQ0eQ9U064HNyY-ZvZD9BBfLM6u_qAiA9Qzfir8FR25htRIpHw57rmrcdDzw4o_aMH6e6AtkW6nHeV0wH46bowRGgatUeoYR0eCzeG7kHCuX4WDlZVkPuMKFdIWqtXSMnWXNr3oheZsSW_gLRYI6IIj5PsS2EJ-CLwpHwZ6fBe52LXv8Qdk5NKY2SFFJFPkzAv5RhB36r3ID4i3YdmUpvwjv4ziezyuD-MRKEacNEEMPvaQEDf-8EATHhz7lNtpZ7rVclYzlz5QRXcR_Cw/fomRX_tUfGmjVIu1YQYEkuBZTfP2YUry/16) This FREE 12-day devotional will walk you through:
---
* Full Scripture passages that tell the Christmas story
* Short reflections from Dan Steiner to help you respond in faith
* Simple, heartfelt prayers to center your heart on Christ

---
[](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/bG_aAk-VHMRa1I6x6stYq23AZKg0oB5EHUMggciwIeya97dsWZuHMj5y1e_OKWizNB0Rq-HSFnDkYbyDKCSITTvivrV9raJai1elvaHBf2zbV51BYNhTT34bNZekCwiONZBnAvaHmA3fMSGI7IM0zPsZO1DMKK5t47TdHMuSNwM_77zX_2GqwEFOrNoTgCZNTM4ZNX-InKI0WuZX8iLAoLrtZMWmTrnjr_Kc8HMl00kjSgx-tpbN16fI8qPNgXslQAkGJpio6GFF4Jh1swignN9Os1PwzHXnk8QNYheb3z81OKex77lEGaHNRMWPOBkdxDkp82j4KVucOEoRS4MSEX8B0OX3iAR5y_TzEf1HLMbrEd3Fp_VWL497Der45VAEaSnYf-HqbEXNZg9lztbgKFQpuyKzzg9w00KDOJa1CxpqzU-rHWrJS5YVWJQmfALnvs3XfkScRA2c3eqa1pyoQEnNcfmu62ycU5Jj8Cfd1zuv5YV48AHeeVweBEuCa-iVewYMLIVYJ_i2cRfcSg2XC_g3W5owygDRn3VvN8JJozgwffBfGCEknkHt7yKA-7ke-7JrDsaLohbkNL_c81tv-yUdAtHp5iqetnTPWgUWy_IjxN68dLcNd5qZ6Dgii-HCdE2RocIY9NmcEIDipw/WzNFphTR6EGw8L-s63JMcXkzO9xuGbgT/16)

Whether your December is busy or quiet, we hope this helps you focus on what matters most: the miracle of Christ's coming for you. You can get your copy here: **[https://resources.preborn.com/unto-us-a-child-is-born](http://links.redconservatives.com/s/c/CUG3qmFR5w9Q60NKD0XxkWgdvbOf5B5B89NdTmtytVO1bzQhjGtNzD8yUvPU4n9A2xSC8bQCsw5ivrTteoHMQ3_H1EzwinD4fjt_-yb4jbRdmytUc7rFSJRVIUZj1H4ioL48JupzjbdVLximZeuhUglOahZhfAfvYMgw_FVZn0jL9Tc9H5Uw2Euf05n2u7WEXlR1B7YPEGn8UVMbtmc6wp_cIIAmQk_-w5HP01TyfJm-gsfJNCcGrT66Q6ZBhYpyoOEL0a_6Lbhp1qd_rKpMWP4vWO27yZ4aBubAOiJw8nOysg_uXUo9676fDCDR4uco4yQ8aU4-2lnBqjbK7RqsOX57Lk-OMr76_Quecq0vGc2kWsKuPebBdS0lIP_l20bM5gt_5FAnJGDhVbyO3xMIZ1Cq7GbjEk7YSyYuiofPEhU0E60e3qyupyQBkSQ5G4VcXmCYbsJQwYHbrKI0W9B621yOyNaQvLTBiwkQ_iJzHfwy2rHV6KQa2TQuytOjrcLb8YzMNgznX7Fk8hSQ3bwy7B2UAuDTg7VupGlQoAgJPFG2FOQtl_4o4v0ycJvOHpZr7H0XJZtvt8JQkTsLmdQtcyUWVSTR5dvi-CifOHzZVuiIbHd-5RmScX4hFyp9ZG31aFB2-FDoVWKvdbgrIA/2eaGIRO9YGmHdvEvx-MVe_hT4sEz1bUO/16)**

We pray this resource will help focus your mind and renew your joy in Christ this Christmas season! Merry Christmas,

The PreBorn! Team

name: Dan Goldman
subject: Let me explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
|
#
---
Peter, In just a moment, I’m going to ask you to **[make a contribution of any amount that’s in your budget to my campaign](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121775250/590543058/1749249761?refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20251222_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YmI3Y2MwMC00YWRmLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExZWM4YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=djtULpoabrhn3Csq89g4XMe4AuQVgkZO5FqBjMh3FiA=).** But before I do, I hope you’ll let me explain why I’m counting on your support. House Republicans have made their priorities clear: **they kicked 15 million Americans off their health insurance to pay for tax cuts for the wealthiest Americans.** Meanwhile, they’re bending the knee to Donald Trump as he targets immigrant communities, decimates our democratic principles, and uses his position of power to enrich himself and his allies. It’s more important than ever that we win back the House for Democrats in 2026 and elect leaders who will stand up against this cruel and corrupt administration. I have dedicated my career to holding powerful actors accountable, whether in the courtroom or the halls of Congress. From prosecuting organized crime to serving as the Democrats’ lead counsel in Trump’s first impeachment, I know what it takes to expose lawlessness and corruption. **But this fight for accountability has not come easy. It’s made me the target of relentless attacks from the far-right and Donald Trump himself. That’s where you come in.** At the end of this month, we’ll face our last FEC deadline of the year. These reports show how much grassroots strength campaigns have behind them. And as soon as these reports get released, Republicans pore through them to determine which seats they should target, craft new lines of attack, and shift their strategy on the campaign trail. [**Your support sends a message to Trump and his Republican allies around the country about what matters to the people. So please, will you make a donation of any amount to my campaign today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121775251/590543059/1749249761?refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20251222_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YmI3Y2MwMC00YWRmLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExZWM4YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=djtULpoabrhn3Csq89g4XMe4AuQVgkZO5FqBjMh3FiA=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ |

clean_body: | Peter, In just a moment, I’m going to ask you to =. But before I do, I hope you’ll let me explain why I’m counting on your support. House Republicans have made their priorities clear: they kicked 15 million Americans off their health insurance to pay for tax cuts for the wealthiest Americans. Meanwhile, they’re bending the knee to Donald Trump as he targets immigrant communities, decimates our democratic principles, and uses his position of power to enrich himself and his allies. It’s more important than ever that we win back the House for Democrats in 2026 and elect leaders who will stand up against this cruel and corrupt administration. I have dedicated my career to holding powerful actors accountable, whether in the courtroom or the halls of Congress. From prosecuting organized crime to serving as the Democrats’ lead counsel in Trump’s first impeachment, I know what it takes to expose lawlessness and corruption. But this fight for accountability has not come easy. It’s made me the target of relentless attacks from the far-right and Donald Trump himself. That’s where you come in. At the end of this month, we’ll face our last FEC deadline of the year. These reports show how much grassroots strength campaigns have behind them. And as soon as these reports get released, Republicans pore through them to determine which seats they should target, craft new lines of attack, and shift their strategy on the campaign trail. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you, Dan Dan Goldman for New York PO BOX 3306 New York, NY 10008 United States | mailto:info@dangoldmanforny.com | Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York

| Fellow Patriot,
---
| Charlie Kirk lived fast. And he lived loud.

He filled arenas. He lit a fire in the next generation on campus.

He confronted lies and spoke truth with boldness.

And he built a movement and a machine that few ever thought possible.

I saw it up close -- _Charlie moved at a pace most couldn 't keep up with. _

But in the middle of all the noise... he made a quiet decision that changed everything.

_**He started observing the Sabbath. **_

Not as a box to check. Not as a religious performance.

_But as an act of obedience. _

As a way of saying, **_" God, You are enough. And because You are enough, I need not carry the weight of a world that was never mine to hold." _**

Every week -- no matter what -- Charlie stopped.

He turned off the noise. He stepped away from the battlefield.

No email. No media. No work.

He gave his full attention fully to God, his wife Erika, and his children.

It was hard at first -- for someone who carried so much.

But over time, it changed him.

And before he was assassinated, he wrote a book about what he had learned...

| Fellow Patriot, like I mentioned, this isn't a political book.

It's not a culture war manifesto.

It's a call to stop.

To rest. To breathe. To return to God.

**Because Charlie believed America hadn 't just forgotten truth... It had forgotten trust. **

Trust that the world keeps spinning when you step away.

Trust that God is in control.

Trust that rest is not weakness -- it's worship.

**In _Stop, in the Name of God,_ you'll discover: **

🔥 How Charlie reclaimed the Sabbath in a world built on burnout

🔥 What sacred rest gave back to him -- as a father, husband, and believer

🔥 Why he believed this message could spark revival in a restless generation

Charlie wrote this book because he knew what it meant to nearly lose his peace -- and what it felt like to find it again.

That's the heartbeat of his final message.

| Charlie Kirk didn't waste his time on earth.

He left behind a family. He left behind a movement. And he left behind this truth...

For anyone ready to step off the treadmill... and walk back toward what's eternal.

Fellow Patriot, thank you -- in advance -- for helping reach the next generation with truth, faith, and moral courage.

These are the very things Charlie gave his life for.

May the message he left behind lead you -- just as it led him -- to a deeper trust in God...

A stronger love for your family...

And a renewed peace in your own soul.
---
| **For Charlie, **

**Justin Streiff **
Chief Operating Officer
Turning Point USA

clean_body: Charlie’s final message—support Turning Point USA & receive his last book. | | | Fellow Patriot, | Charlie Kirk lived fast. And he lived loud. He filled arenas. He lit a fire in the next generation on campus. He confronted lies and spoke truth with boldness. And he built a movement and a machine that few ever thought possible. I saw it up close -- Charlie moved at a pace most couldn 't keep up with. But in the middle of all the noise... he made a quiet decision that changed everything. He started observing the Sabbath. Not as a box to check. Not as a religious performance. But as an act of obedience. As a way of saying, " God, You are enough. And because You are enough, I need not carry the weight of a world that was never mine to hold." Every week -- no matter what -- Charlie stopped. He turned off the noise. He stepped away from the battlefield. No email. No media. No work. He gave his full attention fully to God, his wife Erika, and his children. It was hard at first -- for someone who carried so much. But over time, it changed him. And before he was assassinated, he wrote a book about what he had learned... | | This was Charlie's final message. His final act of trust. A book not about politics... but about peace. It 's called: Stop, in the Name of God. | | Fellow Patriot, like I mentioned, this isn't a political book. It's not a culture war manifesto. It's a call to stop. To rest. To breathe. To return to God. Because Charlie believed America hadn 't just forgotten truth... It had forgotten trust. Trust that the world keeps spinning when you step away. Trust that God is in control. Trust that rest is not weakness -- it's worship. In Stop, in the Name of God, you'll discover: 🔥 How Charlie reclaimed the Sabbath in a world built on burnout 🔥 What sacred rest gave back to him -- as a father, husband, and believer 🔥 Why he believed this message could spark revival in a restless generation Charlie wrote this book because he knew what it meant to nearly lose his peace -- and what it felt like to find it again. That's the heartbeat of his final message. | | Charlie Kirk didn't waste his time on earth. He left behind a family. He left behind a movement. And he left behind this truth... For anyone ready to step off the treadmill... and walk back toward what's eternal. Fellow Patriot, thank you -- in advance -- for helping reach the next generation with truth, faith, and moral courage. These are the very things Charlie gave his life for. May the message he left behind lead you -- just as it led him -- to a deeper trust in God... A stronger love for your family... And a renewed peace in your own soul. | For Charlie, Justin Streiff Chief Operating Officer Turning Point USA | | | P.S.Stop, in the Name of God is Charlie Kirk's final message -- written in obedience, shaped by Scripture, and grounded in trust in the Lord. | | 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044

| | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

clean_body: Do you have money in any of these banks?| | | | December 22 | | | | | How “Trump’s New Dollar” Could Impact Your Wealth | | | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
