Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671. | | You are receiving this newsletter from Your Capital Minds (YCM), an esteemed member of the Stark Media LLC family. name: Tim Kaine
subject: Choosing hope
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025]
Friends,
As this year draws to a close, I’m approaching the holidays with a hopeful spirit.
To me, Christmas time is a reminder that even in uncertain and difficult times, hope is a light that can be found in the darkness. But hope is not passive — it’s something we carry with us and put into action. We welcome the stranger, stand against injustice, foster peace, and choose mercy, especially when doing so is hard.
This has been a difficult year for many families here in Virginia and around the world. Too many are struggling to make ends meet, facing fear and instability, and worrying for loved ones. In moments like these, hope matters more than ever — not as wishful thinking, but as a commitment to care for one another and keep moving forward together.
My faith teaches me that hope endures when we choose compassion over fear and solidarity over division. That’s the spirit I’m holding onto this Christmas.
Anne and I wish you and your family peace, hope, and community this holiday season.
Joy to the World!
—Tim Kaine
Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #272
Williamsburg, VA 23185

subject: Major escalation: Colorado joins redistricting fight

body:
This is an existential crisis. Colorado must pick up the torch, join the fight, and meet this moment head on

Peter,
If Democrats reclaim the House next November the MAGA agenda hits a brick wall. Trump will become a lame duck president incapable of fulfilling any further policy goals. And right now a blue wave and a cataclysmic GOP defeat is exactly what we're on track for.
The only way MAGA can survive 2026 is if they rig the game.
Which is why in red states across the country, Trump is pushing for new congressional maps that will make up for the dozens of seats they are set to lose. A move that could establish one party rule for generations.
---
| [](https://6s79z9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Z8RlsunOgipnsfCbHLJsgtZ4gYDu8-r1xYIflgo79WXMEebFKxqE1ghIw3WDUPhY1dXcCM-mmcRudqoOj_SEt3iEIDbk0wzmiXqbnjHghCpf4t3KsOOnktygLOM091Z0W-wvTljrfo2IiC-T4d-o3dnTTQs0jbufy61N47Sor11Yt7aO40Rxdc3fPmsDv406pJhGgMMK0KFl87rrhi4ovnML9GKDufWvupTci--6NdOMdA0JeFmEIQ==&c=X6yHV_kWeITZY4CAqCHGPWTvJzgu3HLhDEq9N9y5oBhEvpQcXTnJRw==&ch=Egw6-5yYxNrKkvD_axvGA_K4SKa_yg5s6dFgJA16acGy0aMKPmX-Ag==)

The GOP is moving fast. Gerrymandered maps have passed in Texas, North Carolina, Missouri, and a push for redistricting is underway in Indiana and Florida with more red states soon to follow.
This is an existential crisis. No matter how unpopular Trump becomes, if left unchecked, MAGA will create enough new red seats to ensure their House majority is insurmountable making it impossible for Dems to reclaim the House.
However, Americans are pushing back. Last month, California fired the opening blow of the Democratic counter-salvo with their vote to pass Proposition 50, a ballot measure that gives CA a fair congressional map to counter Trump's gerrymandering push.
But California alone won't be enough. To save our Democracy, blue states like Colorado must pick up the torch, join the fight, and meet this moment head on
This is why Colorado Draws the Line is proud to announce that we are introducing the ballot measure that will give every Coloradan a chance to vote on a new Congressional map that will make Colorado bluer.
We have the power to level the playing field and counter Trump's power grab with fair maps that will put power back in the hands of the people but it will require an astronomically expensive push to get this on the ballot and in front of Colorado voters.
MAGA is about to throw everything they've got into stopping us and we need to brace for impact. [Will you rush a contribution of $50, $25, or even $5, to become a founding donor and help Colorado fight fire with fire?](https://6s79z9hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Z8RlsunOgipnsfCbHLJsgtZ4gYDu8-r1xYIflgo79WXMEebFKxqE1ghIw3WDUPhYe3nw99vkuXa7e5sdig9l5npNPi5tU0bM58uDlXCqftala5-yDgDhXC7AZBYUomrOymxgVUcCdwrbhFWX5s2TOxFqgvXD7Ih27riWMCTAAvobK7cOIfX00_2ITDFD1krtydMlb_6ZJjzlFU6HrGLLC5Xhv2bIEyRThvrx5gfiLr1EVYk5Xqi62w==&c=X6yHV_kWeITZY4CAqCHGPWTvJzgu3HLhDEq9N9y5oBhEvpQcXTnJRw==&ch=Egw6-5yYxNrKkvD_axvGA_K4SKa_yg5s6dFgJA16acGy0aMKPmX-Ag==)

clean_body: This is an existential crisis. Colorado must pick up the torch, join the fight, and meet this moment head on | | | | | == Peter, If Democrats reclaim the House next November the MAGA agenda hits a brick wall. Trump will become a lame duck president incapable of fulfilling any further policy goals. And right now a blue wave and a cataclysmic GOP defeat is exactly what we're on track for. The only way MAGA can survive 2026 is if they rig the game. Which is why in red states across the country, Trump is pushing for new congressional maps that will make up for the dozens of seats they are set to lose. A move that could establish one party rule for generations. | == The GOP is moving fast. Gerrymandered maps have passed in Texas, North Carolina, Missouri, and a push for redistricting is underway in Indiana and Florida with more red states soon to follow. This is an existential crisis. No matter how unpopular Trump becomes, if left unchecked, MAGA will create enough new red seats to ensure their House majority is insurmountable making it impossible for Dems to reclaim the House. However, Americans are pushing back. Last month, California fired the opening blow of the Democratic counter-salvo with their vote to pass Proposition 50, a ballot measure that gives CA a fair congressional map to counter Trump's gerrymandering push. But California alone won't be enough. To save our Democracy, blue states like Colorado must pick up the torch, join the fight, and meet this moment head on This is why Colorado Draws the Line is proud to announce that we are introducing the ballot measure that will give every Coloradan a chance to vote on a new Congressional map that will make Colorado bluer. We have the power to level the playing field and counter Trump's power grab with fair maps that will put power back in the hands of the people but it will require an astronomically expensive push to get this on the ballot and in front of Colorado voters. MAGA is about to throw everything they've got into stopping us and we need to brace for impact. == If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | == Together we can fight back, make history, and ensure that Colorado plays its part in ensuring a fair election. Thank you for standing with us. Val Nosler Beck Executive Director Colorado Draws the Line | | | | == | | == | Donate by mail: Colorado Draws the Line == == | Paid for by Colorado Draws the Line. Registered agent: David Scott Martinez. | | | | | | Colorado Draws the Line | 1601 Arapahoe Street FL 10 | Denver, CO 80202 US | |

name: Roy Cooper
subject: It’s the end of another quarter, Peter
body:
He’s wrong for this country.
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2365?source=&t=1&akid=204%2E124072%2E_Oh_IJ)
Peter, it’s almost unimaginable to me that someone could have the privilege of serving this nation in the United States Senate and decide to serve only their political party. But that’s what we’re seeing of far too many Republicans in Washington. It’s exactly what we’d get from my opponent if he wins this toss-up race. He’s not running because he believes that Americans deserve loyalty from their elected leaders. _He said he’s running because President Trump told him to._ **You just can’t be 100% loyal to the people if you’re 100% loyal to a political party or a president.** Look, at the end of the day, Michael Whatley would not be a Senator for the people. He’d just be another rubber stamp for the MAGA agenda. He’s wrong for this state and our country. We have to defeat him. **[We’re 9 days out from our final end-of-quarter filing deadline of 2025 — the last before our election year begins. We set a $1 million online fundraising goal. It’s high, but since Whatley has big-money donors and PACs lined up to support him, it’s what we need to raise in order to keep up. I’m personally asking if you can get us started on our goal with a donation of any amount now.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/3215?t=7&akid=204%2E124072%2E_Oh_IJ)** Can’t do this without you, Roy Cooper [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/3215?t=8&akid=204%2E124072%2E_Oh_IJ)
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?source=&t=2&akid=204%2E124072%2E_Oh_IJ)** | [DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?source=&t=3&akid=204%2E124072%2E_Oh_IJ)
---
[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1915?source=&t=4&akid=204%2E124072%2E_Oh_IJ)
[SHOP OUR MERCH STORE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2133?t=5&akid=204%2E124072%2E_Oh_IJ)
[info@roycooper.com](mailto:info@roycooper.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.roycooper.com/go/825?t=6&akid=204%2E124072%2E_Oh_IJ)
Cooper Victory Fund
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602
Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Cooper for North Carolina, DSCC, and North Carolina Democratic Party — Federal.
---
Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible.
The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.
Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.
By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

[You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time.](http://act.roycooper.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=204%2E124072%2E_Oh_IJ)
If you wish to receive fewer messages from us, [submit this form to let us know.](https://act.roycooper.com/signup/i-want-less-emails-cooper-north-carolina/?t=9&akid=204%2E124072%2E_Oh_IJ)

_**EXHIBIT 1 - JOINT FUNDRAISING NOTICE **_

Team Nunn ("JFC") is a joint fundraising committee composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn ("Campaign"), Call to Service PAC ("LPAC") and NRCC (each, a "Committee," and, collectively, the "Committees"). Any contribution to the JFC permissible under the Federal Election Campaign Act, as amended ("FECA"), from contributors who have not exceeded their applicable federal contribution limits, shall be allocated among the Committees pursuant to FECA and the formula set forth in this Notice.

_**Contributions Made by an Individual or Federal Non-Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Individuals or federal non-multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $322,100. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $7,000, designating up to $3,500 to the primary election and up to $3,500 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3\. NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $44,300 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $132,900 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

_**Contributions Made by a Federal Multicandidate Political Committee:**_
Multicandidate PACs may contribute up to $120,000. Such contributions shall be allocated in the following order:
1\. Campaign shall receive any contribution not exceeding $10,000, designating up to $5,000 to the primary election and up to $5,000 to the general election, provided such limits apply.
2\. LPAC shall receive any contribution not exceeding $5,000 annually.
3 .NRCC shall receive for its general account any contribution not exceeding $15,000 annually.
4\. NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Building Fund, provided such limits apply.
5 .NRCC shall receive any contribution not to exceed $45,000 for its Legal Proceedings Fund, provided such limits apply.

Contributions to Team Nunn, or to any participating Committee individually, are not deductible as charitable donations for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, labor organizations, national banks, federal government contractors, foreign nationals without green cards, and other federally impermissible sources are prohibited. The contributor's signature designates his or her contribution to the elections described above. Contributions that exceed a donor's contribution limit to a participating Committee shall be reallocated to the remaining Committees according to this allocation formula to the extent permitted by FECA. Any contributor may designate his or her contribution to a specific participant Committee to the extent permitted by FECA. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle or calendar year, as applicable.
Paid for by Team Nunn, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Iowans for Zach Nunn, Call to Service PAC, and NRCC.

subject: Trump's new, political census?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
Newsweek: Is Donald Trump's New Census Constitutional? [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/Newsweek_TrumpCensus.png]
Team: President Donald Trump is looking to change the way the U.S. Census Bureau collects data, posting on Truth Social that his new method would utilize " the results and information gained from the Presidential Election of 2024 ."
Though any efforts to change how the census is conducted are sure to face legal challenges, Trump's directive threatens to shift the balance of political power in the country.
We would like to hear from more voters in your area on this issue. Will you take our one-question poll right away?
Team: Do you support a new, mid-decade census based on the 2024 election?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:
YES [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=122225_1yes&amount=15] NO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=122225_1no&amount=15]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=122225_1&amount=20]

name: VoteVets.org
subject: A humble request: $5 for VoteVets
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
#
$5, Peter.
Yes, just $5 for VoteVets.
That’s what we need you to chip in today, because everyone’s about to sign off for the holidays and our fundraising is about to plummet.
We need to raise whatever we can now, because on New Year’s Eve we’re hitting our final official FEC deadline of the year. Once it passes, we’re legally required to report out our fundraising numbers. VoteVets is one of the most powerful organizations on the left, and everyone is going to be watching that report to see what we can do in 2026.
So, yes: $5 because we ran through the tape this year and spent millions winning races around the country.
$5 because we have plans to spend millions more taking back the House and Senate next year.
$5 because VoteVets is one of the only organizations that can reach the voters we need to turn out to have any chance at victory next November.
And, yes, $5 because we want to show everyone — the media, our allies, and our opponents — that we’re entering 2026 ready to fight like hell for our country.
**[So, please. Chip in $5 to VoteVets and help us close out 2025 strong.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-dec25.3jrL2s&refcode=em251222-1-160&t=1&akid=34835%2E3013755%2EjUFNEl)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[CHIP IN $5](https://act.votevets.org/go/4573?c0=vv-pac-em-dec25.9o93qk&refcode=em251222-1-160&t=2&akid=34835%2E3013755%2EjUFNEl)**
---
****
| **[CHIP IN MORE](https://act.votevets.org/go/2933?c0=vv-pac-em-dec25.u72hZ7&refcode=em251222-1-160&t=3&akid=34835%2E3013755%2EjUFNEl)**
---
****
Thank you,
The team at VoteVets

| | [Donate Another Amount](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10673?t=7&akid=1696%2E49239%2Ek7UmJS)
---
Thank you for standing with us, null.
Team Haley
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10674?t=8&akid=1696%2E49239%2Ek7UmJS) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10668?t=9&akid=1696%2E49239%2Ek7UmJS)

Thank you,
Haley

# [#]
Happy Holidays, Peter!From all of us here at Latimer HQ, to all of you: Happy Hannukah, Merry Christmas, Blessed Kwanzaa, Happy Holidays, and Happy New Year!

Thank you for being part of this community. It is an honor to have supporters like you by my side, and an even greater honor to be your voice in Congress. I am immensely grateful to you and am eager to continue accomplishing our goals for working families in NY-16, and beyond.

Have a wonderful holiday season!

— George Latimer

name: Chris Pappas HQ
subject: This race is heating up
body:
[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1001&akid=4167%2E582294%2EZPquxh ]Chris Pappas for Senate[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1002&akid=4167%2E582294%2EZPquxh ]Chris Pappas for Senate

“FEC Deadline”

“End-of-quarter goal”

You may have heard these terms floated around. But what do they mean?

On December 31st we close the books for the year and soon after submit our
final fundraising numbers of 2025 to the Federal Elections Committee
(FEC). From there our finances are public for all to see – including the
press, GOP super PACs, and our Republican opponent, John Sununu.

All eyes are on NH, and they want to see what we’ve
accomplished.

They want to know if we have the resources to keep this campaign going.
They want to know how competitive we’re going to be.

We need to prove that we have a strong, grassroots army that isn’t afraid
of a tough fight. [ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251222_1.2eW7gi&refcode=em20251222-1&t=1003&akid=4167%2E582294%2EZPquxh ]Chip in $5 now to prove it.

[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251222_1.2eW7gi&amount=5&refcode=em20251222-1&t=1004&akid=4167%2E582294%2EZPquxh ]Donate $5 »

Since our opponent decided to run for Senate, this race has been heating
up, and the pressure is only going to keep growing.

John Sununu is the GOP’s hand-picked candidate, which means he has access
to resources from billionaire-backed groups who will do anything to flip
this seat.

Meanwhile we’re running a grassroots campaign that’s relying on the
support of folks like you. Your individual contribution is a part of our
public FEC report that people have their eyes on. Just $5 here or there
adds up and makes a huge difference.

When we show up with a significant number of supporters on our FEC report,
we come out on top.

Granite Staters know they can’t be bought, so having the support of folks
like you
means a lot.

[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251222_1.2eW7gi&refcode=em20251222-1&t=1005&akid=4167%2E582294%2EZPquxh ]Our deadline is December 31st. Please rush a donation
of any amount today to prove to the onlookers that we will win this thing.

[ https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251222_1.2eW7gi&amount=5&refcode=em20251222-1&t=1024&akid=4167%2E582294%2EZPquxh ]Donate $5 »

Thank you,

Team Pappas

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.chrispappas.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=4167%2E582294%2EZPquxh

name: Mark Kelly
subject: You're critical to Democrats' winning strategy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hi, it's Mark Kelly here with an urgent request.

Despite Trump's best efforts to sabotage our voting rights and undermine our democracy, voters everywhere are rejecting his far-right agenda — **but there's still a mountain of work to do between now and the midterms.**

[**As the DSCC's Vice Chair, I've seen firsthand how valuable it is for the DSCC to receive up-to-the-minute input from supporters like you. So please, will you take your Democratic Strategy Survey today to help determine our strongest path to victory?**](http://go.dscc.org/go/22336?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20251222-MarkKelly-KellyStrategySurvey-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20251222-MarkKelly-KellyStrategySurvey-ETG-sl1&akid=22177%2E9716520%2EHe52dn)

| | [Enter Survey](http://go.dscc.org/go/22336?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20251222-MarkKelly-KellyStrategySurvey-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20251222-MarkKelly-KellyStrategySurvey-ETG-sl1&akid=22177%2E9716520%2EHe52dn)
---

There's no way around it: The greatest threat to our democracy today is Donald Trump. He'll do whatever he can to hold onto power, and so far, Republicans have been complicit in helping him do it. This administration is costing us jobs, threatening our constitution, and undermining our health care — but together, we can turn the tide and reverse the damage.

**The best way to fight Trump's extremism is to elect Democrats to the Senate — and with your help,_we'll get it done._**

We're fighting like hell to save our democracy. If you're with me, please: [**Will you spend a few minutes taking the DSCC's Democratic strategy survey to help us chart a better course forward?**](http://go.dscc.org/go/22336?ask=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20251222-MarkKelly-KellyStrategySurvey-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20251222-MarkKelly-KellyStrategySurvey-ETG-sl1&akid=22177%2E9716520%2EHe52dn)

| [Enter Survey](http://go.dscc.org/go/22336?ask=5&t=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20251222-MarkKelly-KellyStrategySurvey-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20251222-MarkKelly-KellyStrategySurvey-ETG-sl1&akid=22177%2E9716520%2EHe52dn)
---

As always, I'm so grateful for your help.

Mark

Vice Chair, DSCC

[](http://go.dscc.org/go/22336?ask=5&t=11&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20251222-MarkKelly-KellyStrategySurvey-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20251222-MarkKelly-KellyStrategySurvey-ETG-sl1&akid=22177%2E9716520%2EHe52dn)

Former U.S. Navy combat pilot, engineer, and NASA astronaut Mark Kelly is a senator from Arizona and a Vice Chair of the DSCC. He's fighting to lower costs for Arizonans, hold Trump accountable, and create good-paying jobs.

**[Will you answer Mark Kelly's call to fight back against National Republicans by flipping the Senate?](https://go.dscc.org/go/22348?t=1&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20251222-MarkKelly-KellyStrategySurvey-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20251222-MarkKelly-KellyStrategySurvey-ETG-sl1&akid=22177%2E9716520%2EHe52dn)**

| [Donate](https://go.dscc.org/go/22348?t=2&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20251222-MarkKelly-KellyStrategySurvey-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20251222-MarkKelly-KellyStrategySurvey-ETG-sl1&akid=22177%2E9716520%2EHe52dn)
---

_Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and an astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration._
| |

[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-senate-democrats-2025-q4-recurring?refcode=DPE-footer&amount=5&recurring=1&t=3&refcode2=22177_9716520_He52dn&akid=22177%2E9716520%2EHe52dn)
* * *
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please **[click here](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-senate-democrats-2025-q4?refcode=DPE-footer&t=4&refcode2=22177_9716520_He52dn&akid=22177%2E9716520%2EHe52dn)**.

name: Reeves Survey Team
subject: Quick Question For You, Friend – It’s Important.
body:
Bryce believes the best campaigns start by listening. Let your voice be heard now.

| | | | [ ](https://links.email.brycereeves.com/els/v4/luo5qrzhksdf-riu08j35/Yy3HiX6lUEDmvhuW3nb2D2dnExst2EzIWmuF2Ta-5634_GrNWrZvxfVA8aIl9IUOsdI9/MM3jrG5Vg0dhoEeqWCHZnAaLGkhQ4MSk25YuZ9jIPcyG8U9NpSuWSmzRugdersycINDdgcFS37PTHUedUWZ07iYXJGACoxHYQmvWOouu3FhR7azkBwBWGj6jaqDKsDoQlfNeozhT3ZH-9Gaq8YE25_0wlt7yv-EHT3NcdrEDhp7_2vCnKF_XCg_BBpn0yFalV4KOyNSb8jvqNrKaVgBlTKwUOausFYjmfRjnuacBWeYSzSYG9gvFBP2KTKppojCVpQdEWgos-shIoMepaz01uBMpGJM91mYQHnjIoeKTFts4YTV2dKz_ryHAURq8m-Otrc32V6tl_5EfS2gx_T2Jx_VLbgXQ0SxmBd4wqSpLwxCyJtEMdTQ=)
---
| | Friend, before we take another step in this Senate race, Bryce Reeves needs something that no consultant, pollster, or strategist can provide: **Your unfiltered priorities.** Bryce is a veteran, small-business owner, and problem-solver who’s spent his career cutting through noise and focusing on what actually matters to people – not what Washington _thinks_ matters. _Now he’s asking one simple question:_ [**_What should rise to the top of the agenda right now – for Virginia and for the country? >>>_**](https://links.email.brycereeves.com/els/v4/gkuo0fyx9n9zuv1brsljl/Yy3HiX6lUEDmvhuW3nb2D2dnExst2EzIWmuF2Ta-5634_GrNWrZvxfVA8aIl9IUOsdI9/MM3jrG5Vg0dhoEeqWCHZnAaLGkhQ4MSk25YuZ9jIPRS6GWULMpNwhRC3YNnGZIsEwP0xF1sgrf9ctSTmvzYZ75K6cAdV8rLN4KyezXQP_CjgUh0xwc7snCK09rJqijEfXGlELONkd-wgM54RaX2gQHNyeEseZF-Ab8tAcSBom4WqD3vUjTQjWrxKi13FzhYq68iup0OxaCKKmYNQU9adTmh1MH8PH2N1RqhFc50N4ZQnB0sgt-T8vrIdG1kNBpgg-a2lj7VVvw7Dq03mSPMiecT5CcmH7K0z6pcm2RoIt1qQJxtJ_io5LEMZsn4KzlP_zIoGra32SyUyYDKttU4uAyBhlJkV5E-WWGH4BnQJ6K-SD1pzXHY=)
---
| | | [ TAKE THE OFFICIAL PRIORITIES SURVEY ](https://links.email.brycereeves.com/els/v4/thphrwsg21gm3s182gli0/Yy3HiX6lUEDmvhuW3nb2D2dnExst2EzIWmuF2Ta-5634_GrNWrZvxfVA8aIl9IUOsdI9/MM3jrG5Vg0dhoEeqWCHZnAaLGkhQ4MSk25YuZ9jIPaTIimD87gWXB2PHJ_8mv3-H7XSNSHRoVwvJji6K8ymXXG1-wGoG4N7br35LrP9BXmq1L-80juJDXb4DxMu-cRIQ1RuWTRYouvLvkPBSP7Fexcf3t1zH7VZxHvXMewXVx9mUca7fgHTVz6euXBZ4fUDTHB301nzqkVD36_Tan3wRNNqPn0DVSAW1VRvmETq8JqkZ1ar8bYgBoJcNA1GJu0u6v7BuQ9kE5umBWHwBAXjknXfqYL2zjsTtNykGitAlOGxF3nQifYQ8j0xhDl5gWxhxRbu3eYtU8C4i4qzPP7-_QBiA98GoA4YrxlFHdGT3yM-6yQyyGFI=)
---
| | This isn’t a fundraising pitch. It’s not a gimmick. And it’s not something we ask often. clean_body: We have to stop them. | | | Here’s how Republicans apparently want to govern (make it make sense): → Cede congressional authority — allowing one man to govern on his whims of the day, even if that means gutting services like Medicaid → Take away your rights — from abortion care to the ballot box → Make everything more expensive — by pulling tariff numbers out of thin air → Speed up climate change — because they think they’re rich enough to avoid its effects → And gerrymander as many states as they can — so they can stay in power and avoid facing political consequences for their actions Our last hope of stopping them is Democratic candidates with a proven record of winning statewide in battleground states. Does that sound like anyone you know? ****** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be split with Roy Cooper and Able Dems immediately. ** Let’s show them what we’ve got, Team Cooper elects Democrats with disabilities. We fight to protect accessible voting, expand health care and Social Security, and equality for all. To donate by check, send to: Able Dems PAC c/o Pocketbook Strategies 1110 N Virgil Ave #375 Los Angeles, CA 90029 \- \- Paid for by Able Dems PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Gabby Giffords
subject: Bumping this to the top of your inbox
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

Hi, it’s Gabby Giffords. I wanted to make sure you saw this message. Fox News is airing ads to sell Trump-branded guns.
This comes right as House Republicans prepare to pass a bill for a national concealed carry mandate — which would allow people to carry hidden, loaded guns anywhere. Including in Pennsylvania.
Let me be clear: The only ones who benefit from this are the corporations selling these guns. _It’s shameful, which is why we won’t stop fighting._
[**Please rush a donation to help GIFFORDS PAC continue this work.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-q42025.UDsFRy&refcode=em251222-1-b&t=1&akid=11124%2E3935704%2ECYgExv)

_\---------- Begin forwarded message ---------
From: GIFFORDS.org
Subject:Fox News is running Trump guns commercials
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com _
Team,
Fox News is airing commercials about Trump-branded guns.
[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-q42025.UDsFRy&refcode=em251222-1-b&t=2&akid=11124%2E3935704%2ECYgExv)
**Instead of spending $545 on Trump guns, will you please donate $5.45 to help us elect leaders who will end gun violence?**
**[DONATE $5.45](https://go.giffords.org/go/64308?c0=giffords-em-q42025.oxQTDN&refcode=em251222-1-b&t=3&akid=11124%2E3935704%2ECYgExv)**
The gun industry is trying to find any possible way to flood our streets with more guns. Now, Fox News is letting them air gun commercials to profit even more.
[**If you are fed up with the gun lobby as much as we are — and you are ready to do something about it — we hope you’ll chip in $5.45 or more to GIFFORDS PAC today. Let’s send a message that we are united in a world free from gun violence.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-q42025.UDsFRy&refcode=em251222-1-b&t=4&akid=11124%2E3935704%2ECYgExv)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $5.45](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-q42025.mpFqoL&amount=5.45&refcode=em251222-1-b&t=5&akid=11124%2E3935704%2ECYgExv)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-q42025.XBpxZs&refcode=em251222-1-b&t=6&akid=11124%2E3935704%2ECYgExv)**

****
| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-q42025.BnaACt&refcode=em251222-1-b&t=8&akid=11124%2E3935704%2ECYgExv)**

name: Team Tina Newsletters
subject: Our December newsletter is here! 🗞️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek
body:
|
#
---
| | Hi Peter, Welcome to my team’s monthly newsletter. Here’s what I’ve been up to this month! I know life can be busy — especially during the holidays — so I appreciate any time you can dedicate to reading these monthly newsletters. Thanks!
— TK
---
* * *
**Governor Kotek announced her re-election campaign!**
_**“I’m running for reelection because Oregon values are on the line,”**_ Governor Kotek said.
_“When President Trump tried to force troops into our communities and rip away food assistance, we were ready. We stopped an unnecessary military deployment, restored SNAP benefits, and got help to families fast.**The choice is between a governor who will stand up for Oregon and protect what we believe in, or a governor who will let Donald Trump do whatever he wants. I will always stand with Oregonians.”**_
You can watch the full video [here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121784331/590570037/-803653937?v=0qAPACfXgps&refcode=AU_TK_CL_GEN_GEN_AC_20251222_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NWIzMzFjMi01NGRmLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExZWM4YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tvCyQvCWEiIklka_pH5knLDYTbC1nohCye5NnmwcI3g=&emci=11b01df0-fad9-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=95b331c2-54df-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&ceid=15353729).
* * *
**IBEW Local 48 endorses Tina for Oregon.**
“Tina Kotek is building Oregon’s future with union labor and good-paying jobs. She’s standing with IBEW workers to strengthen our workforce and deliver real results. We’re proud to endorse her for re-election.”
We’re so proud to have IBEW Local 48 on Team Tina!
* * *
**Governor Kotek distributed SNAP benefits to all recipients.**
Tina will fight against the Trump administration to keep food on the table for Oregonians, every step of the way.

clean_body: | | | Hi Peter, Welcome to my team’s monthly newsletter. Here’s what I’ve been up to this month! I know life can be busy — especially during the holidays — so I appreciate any time you can dedicate to reading these monthly newsletters. Thanks! — TK Governor Kotek announced her re-election campaign! “I’m running for reelection because Oregon values are on the line,” Governor Kotek said. “When President Trump tried to force troops into our communities and rip away food assistance, we were ready. We stopped an unnecessary military deployment, restored SNAP benefits, and got help to families fast.The choice is between a governor who will stand up for Oregon and protect what we believe in, or a governor who will let Donald Trump do whatever he wants. I will always stand with Oregonians.” You can watch the full video . IBEW Local 48 endorses Tina for Oregon. “Tina Kotek is building Oregon’s future with union labor and good-paying jobs. She’s standing with IBEW workers to strengthen our workforce and deliver real results. We’re proud to endorse her for re-election.” We’re so proud to have IBEW Local 48 on Team Tina! Governor Kotek distributed SNAP benefits to all recipients. Tina will fight against the Trump administration to keep food on the table for Oregonians, every step of the way. Governor Kotek stands with science-based Hepatitis B vaccination guidance. It’s clear we cannot trust our federal government and officials like HHS Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. to look out for us. That’s why Tina is moving Oregon forward on policies that protect our communities. Thanks for tuning in to this month’s edition of Team Tina’s Newsletter. Please forward this to a friend to help us reach more Oregonians — and if someone forwarded you this message, Thanks, team. Talk soon! — Team Tina = Tina for Oregon PO Box 42307 Portland, OR 97242 | mailto:info@tinafororegon.com | Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek

name: PA Working Families Party
subject: Chip in — or step up — to build PA’snext generation of candidates
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pennsylvania Working Families Party
body:
| | | Hi Peter, The PA Working Families Party’s **Candidate Recruitment and Training Program** exists for one simple reason: to help working-class Pennsylvanians run for public office — and win. We meet people who care deeply about their communities but have never seen themselves as candidates. Our training program helps change that. We walk people through what it actually takes to run — how to get started, raise money, talk about why they’re running, and build real grassroots support. For many participants, it’s the first time anyone has looked at them and said, _you should run — and we’ll help you do it._ Over the years, this program has helped launch WFP leaders like **Councilmembers Kendra Brooks** and **Nic O’Rourke** , along with dozens of other working-class candidates across Pennsylvania. In 2026, we expect to train more than 100 people getting ready to run in 2027 and 2028. They’re union members, caregivers, organizers, and community leaders. They want change — but they’re up against real barriers. Cost, access, and an insider political system make it hard for working people to take that first step. This program exists to break those barriers down. **And building this pipeline takes all of us.** **[When you chip in today, you’re helping make sure this program can reach more people — and that working-class candidates have a real movement behind them when they decide to run.](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqt1KgGElNLHWwWbO_pXXNSCqQiuRwVacY0k6S_JPknzp9bVK3JULb1xPyRCMnnY6NPnnd29m2A_Hkdcebg3znI_4ct96dU_nWeXYIepqVl1OmjPrY0Bv62rGfgYJ7Q8QzBko3mz6kbCyXBnnHaGcDHWG8a797oLd0WtnDnAUiuF6MkTSBy6mes1AZ20GiYj6D4ksdUaNnr_tDK8ZrmyEoY71dNRt2QmSUAoEIarJjHDu4GQ4f5aWAy-60CZQVagH0HPRtN9FX8UU7Hlx8x-rxNfRqpB0V_BkaxIyZT7Xxy5DRYKjShtP2C6gIqpvuI1OQgIejFDvHb2KqpPXmOb3EpEnLgFT4zPkIPUPz1M6lT7uldZ7kWB_vrC5Ogp8BWWgT5CF33lcOTWIcy9TSHPoN8jdw6tBLr-Gu5GLDZe0H_QNFv5noJ6bftkuHhsvK6tu30/4mn/V_I_z8d3TDSlaR-85UVlaA/h0/h001.0aUGVB1Zqotc1grkmEXRqWe685oab0V1s0qxvyZBjxM)** **[Chip in](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqt1KgGElNLHWwWbO_pXXNSCqQiuRwVacY0k6S_JPknzp9bVK3JULb1xPyRCMnnY6NPnnd29m2A_Hkdcebg3znI_n7XD4C3yYOoiI9zG9AWyAf4S1w7f0y1i6iZkpTzBJgonKvEunST2QQhFsQW-SkfUZu69K5x10hYwH9epvuAvhgyQKp68g_6Fl8y4mJRPMkm1q3GROFHfvp6J50l6DQGNxK2kQZ_cQDpS1H7i9XFL8zLYZerZdh9EOrQYFj3IfeLIZA6pMDcLVdJH1xcL9BCqdEVcutcUPWRptr3f1_qNDh0E_kVVV_SnFL6wzpoYSexwVM_zyJEToZFRys7EHp_gZS5mim2GXqw46ppmA9yCMkiF6tWoyffR_rwBpD2Y1MlAT5ekAyIfub_WzHD10zOerb3VymfXyzUs7ul_EX-3jW3bvGCb30C-N-4VULXYgKk/4mn/V_I_z8d3TDSlaR-85UVlaA/h1/h001.WNpuE2INYSFel_QIPoBBmT9GzAvF02OoVtJqqxuQnxo)** And if you’ve ever thought about running for office yourself — or know someone who should — this program is for you, too. Fill out the interest form at [**wfpus.org/runinpa**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.N74h5aIU4LN6X-70141HTYwjguDKo5icqekamORfqKnIVcHp1s9eNyBfSDyOUab0N5hCbPL0Zp3InuuDxlgeIGGTKS6PjWKXWy9T3HccmSQjtWMJgj6Vj6KlwSf63yTYAWXxG2D3gNHViQ3SXO_jF1RIRO4IOY9PhxrfuSWFHmE1CaOVF7wsGFDD9GdPlqA8b5JcOKFyir-jJc5EnyAIQ8p5UJxSjFZXvNnmo_ORSb-Jpo9IqwCwOlGnn3ZAqnvb2zFongTJvBPJiLya6iPF_Lr9CaORK4fryfGDfASG2SE/4mn/V_I_z8d3TDSlaR-85UVlaA/h2/h001.daglqJ-F2E3xoU_Z5ioKwYRneuWzTG1OHXq7u3cMwig) body:
I need help TONIGHT

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-wvtw)I'm staring defeat in the face.
As a combat veteran, Christian, husband, and father, I thought I could count on fellow Patriots like you to stand with me against the radical Left. But it hasn’t panned out like I hoped.
**I'm Troy Downing, a freshman GOP Congressman fighting to put America First.**
Our House Majority hangs by a thread – just a few seats separate us from the Democrats' socialist agenda.
I'm facing a brutal truth: the December deadline is looming, and my campaign could be over if we fail to meet our goal. Democrats are waiting to pounce with their massive cash advantage.
_We can't let them see weakness now._
I'm not asking for a bailout or a massive donation. **[I just need a small contribution from patriots like you to keep my campaign alive:](https://trk.emails.troydowning._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmYW1vdW50PTM1JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI1MTIyMl9FVC1MVi4xMTAxMTdfdDE3ODAzNzgtMjg5OSZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249MjAyNTEyMjJfRVQtTFYuMTEwMTE3X3QxNzgwMzc4LTI4OTkifQ/xeggVTzI0b2GK-rFucXyFQ)**[ SEND A CARE PACKAGE NOW

Your support is my last line of defense.
God Bless You and God Bless America,
Troy Downing | |

name: Crow for Congress
subject: Jason’s fighting like hell for what’s right
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Colorado [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/Screenshot%202025-08-21%20at%2010.50.41%E2%80%AFAM.png]
Hey team, we'll try not to take up too much of your time.

Jason’s very last Federal Election Commission deadline of the year is coming up at the end of this month. After we close the books on our fundraising at the end of December, our numbers will become public for everyone to see — so we can’t afford any sign of weakness. Jason has never taken a dime from special interests or corporate PACs — his campaign has always been funded by small-dollar, grassroots supporters like you.

This is the first FEC deadline since Trump called for Jason to be arrested, prosecuted, and executed, and also pushed the FBI to open a bogus and politically-motivated inquiry. That means this is our best opportunity yet to show the grassroots support Jason has behind him, in every corner of the country.

Folks, Jason will always go where the fight is.

Because that’s what servant leadership is: to put service above politics and to fight like hell for what’s right. Now, he’s counting on you to support him every step of the way.

That’s why today we’re asking you to make a donation to help Jason hit his goal for the very last FEC deadline of 2025 and continue the fight for our democracy, the rule of law, and the Constitution. You can pitch in here: [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-dec25?amount=10]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

DONATE $10 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-dec25?amount=10&express_lane=true]

ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-dec25]

Thanks for your support,

8547 E Arapahoe Road, STE J-543
Greenwood Village, CO 80112

Folks, we're not even a year into Trump's second term.
But under his out-of-touch economic policies, prices for consumer goods, health care, and utilities are **skyrocketing in Colorado and across the country **–****_just in time for the holidays._
So Trump can call affordability a** "HOAX" **all he likes,**but the numbers don't lie:**
* Household energy bills are **13% HIGHER** than they were in January 2025.

* Grocery prices are up almost **3 0%** since 2020.

* Colorado is ranked **48th in housing affordability,** per U.S. News.

* Colorado has the **FOURTH HIGHEST COST OF LIVING****, **per CNBC.

* Auto premiums are more than **40% higher** than they were in 2022 – **but even a _good_ driver in Colorado pays over 25% above the national average!**

* **1.17 MILLION** people have been laid off this year as of Nov. 2025 – the most since the first year of the COVID-19 pandemic.

So it's no surprise that Trump's economic approval is at an
**ALL-TIME LOW of 36%** nationwide.
**But he only cares about how the economy works for billionaires like himself and MAGA megadonors – **_not_ _ working families paying the price._
As governor, Michael won't let Trump get away with squeezing Colorado dry, but he needs to verify he's on the same page with you.

name: Team Walz
subject: Our last survey of the year is here →
disclaimer_text: paid for by Walz for Governor
body:
Tim wanted us to reach out.
# [](https://act.timwalz.com/go/195?refcode=em20251222-335&t=1&akid=335%2E34582%2EudfQ01)
Peter,
2025 is swiftly coming to a close, and as we wrap up the year, Tim wanted us to reach out to ask for your thoughts one more time.
**[Will you take our End-of-Year Survey right now to share your reflections with our team?](https://act.timwalz.com/survey/em_tw_20251222-eoy-survey/?t=2&akid=335%2E34582%2EudfQ01)**
This past year was filled with challenges, especially with Donald Trump back in the White House. As governor, Tim has been working diligently to keep making progress for Minnesota’s working families while defending our state from the cruel, destructive MAGA agenda coming out of Washington.
From violent, widespread ICE raids, to Trump’s costly tariff wars, to Republican attacks on Medicaid, Medicare, and other federal programs — Minnesotans are feeling the negative impacts of a far-right administration and GOP-controlled Congress that put the interests of billionaires and corporations before everyday people.
But Tim has kept up the fight to lower the costs of living, defend our reproductive rights, protect immigrant families, and finally address the deadly scourge of gun violence with commonsense action. And in 2026, those fights will continue.
With the new year also comes the fight to reelect Tim as governor in the November general election, and we’re already fending off vicious attacks from a whole slate of GOP challengers, including Trump ally Mike Lindell.
**So, as Tim gets ready to head back out on the campaign trail and we keep building the resources needed to win big on Election Day, we want to hear what your top priorities are for 2026.**
**[Take our final survey of the year to make your voice heard — it should only take a minute!](https://act.timwalz.com/survey/em_tw_20251222-eoy-survey/?t=3&akid=335%2E34582%2EudfQ01)**
**[Take the Survey ››](https://act.timwalz.com/survey/em_tw_20251222-eoy-survey/?t=4&akid=335%2E34582%2EudfQ01)**
Thanks for everything,
Team Walz

**[Donate ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_tw_footer?refcode=em20251222-335&t=5&refcode2=335_34582_udfQ01&akid=335%2E34582%2EudfQ01)**
---
[](https://timwalz4gov.org/JOIN)
Email us: [info@walzforgovernor.org](mailto:info@walzforgovernor.org)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.walzforgovernor.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.walzforgovernor.org/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=6&akid=335%2E34582%2EudfQ01)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.walzforgovernor.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=7&akid=335%2E34582%2EudfQ01)

Prepared and paid for by Walz for Governor
Tim Walz for Governor
P.O. Box 4337
St. Paul MN 55104

name: Dr. Maxine Dexter
subject: The long fight for healthcare
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maxine for Congress
body:
https://maxinefororegon.com/ [https://maxinefororegon.com/]
First , the GOP slashed $1 trillion of federal funding for Medicaid to give billionaires even bigger tax breaks.
Then , instead of extending the tax credits, Republicans offered only bad-faith, ideological, and anti-medicine proposals.
Now , more than 111,000 Oregonians and 22 million Americans could see their health insurance costs soar.
Unlike most of my colleagues, I spent decades as a critical care physician saving lives in the ICU.
And unlike many of my extremist Republican colleagues, I actually care about what families face when loved ones are sick and injured. That’s why I demand that Speaker Johnson hold a vote to extend the Affordable Care Act’s enhanced premium tax credits and protect our healthcare.
I will NOT turn my back on American families while the GOP tries to hollow out our healthcare.
As a physician and your voice in the House, I will fight for policies that lower healthcare costs for our families while protecting coverage and respecting patients. This is going to be a long fight, but 2026 is our chance to take back control of Congress and defend our healthcare. Keeping physicians in office means more people fighting to put patients—instead of politics—first. Chip in today to fight back, protect coverage, and win in 2026. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_med_email-25q4?refcode=x_251222_longfight_act]
If you have saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately:

I’m not backing down,
Maxine

clean_body: [] First , the GOP slashed $1 trillion of federal funding for Medicaid to give billionaires even bigger tax breaks. Then , instead of extending the tax credits, Republicans offered only bad-faith, ideological, and anti-medicine proposals. Now , more than 111,000 Oregonians and 22 million Americans could see their health insurance costs soar. Unlike most of my colleagues, I spent decades as a critical care physician saving lives in the ICU. And unlike many of my extremist Republican colleagues, I actually care about what families face when loved ones are sick and injured. That’s why I demand that Speaker Johnson hold a vote to extend the Affordable Care Act’s enhanced premium tax credits and protect our healthcare. I will NOT turn my back on American families while the GOP tries to hollow out our healthcare. As a physician and your voice in the House, I will fight for policies that lower healthcare costs for our families while protecting coverage and respecting patients. This is going to be a long fight, but 2026 is our chance to take back control of Congress and defend our healthcare. Keeping physicians in office means more people fighting to put patients—instead of politics—first. Chip in today to fight back, protect coverage, and win in 2026. [] If you have saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [] DONATE $10 [] DONATE $25 [] DONATE $50 [] DONATE $100 [] OTHER [] I’m not backing down, Maxine [] Maxine Dexter is a critical care physician with decades of experience using facts and following science to help her patients. Now she's using those skills in Congress to ensure healthy communities by standing up to Big Pharma, fighting climate change, and expanding reproductive rights, as well as rebuilding a fair economy for all by protecting Social Security and Medicare. name: JamesTalarico.com
subject: Isn’t $5 a small price to pay to take back Texas?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Talarico for Texas
body:
#
If you knew that a $5 contribution meant flipping Texas and sending James to the U.S. Senate, wouldn’t that be worth it, Peter?
What if you knew that Democrats’ best path to the Senate majority required flipping Texas and that James was our best chance to make that a reality? Wouldn’t $5 be a small price to pay for that?
What if we said that there is nobody national Republicans want to stop more than James Talarico, and that our best chance to compete with their billionaire and corporate mega-donors was your $5 contribution?
Maybe it doesn’t feel like $5 matters vs. the tens of millions that national Republicans have already pledged to spend here.
But that is exactly what their billionaire mega-donors want you to think. The truth is your $5 — alongside the tens of thousands of people who have already given to our movement just this month — is our best chance to fight back.
It’s critical that we have a massive show of strength after our official FEC deadline on December 31. This is our opportunity to make clear that this movement has what it takes to take back Texas in 2026.
[**If winning Texas and taking back power for working people is worth $5 to you, then that’s what James needs you to contribute today. We cannot do this without you.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-launch.bF5RK3&refcode=em251222-1-ak&t=1&akid=332%2E1347274%2EsDALgb)

This email is unlike anything I've ever sent you before.

No, this isn't about a campaign or an election.

I'm sending you an urgent message about an organization I'm personally supporting, The Atlas Society.

Their CEO, Jennifer Grossman, has been my friend for thirty years -- we got our start in cable news together in the mid-1990s, and she later hired my firm to do polling when she worked at Dole Food Company. Through ups and downs, we've remained friends.

clean_body: This email is unlike anything I've ever sent you before. No, this isn't about a campaign or an election. I'm sending you an urgent message about an organization I'm personally supporting, The Atlas Society. Their CEO, Jennifer Grossman, has been my friend for thirty years -- we got our start in cable news together in the mid-1990s, and she later hired my firm to do polling when she worked at Dole Food Company. Through ups and downs, we've remained friends. Today, she's the CEO of The Atlas Society, a non-profit organization whose mission is to spread Ayn Rand's message of capitalism, personal responsibility, reason, and entrepreneurship to young people. Why is The Atlas Society's mission so important? If my career in polling and serving as President Trump's 2016 Campaign Manager taught me anything, it's this: Americans are desperate to hear the unfiltered truth. This is why we need more young people to hear The Atlas Society 's message. Here is what Jennifer and her organization are fighting for: Free market capitalism Respect for achievement and success Free speech The future of young people and our great country Our culture is pushing a twisted message of victimization, envy, woke nonsense, socialism, class warfare, and hatred for our country and its founding principles. Young people need an alternative. The Atlas Society spreads Ayn Rand's message to millions of young people via social media, video content, graphic novels, conferences, and so much more. I promised Jennifer I would help her raise $25,000 for The Atlas Society, which is why I am reaching out to you. Please consider making a donation by using one of the links I've copied below: You may be surprised, but when young people hear Ayn Rand's message of entrepreneurship, refusing to be a victim, and personal achievement, they are inspired and want to learn more. Yes, politics are important. But politics are downstream from culture. And culture is downstream from philosophy. The Atlas Society is on the frontlines of fighting in the philosophical culture war, which may determine the fate of the country's future. We CANNOT give up the culture or give up young people. This is more important than a campaign or a single election. You and I must invest in reaching young people with this message. Please don't wait to take action. My goal is to raise this $25,000 ASAP within a 48-hour period. Can I count on you to make a donation? Kellyanne Conway, Former Senior Counselor to President Trump The Atlas Society is a 501(c)(3) Not For Profit Organization. All donations are tax-deductible. 1038 Miwok Dr Lodi, CA 95240

**High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.** **Nancy Mace wasn 't born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she's gained.** At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts. **By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch.** She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina's legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground. Now, she's running for Governor of South Carolina. Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who's walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she's been one of President Trump's fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left's sick agenda dead in its tracks. **She 's not here to make friends. She's here to make history.** Nancy is fighting to:
* Eliminate South Carolina's Income Tax--the highest in the Southeast
* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency
* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free
* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate
* Reform education so students learn how to think--not what to think
* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she's ready to do what she's always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front. **South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.**
---
| |
# PAID FOR BY NANCY MACE FOR GOVERNOR

Happy Holidays! I hope this season gives you the opportunity for time and connection with the people who matter most. As this year draws to a close, I want to take a moment to express my gratitude for your support. Despite the challenges, I feel a deep sense of gratitude and a renewed optimism for the future. Your support allows me to wake up each day and continue the work I care deeply about—serving our community and striving to make a meaningful difference. I cannot express my gratitude enough, Peter. Wishing you and your loved ones peace, warmth, and time to reflect as we look ahead to a new year. — Valerie Foushee

clean_body: If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = Happy Holidays! I hope this season gives you the opportunity for time and connection with the people who matter most. As this year draws to a close, I want to take a moment to express my gratitude for your support. Despite the challenges, I feel a deep sense of gratitude and a renewed optimism for the future. Your support allows me to wake up each day and continue the work I care deeply about—serving our community and striving to make a meaningful difference. I cannot express my gratitude enough, Peter. Wishing you and your loved ones peace, warmth, and time to reflect as we look ahead to a new year. — Valerie Foushee * | | | ---|---|--- = Valerie is fighting to protect access to health care, working families, and to reform our criminal justice system. But she needs your help to continue to do this great work in Congress. Your donation right now will help protect Democrat Valerie Foushee by giving us a jumpstart on the next cycle. | = = Paid for by Foushee for Congress Valerie Foushee for Congress PO Box 16446 Chapel Hill, NC 27516 United States If you need to you can unsubscribe, You can also =.

Patriot,
This is Tina Forte, a lifelong resident of the Bronx, small business owner, and your Republican candidate challenging Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez in New York's 14th District for 202 with a VERY important message. **
****With less than 11 months until the election, we have a critical opportunity to remove AOC from Congress before she can advance her rumored presidential ambitions in 2028.**
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e9180393/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS90aW5hZm9ydGVmb3Jjb25ncmVzcy90Zl9kb25fc2JfbnVjX2FvYy1sbjFfZW1fMjAyNTEyMTkv/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNTEyMjI/LbmNseWdCUzlycA/qP3V0bV9tZWRpdW09YnImdXRtX3Rlcm09MjIxNThfd3Ix/gaUl-9g/scm47528aa4)
Recent reports and polls highlight growing speculation about her national plans—plans that would extend her extreme policies far beyond our district and across the entire country.
AOC's record has burdened families with failed economic ideas, like opposing job-creating projects and promoting costly initiatives that drive up taxes and energy costs while undermining public safety.
But we can win this race and protect America's future. Defeating AOC here sends a powerful message nationwide: radical socialism has no place in our government.
_Your support is essential. Every donation directly fuels our campaign efforts:_
**\- $25 helps place targeted online ads reaching thousands of undecided voters, exposing AOC's inconsistencies.**
**\- $50 funds flyers and mailers highlighting how her policies have impacted jobs and safety.**
**\- $100 supports radio spots emphasizing the need to stop her before a potential 2028 run.**

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=9c6c72eddf2741a9baf8c16d8e6f45ab&_e=e99ROSzIVbYuMmO1TdXK8EkcjB6qNZpdvTO9CvVV6y8qU5OFkAerPz0qq7FCro1Pa93XK-M-5vJ-FU50IiYLBhT4YUSXAK8dhHqE7nqCoO2MiCAbAMGyyVa_tqCo2ED24cj6wsaokp9PEq-mz8v8kcwkxnD1FPFHQGu0-uCoRBHGza85X9VkHDmcC4QFnX5GpVd_QjwWGm8Xdpiq9Er_2EzDzfKQEHvebl_kmecLbs2wT8oiPLYRSWhO13-mnePj0GoxDkE5VfYIZyNApzUQJPd1MfUQtWKme877XNb33Sea_TAhb5syF0Uz6nI7YGV4moinOwv7vnytQVIXa2mEL0MrZV0lR0Ng_gpcdp8JbkZF6YpKWQpDuiJNNfNt1mB-GiDjCgYnULGIxfPufvZPrmiB5_Ceqe2-ZeivTXFXshwzJWxOuQeZS_ElrjOW4LqjxJvrpSwbIuHj7G5DFsXl-jLFK6AtqjdsP-HN1Vz2DvaWZ7OcLVx_nNBPPMsRDVy0etogTg-y4FpsLvuZ0QqXqQsELBBr8QdhHz_h4fWUTEA9YWK5TdX4zC90kWAuzMExKeZoUFqcYhjwMR0bMmseOT435eV0L9zUwVyfcQT0XJa0rGqroxK88srsWk-WWlH5uwf5Q2vKOQpnx3AK80rXIdXebf5K8tZdLEzA7yZ_7Lg%3D)

Dear Parents and Grandparents,

Following the tragic loss of Charlie Kirk, we received an outpouring of requests from you, our valued supporters, to create **[The Kids Guide to Charlie Kirk](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=9c6c72eddf2741a9baf8c16d8e6f45ab&_e=e99ROSzIVbYuMmO1TdXK8EkcjB6qNZpdvTO9CvVV6y8qU5OFkAerPz0qq7FCro1Pa93XK-M-5vJ-FU50IiYLBhT4YUSXAK8dhHqE7nqCoO2MiCAbAMGyyVa_tqCo2ED24cj6wsaokp9PEq-mz8v8kcwkxnD1FPFHQGu0-uCoRBHGza85X9VkHDmcC4QFnX5GpVd_QjwWGm8Xdpiq9Er_2EzDzfKQEHvebl_kmecLbs1-ib3hn4Nsugb_nQN8ymTGl2LvCCAVzq1Nsh5dIxVeXb6asMPla6UMlkPKqRftJmTz7ZJq_JdNK7-D-aPUNgBWWXJBibkuhp8N1nUY2avZnENdcCN052MNWuS54cD1xvp0Z7zM-71zvgZusdQUTMryhx7AIJX9txzRCf6REBSxZUwzsaT2p-4xuy1O3HuiNBPUXpWia4W3CvfeNahzG3NB99UTdxPxmhMIAXOY2scPkOVixkpmIHYi8Pc3GmUmP1Zg7aJ1ZBoiM60NnopMow1ReCDnWC7UD97GOa2Puu8oaEkCRT5JzNq9hd32dgzssgLO8PL3RYnvqCi8wFqYDQDaZPxMSE6kSFZsVhQ5xV3uIAq8B4slWfYrnUh51T5nM607uY7ZVUpbVNzGOEaT2mPI0FPwSApdLg-lkob5V-jV_3jsFj3tS1GPUrxVmZ3mUMY%3D)**.

Our team responded by taking great measures to produce a guide that presents Charlie's story to your children with the utmost care and respect. The end result is an inspirational Kids Guide that shows kids why Charlie was so passionate about his faith, truth, and free speech, presented alongside Charlie's own words and his famous challenge to "prove me wrong".

We'd like to take this opportunity to offer your family **[The Kids Guide to Charlie Kirk](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=9c6c72eddf2741a9baf8c16d8e6f45ab&_e=e99ROSzIVbYuMmO1TdXK8EkcjB6qNZpdvTO9CvVV6y8qU5OFkAerPz0qq7FCro1Pa93XK-M-5vJ-FU50IiYLBhT4YUSXAK8dhHqE7nqCoO2MiCAbAMGyyVa_tqCo2ED24cj6wsaokp9PEq-mz8v8kcwkxnD1FPFHQGu0-uCoRBHGza85X9VkHDmcC4QFnX5GpVd_QjwWGm8Xdpiq9Er_2EzDzfKQEHvebl_kmecLbs3uYiQRkcAegMff9Imcmxu3LPKC6p6XCw3MnvwvqX2mb98csaCscvRH-30DKPmZxx-zDfbM3m74IDyMj0sZ2uypG3f7VGB6XHyRAbNi2DxcFtm0o6ilOIqlP6LBRP5-YkLMBBynvvljZEi90Wj9vMnXzTmAuGi1brw0zO4ugqOXelKbtqAcvWQTBtAEl5NpnwvqtJsUA8UVpAuUVwGWkpXIBz0aNC-ERLd2dph0Mwy7p9nxmJhG4t7xmiE1BnbElOgivg5Bu56a74K4s2okpya_rw0zPgUmsc8G5V1JVXHU1jK6ah2qu0muo6EOJxxVz1t_Yx5FmmSWfC6Ifecx0MGZu7gjwm5UvzPpM6LfJ6fPWTk8AvbBtcYeskn5exhFzSK7CCR7NIJUCLWjz03LX20fBcfdOaTW4oIECqq3jjLonO5rQ8gpzMsvuamFk8x-w5A%3D)** with our compliments as an invitation to rediscover The Kids Guide.

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=9c6c72eddf2741a9baf8c16d8e6f45ab&_e=e99ROSzIVbYuMmO1TdXK8EkcjB6qNZpdvTO9CvVV6y8qU5OFkAerPz0qq7FCro1Pa93XK-M-5vJ-FU50IiYLBhT4YUSXAK8dhHqE7nqCoO2MiCAbAMGyyVa_tqCo2ED24cj6wsaokp9PEq-mz8v8kcwkxnD1FPFHQGu0-uCoRBHGza85X9VkHDmcC4QFnX5GpVd_QjwWGm8Xdpiq9Er_2EzDzfKQEHvebl_kmecLbs3eBUDbeFrzDef6POjNYSd-D5f6YAvYi1s5rfknk7TfmkROmIuQBRmD606efpH8l3zX83W6pDhECNdZtBFSYM46IDHCfrtsDGuiHmZPPLtoEJmL0xB4EDyOXRbXeAY2XvEny4xmWh9KgW8mOWNqX0Ar8gTg-99JiCO_4wH9r4_fkFmI6smWodXilNwY9IuQAO59zShTSgxKiHH9xJUgCkAr2JD_nm4OHZ_lNnSzOS75CKFpB6-HmofGggqdl5hOSYwh1Els3HPcKV5i0fBtBF7ibmokZ5HwojV75kkAVwJ2VHIdRAENP9ALWYo5v66m8jZEk0cEEeuv2mVGtWx09F4330i3IKSkJSIYeGDM6dPuEp6-JYdeKZIR6gk8DeNZrbl5MHQeMQDWGpj7y1CThPm2VoXj0UZT6y5UEjuqJfOVJMi7TPLAhaE2qsap3upoTWg%3D)

Charlie Kirk devoted his life to teaching young Americans the power of free speech. His bold defense of open dialogue inspired countless young people to stand up for their beliefs, making it a cornerstone of his legacy. To help your own kids gain a deep understanding of why free speech is our most important right, we'll also include [**The Kids Guide to Defending Free Speech**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=9c6c72eddf2741a9baf8c16d8e6f45ab&_e=e99ROSzIVbYuMmO1TdXK8EkcjB6qNZpdvTO9CvVV6y8qU5OFkAerPz0qq7FCro1Pa93XK-M-5vJ-FU50IiYLBhT4YUSXAK8dhHqE7nqCoO2MiCAbAMGyyVa_tqCo2ED24cj6wsaokp9PEq-mz8v8kcwkxnD1FPFHQGu0-uCoRBHGza85X9VkHDmcC4QFnX5GpVd_QjwWGm8Xdpiq9Er_2EzDzfKQEHvebl_kmecLbs3RVSI5N4kcshVa9stnlzUX6DB2XQjRMyFa4z-EamPdHcCoZTf-6ynYtZtQwU19j8fTTpnq9Ki1b0OUMCwYNuZM_wqa8WpL4SphCzdAv0aL_5zZtNgbVwmYQL_J_fTtLUepQNsTm96Te6_CPKVUrGJiia4Ygx3MMAz_6d_nj54T6Lzq81K448tAdHAvdZvBWGva5SjqDEGHuyqPw1IKUv4WSFLYDbfKbIM4qEZj7Ex-ZTzFJEaso1JGMUO4tdqI4UScWd7NS5wKca4KBFftKg7RkPHgMHM6lL6I6E_IE2PDgaoib--HlJM-nhFSzwOOaJdZyDbgWGMb266DNDiwMQAyFqmkna8_OCfwKjA_nkYWqik9JrFQ2k9Dbwq94UJPXLGqDBE4y4x1iVMX2UtHrLO_15GRGGC6r04g7olWXW83owdcNq6Bskm4sWeaA51gSgU%3D) at no cost (you just need to pay $1 s&p for each guide).

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=9c6c72eddf2741a9baf8c16d8e6f45ab&_e=e99ROSzIVbYuMmO1TdXK8EkcjB6qNZpdvTO9CvVV6y8qU5OFkAerPz0qq7FCro1Pa93XK-M-5vJ-FU50IiYLBhT4YUSXAK8dhHqE7nqCoO2MiCAbAMGyyVa_tqCo2ED24cj6wsaokp9PEq-mz8v8kcwkxnD1FPFHQGu0-uCoRBHGza85X9VkHDmcC4QFnX5GpVd_QjwWGm8Xdpiq9Er_2EzDzfKQEHvebl_kmecLbs0YLJVJZkCrhI8cnhQd85nFtCaeFZS-xexkPnBoX3sxM7tT120mSqkr5wpnObuB1rXl-ZZrrJWWuhS13WhbkpCvxigs-jrNwvckbMGZnuB_KEQez6SAQjItslKuhUn8zMQY_BjOVKjeDC6Ft7dhv2aoioWz9UdQe1jWQn7XFCJL_uiXwy41nphMDSuKFqDqJcjjPPLsXNkQZzdoK3Cmfi-H-iaRcrCrwrNPb5lu6eMdsvbU8AimsVzCajtqD0TsXBj4xtyiYsIGS4cmIlnLiPCCq61A9Fo7sJcRzKbXEHsHBk_3fUGYdXsgD73mJpOhyeJAFo-VuRvxRQmhAZDWjDMHft4GveGhnyNruMcgn3HEsxRHv1BhMgEDq7tHnsZ4j4SG4l5ZfCTWXAyJTWn9P73M2x_hYq2imXIQN_gb3kq3KxjdqE8MDHNjAVqMzkSlduI%3D)

When you order The Kids Guide to Charlie Kirk, your children will be inspired to stand boldly for truth, embrace their faith, and champion free speech, just as Charlie did. This guide, paired with The Kids Guide to Defending Free Speech, will equip your family with the tools to understand and defend the values that Charlie Kirk lived for. Order today to honor his legacy and inspire the next generation to fearlessly uphold these timeless principles.

clean_body: Dear Parents and Grandparents, Following the tragic loss of Charlie Kirk, we received an outpouring of requests from you, our valued supporters, to create . Our team responded by taking great measures to produce a guide that presents Charlie's story to your children with the utmost care and respect. The end result is an inspirational Kids Guide that shows kids why Charlie was so passionate about his faith, truth, and free speech, presented alongside Charlie's own words and his famous challenge to "prove me wrong". We'd like to take this opportunity to offer your family with our compliments as an invitation to rediscover The Kids Guide. Charlie Kirk devoted his life to teaching young Americans the power of free speech. His bold defense of open dialogue inspired countless young people to stand up for their beliefs, making it a cornerstone of his legacy. To help your own kids gain a deep understanding of why free speech is our most important right, we'll also include at no cost (you just need to pay $1 s&p for each guide). When you order The Kids Guide to Charlie Kirk, your children will be inspired to stand boldly for truth, embrace their faith, and champion free speech, just as Charlie did. This guide, paired with The Kids Guide to Defending Free Speech, will equip your family with the tools to understand and defend the values that Charlie Kirk lived for. Order today to honor his legacy and inspire the next generation to fearlessly uphold these timeless principles. Warm regards, The Kids Guide Team Helping Families Raise Thoughtful, Confident Kids P.S. Teaching kids why freedom matters is one of the most meaningful ways to honor those who stood for it. These guides help start that conversation at home. name: Jena Griswold
subject: Honored to have the support of Colorado workers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jena for Colorado
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2512-q4-jg?refcode=251222-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2512-q4-jg?refcode=251222-email]
Friend,
I’m incredibly honored to share some exciting news: the Colorado AFL-CIO has officially endorsed our campaign for Attorney General.
This is more than an endorsement — it’s a powerful vote of confidence from thousands of Colorado workers who keep our communities running. And it reflects a core truth about this campaign: when working people are under attack, I will always stand with them.
Throughout my career, I’ve stood with union members on picket lines, advocated for fair wages and safe workplaces, and defended workers' rights to organize. As Secretary of State, I’ve protected Coloradans’ right to vote free from intimidation — including workers whose voices are too often marginalized.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2512-q4-jg?refcode=251222-email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2512-q4-jg?refcode=251222-email]
Will you chip in today to join AFL-CIO in supporting our campaign so I can keep standing up for workers' rights as AG? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2512-q4-jg?refcode=251222-email]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
CONTRIBUTE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2512-q4-jg?refcode=251222-email&amount=10&express_lane=true] CONTRIBUTE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2512-q4-jg?refcode=251222-email&amount=25&express_lane=true]
CONTRIBUTE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2512-q4-jg?refcode=251222-email&amount=50&express_lane=true] CONTRIBUTE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2512-q4-jg?refcode=251222-email&amount=100&express_lane=true]
CONTRIBUTE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2512-q4-jg?refcode=251222-email&amount=250&express_lane=true] ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2512-q4-jg?refcode=251222-email]
And as Colorado’s next Attorney General, I’ll keep fighting for:
* Fair labor practices and safer workplaces
* Workers’ rights to organize and collectively bargain
* Strong enforcement against corporate bad actors who exploit workers
* Economic justice and dignity for every Colorado family
The AFL-CIO believes in our vision — and I’m deeply proud to stand with them in this campaign.
But endorsements alone don’t win elections. We’re building a people-powered movement , and that means we need your support to take this momentum into 2025.
Every contribution, no matter the size, helps us organize, mobilize, and reach the voters we need to win. Chip in today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2512-q4-jg?refcode=251222-email]
Together, with labor leading the way, we can build a fairer, safer, more just Colorado.
Thank you for being part of this fight.
In solidarity,
Jena Griswold
Follow Jena Online:
https://www.facebook.com/Jenaforcolorado/ [https://www.facebook.com/Jenaforcolorado/] https://twitter.com/JenaGriswold [https://twitter.com/JenaGriswold] https://www.instagram.com/jenagriswold/ [https://www.instagram.com/jenagriswold/] https://www.threads.net/@jenagriswold [https://www.threads.net/@jenagriswold] https://bsky.app/profile/jenagriswold.bsky.social [https://bsky.app/profile/jenagriswold.bsky.social]

Louisville, CO 80027
United States
