_Today, we're in the midst of a redistricting crisis — and our democracy needs to be actively defended every day. That's why All On The Line is now**Redistricting Action** — a grassroots movement built for the critical fights ahead. Thank you for being part of it._
Peter,
Our democracy is at an inflection point.
President Donald Trump is shamelessly demanding that politicians manipulate maps in order to preserve political power.
And lawmakers in too many state legislatures across the country are falling in line, weakening the voice of the people by passing egregious gerrymanders.
Meanwhile, anti-democracy groups are assaulting voting rights on multiple fronts — from challenging the Voting Rights Act in court to openly undermining an accurate count in the next census.
Peter, these are not separate fights. They’re all connected. And they represent our new reality. We’re in an era of perpetual redistricting and ever-increasing attacks on the American people’s freedom to vote.
**That’s why we’re announcing that All On The Line is becoming Redistricting Action — a name that captures both who we are and what this moment demands. Because redistricting isn’t just a policy fight — it’s an ongoing struggle for a representative democracy.**
[**This change is about rising to the challenges we face with the urgency they require — taking action together to build a representative democracy. Add your name and let me know I can count on you to do your part in the critical mission ahead.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121789230/590586154/1419027664?source=eng_aotl_tier1_email_Rebrand1RS_email_20251222-AOTL-Tier1-Rebrand1RS_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=eng&utm_content=20251222-AOTL-Tier1-Rebrand1RS_&utm_campaign=Rebrand1RS&refcode=eng_aotl_tier1_email_Rebrand1RS_email_20251222-AOTL-Tier1-Rebrand1RS_&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJmYmU5MTdkLTVjZGYtZjAxMS04MTk0LTAwMGQzYTFlYzhjNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0Qg2RjbjN1jZTRcJ3Scow0zSUqNliYmTXRKnt5yaRmg=&emci=f42c8f3d-52df-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&emdi=bfbe917d-5cdf-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&ceid=8431045)
In February 2019 when President Barack Obama and I launched the All On The Line campaign, we wanted to design a nationwide grassroots movement for fair maps and fair representation.
From the start, that movement has been about empowering local organizers to become redistricting experts by offering free training and providing the resources activists need to make a difference in their communities.
And it worked.
Volunteers across the country have testified at hearings, protested against unfair maps, and organized their neighbors to demand accountability from those in power.
**Together, we’ve built a people-powered movement that has changed the conversation on redistricting and made a real impact in the fight for fair representation.**
But since the last redistricting cycle and especially this year, we’ve entered a new era of mid-decade gerrymandering, court battles, and anti-democracy power grabs. The reality is, if we want a government that actually reflects the people, we need fair maps — and that requires staying engaged, organized, and ready to fight.
Redistricting Action is here to do that work. Peter, we were built to meet that challenge. But we need partners, allies, voters, and supporters like you to stay in the fight with us.
[**If you believe it’s time for fair districts and a truly representative democracy, please share your name today to kick off this new, urgent phase of our work.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121789231/590586157/1419027664?source=eng_aotl_tier1_email_Rebrand1RS_email_20251222-AOTL-Tier1-Rebrand1RS_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=eng&utm_content=20251222-AOTL-Tier1-Rebrand1RS_&utm_campaign=Rebrand1RS&refcode=eng_aotl_tier1_email_Rebrand1RS_email_20251222-AOTL-Tier1-Rebrand1RS_&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJmYmU5MTdkLTVjZGYtZjAxMS04MTk0LTAwMGQzYTFlYzhjNiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0Qg2RjbjN1jZTRcJ3Scow0zSUqNliYmTXRKnt5yaRmg=&emci=f42c8f3d-52df-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&emdi=bfbe917d-5cdf-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&ceid=8431045)
Sincerely,
Eric H. Holder, Jr.
82nd Attorney General of the United States

---

Rep. Brandon Gill **[scorched Democrat dunce Jamie Raskin in front of congress](https://substack.com/redirect/0468fa83-154c-4e25-a24c-bdb6e2f9a556?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for ignoring irresponsible Democrat Party government spending on woke programs and bloated bureaucracies, while criticizing Republican spending.
[](https://substack.com/redirect/0468fa83-154c-4e25-a24c-bdb6e2f9a556?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"It's not surprising to me that our colleagues across the aisle are not in favor of a balanced budget amendment," Gill said.
"It would obviously stop them from spending money on their top priorities," he continued. "Things like transgender surgeries for foreigners, DEI scholarships in foreign countries, left-wing media outlets like NPR and PBS, the NGO industrial complex which has facilitated mass migration into this country!"
**[Watch the tense exchange here:](https://substack.com/redirect/0468fa83-154c-4e25-a24c-bdb6e2f9a556?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[ Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/0468fa83-154c-4e25-a24c-bdb6e2f9a556?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# **Trump hits 50% approval, highest since September**
A new InsiderAdvantage poll **[shows President Donald Trump with a 50% approval rating](https://substack.com/redirect/d6b77c4b-7099-4645-a37c-d636c030f50c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** versus 41% disapproval among likely voters, marking his highest raw approval rating since late September when he reached 52%, and his best nine-percentage-point net approval spread since mid-August.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d6b77c4b-7099-4645-a37c-d636c030f50c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Recovery from November dip across key demographics:** Pollster Matt Towery noted that after Trump's approval dipped to 44% in November, it rebounded to the 50-percentile range following his December 17 national address and the latest CPI inflation report, with improvement coming from "numerous demographics--including and most importantly independent voters," as well as younger and female voters.
* **Work remains with high undecided voters ahead of midterms:** Towery observed that recent surveys show "an unusually high number" of undecided respondents, suggesting "some voters, particularly independents, remain unsure as to his accomplishments so far" and indicating "he has work to do as he and the GOP enter the midterm season," while the RealClear Politics average still shows Trump underwater at 43.6% approval versus 53.2% disapproval.

* * *
# **JD Vance tells Nick Fuentes to "eat s--t" for attacking his wife**
Vice President JD Vance **[told UnHerd](https://substack.com/redirect/36395d6a-6392-417b-932b-d5fd12710dba?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** that anyone who attacks his wife Usha Vance, "whether their name is Jen Psaki or Nick Fuentes, can eat s--t," calling it his "official policy as vice president," after white supremacist Fuentes called him a "race traitor" for marrying the daughter of two Indian immigrants and MSNBC's Psaki suggested Usha needed to be "rescued" from Vance.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/36395d6a-6392-417b-932b-d5fd12710dba?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Vance draws hard line against antisemitism and racism:** During the same interview, Vance strongly condemned antisemitism and all forms of ethnic hatred, stating "Antisemitism and all forms of ethnic hatred have no place in the conservative movement" and declaring "Whether you're attacking somebody because they're white or because they're black or because they're Jewish, I think it's disgusting."
* **VP urges conservatives to stop internal purity tests:** Hours earlier at Turning Point USA's AmericaFest, Vance decried conservatives for publicly bashing their own party members, saying "President Trump did not build the greatest coalition in politics by running his supporters through endless, self-defeated purity tests," in what appeared to be a nameless call-out of Ben Shapiro who had criticized Tucker Carlson--just named StopAntisemitism's 2025 Antisemite of the Year--and Candace Owens.

* * *
# **Bari Weiss pulls "60 Minutes" segment after Trump officials refuse interview**
CBS News editor-in-chief Bari Weiss **[sparked outrage Sunday](https://substack.com/redirect/38ad58e3-9764-4b27-816a-b9e6f2047b04?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** after pulling a "60 Minutes" segment about El Salvador's infamous prison off the air after Trump administration officials refused to be interviewed, with the decision coming after President Trump complained on Truth Social that "60 Minutes" has treated him worse since Weiss took over, and some staff reportedly threatening to quit over the move.
* **Reporter accuses Weiss of political censorship with "kill switch":** Journalist Sharyn Alfonsi wrote in an email to colleagues that she believed the decision was political rather than editorial, stating the segment had been repeatedly screened and contained all "factually correct" information, warning "If the administration's refusal to participate becomes a valid reason to spike a story, we have effectively handed them a 'kill switch' for any reporting they find inconvenient."
* **Weiss defends decision as normal editorial practice:** Weiss said in a statement that the segment will air "when it's ready," explaining "My job is to make sure that all stories we publish are the best they can be. Holding stories that aren't ready for whatever reason--that they lack sufficient context, say, or that they are missing critical voices--happens every day in every newsroom," while she reportedly suggested reporters interview White House deputy chief of staff Stephen Miller and gave them his number.

* * *

body:
They’re trying to protect powerful people from being implicated.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=2008%2E791427%2EGIwcZq)
[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-dec25-epstein/?source=em251222-1-180&akid=2008%2E791427%2EGIwcZq)
Friend, the Trump administration is breaking the law to protect pedophiles.
On Friday, the DOJ was required by law to release the Epstein files. They released only a small portion of the files, with 90% of the information redacted and many deleted pages. **They’re trying to protect powerful people from being implicated.**
They even scrubbed mentions and images of Trump himself — and when one picture of Trump made it into this batch of documents, the DOJ quickly removed it from their website.
**[Sign on to our petition calling for the Trump administration to follow the law and release ALL the documents with only necessary redactions.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-dec25-epstein/?source=em251222-1-180&akid=2008%2E791427%2EGIwcZq)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-dec25-epstein/?source=em251222-1-180&akid=2008%2E791427%2EGIwcZq)**
The law that passed unanimously through Congress clearly states that redactions are allowable to protect the identity of the victims.
But somehow, the Trump administration took it upon themselves to make wide redactions that protect the identities of powerful people and further obscure the world around Epstein.
And beyond those redactions, they failed to release:
* FBI witness interviews
* Epstein’s own emails from his computer
* A 60 count draft indictment
* An 82 page prosecution memo

All of these documents would give us a much better window into how Epstein operated and who else was implicated. They would finally expose what all regular Americans know to be true: Jeffrey Epstein was not alone in his crimes, and anyone else who’s involved deserves to face justice.
Democrats in Congress are pushing to release these files and compel the Trump administration to follow the law. We’re asking for your help today in turning up the pressure:
**[Add your name to our petition calling on the administration to release ALL of the Epstein files with only necessary redactions. This is a time for transparency and accountability. We can’t let Trump protect pedophiles any longer.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-dec25-epstein/?source=em251222-1-180&akid=2008%2E791427%2EGIwcZq)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-dec25-epstein/?source=em251222-1-180&akid=2008%2E791427%2EGIwcZq)**
In solidarity,
Team Ilhan Omar

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can **[unsubscribe here](https://act.ilhanomar.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=2&akid=2008%2E791427%2EGIwcZq)**. You can also **[sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=3&akid=2008%2E791427%2EGIwcZq)**.
Submit this form to [**update your contact information**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/update-contact-info/source=em-footer?t=4&akid=2008%2E791427%2EGIwcZq)
Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=5&refcode2=2008_791427_GIwcZq&akid=2008%2E791427%2EGIwcZq)**.
Ilhan for Congress
PO Box 33079
Washington D.C., 20033

---
| | Good Afternoon,
As we celebrate the joy and hope of Christmas, Rob and our entire team want to wish you and your loved ones a very Merry Christmas. This season is about caring for one another, and that same sense of community is what NEPA is all about. We will continue working for everyone we represent. Have a Merry Christmas and a Happy New Year!
---
|
---
|
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| | | Yesterday, Rob attended the Friedman JCC Menorah lighting to celebrate the holiday season with our Jewish friends and neighbors. Hanukkah reminds us that even in the darkest times, light and hope will always endure. The holiday season in NEPA is in full swing, and we want you and your loved ones to have a happy and safe holiday season, no matter how you worship.
---
|
---
|
---
| | Our Volunteer of the Week is Roger, from Lackawanna County. He’s been a rockstar getting people involved and door-knocking to grow the Republican Party across our district. Thanks for all your hard work, Roger!

She is a political climber and far-left extremist who has brought big-city crime to NEPA. We must stop her and her radical agenda. **Chip in now to help Rob fight back and win big in 2026!**

He’s been a rockstar getting people involved and door-knocking to grow the Republican Party across our district. Thanks for all your hard work, Roger! | | | Portland Paige is campaigning for Congress against Rob right after getting elected to a second term as Mayor. She is a political climber and far-left extremist who has brought big-city crime to NEPA. We must stop her and her radical agenda. Chip in now to help Rob fight back and win big in 2026! | | | \- Team Rob | | | | | | [Paid for by Rob for PA]() | | | | | | | | | | Copyright (C) 2025 Rob for PA. All rights reserved.

| | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
---
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

clean_body: I've dug through the over 3,000 dividend stocks on the market to pinpoint 3 stocks I believe you should buy and hold forever. | | | Don't want to receive our publications? | | | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18] | | | | | | 3 Dividend Stocks to Buy and Hold Forever (for a lifetime of income) I've dug through the over 3,000 dividend stocks on the market to pinpoint - I expect them to increase their dividend payouts in the years to come... so BUYING NOW means you could be picking up shares at an amazing price. Give yourself more time and freedom: I believe you could buy and hold these 3 stocks forever. Meaning, no wild trading or timing the market. The opportunity to buy these 3 stocks at their low prices is ending soon. Tim Plaehn Editor, The Dividend Hunter P.S. name: Generations for America Foundation
subject: 'Tis the Season
body:
Generations for America Foundation Ready to Fly in 2026

| | |
---
**HAPPY**
---
**HOLIDAYS**
---
**D. P.!**
---
| | **From the Team at**
**Generations for America and Generations for America Foundation**

---
**Dear Friends and Supporters,** **As we celebrate this season of gratitude and reflection, we want to extend our heartfelt appreciation to every one of you who has supported Generations for America over the past three years. Your belief in our mission has fueled our progress, strengthened our reach, and empowered us to continue advocating for the constitutional principles that form the foundation of our great nation.** **This year, we have made tremendous strides through the _Ingrid Centurion Podcast_ , where we engage in critical discussions on constitutional battles and civic responsibility. Our _Shield of Rights Courses_ continue to grow, educating Americans of all ages on the importance of constitutional literacy, while our _Roberts Rules of Order_ training equips future leaders with the tools they need to conduct meetings with integrity, discipline, and respect for process. We added four new board members with expertise and extensive experience in law enforcement and public safety, event management, international cultural affairs and strategic planning. Together, we are building an informed and capable generation—one ready to protect, defend, and carry forward the torch of liberty.** **As the holidays approach, we wish you and your families a joyful and peaceful Christmas season, and a prosperous New Year. May your homes be filled with warmth, love, and blessings, and may the coming year bring growth, opportunity, and continued strength to our community.** **Thank you for standing with us. We look forward to achieving even greater milestones together in the year ahead.** **With gratitude and hope,** **Ingrid Centurion and the Boards of Generations for America and**
**Generations for America Foundation**
---
| |
---
|
# English First Classes
---
All our attendees want to improve their language skills, including improving their English and having conversations in English and Spanish. These classes are designed for native Spanish speakers to improve their English. We hold them at a local church and welcome anyone regardless of denomination or nationality.
---
| |
---
|
# Public Speaker Training
---
Public speaking can be daunting and challenging for the speaker to reach and motivate audiences. Generations for America Foundation can help you deliver more professional and eloquent talks that target your audience. We can help you.
---
| |
---
|
# Black History Month
---
Generations for America was instrumental in organizing the Gala event in 2023 and Ingrid delivered an inspiring speech!
---
| |
---
|
# Slam the Scam Public Safety
---
>From cyber threats to violence we must always be aware to protect our families and staff. Criminals often call, leave a voicemail, send a seemingly innocent social media connection, or email correspondence from something that looks legitimate. Don't be a victim. We've spoken at local libraries about the modern day dangers that you need to be aware of to protect yourself and you family.
---
| |
---
|
# Shield of Rights Constitutional Webinars
---
A program that ensures everyone knows their rights and responsibilities. Special focus on law enforcement perspective is crucial for both officers and the public. A well-rounded program can help ensure that everyone knows their rights and responsibilities, leading to better community relations and more informed decision-making in law enforcement. Local libraries were given one-hour highlights. Ingrid delivered a rousing speech about the Willful Subversion of the U.S. Constitution in Greenville.
---
| |
---
|
# North Charleston Mayoral Debate
---
Generations for America, a 501(C)(4), organized and moderated a public forum debate of six mayoral candidates at North Charleston City Hall. Our non-partisan efforts help the voters ask candidates the tough questions.
---
| |
---
|
# Penmanship Camp for Kids
---
Our Penmanship Camp is designed to help children improve their handwriting skills, focusing on both print and cursive writing. Through music, history and fun engaging activities, children will develop proper writing techniques, including letter formation, spacing, and fluidity.
---
| |
---
|
# Robert's Rules of Order
---
Develop effective participatory decision-making skills. Develop skills to be able to serve as a competent committee chairman or member. Develop skills to be able to function well as an organizational officer or member. Understand the rules and how they function. Register for our next course starting on January 7th at [https://www.generationsforamericafoundation.com/events](http://email.robly.com/ls/click?upn=u001.P2x6L4rJRHUTLoJQXbN-2FloablzO9YKcHYYxPiBlxvKUAcpliIXPhSSftsKT4v0Lcf25Y3ja-2Bw4YO9U5UT5r-2Feg-3D-3D6xVi_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVCvXrI5zrvAmWKlzz2BTRM7s8INkI5SckbDmt-2BWdjKKGbLk6cfcI6HcTo-2FzwJlVunOo1mcou5HeXnw7GlMEdlJgHyRsIReKr1RL-2FmTWEJjgDvPf1rRoCdRvSC2X9LLr7JckGEJvAtkziNNSWafF-2FfaAr5hylqWXmLybrKvGeO2DvWOpDXKTcUb-2FUjefQ0NeJQxwPQaCIqCv5R7vWjNFdx3zKJR-2BK67Vo9MdqvoJJnbwgPYzDFKqjAY0PLOrEhylA6p6dcGAeSCArbdlndvODkZ3Xu2qFEV72wqfN8jFTIlrQyH3IAXDnsNLacyRkWw-2F33zllzNQa3JlZMGQJusRjEiITgs-2FUH47KMWp5aCNLuaPvSP75T5vll0ur-2BjJpYWPlUG8STcpVRZoAQFsiirFLtBGi-2Ftswm4uLoNohLsGP1GaJqrDRgghDECMgCHbjbfjUoHgZfXyUcS4g6f5QJrkzomZW5n0ZeY-2FGpDqwZKEDYDEgzglMKVYA4msPJmM409Ub7AVLN2JMuKAcp6tMblElt10).

# Expungement Clinics
---
Ingrid Centurion explains the importance of getting your criminal record expunged on Fox24 News Now. See her interview at [https://youtu.be/TqJZdw2Fkws?si=WS6GjTb3AxQI8A75](http://email.robly.com/ls/click?upn=u001.P2x6L4rJRHUTLoJQXbN-2FluqOe1mYc8tvcCGEct-2F6HNjVZJ19ojaRw2hCkP8MGmEXiR921bFJw8p5E469iLKEOg-3D-3Dj5fU_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVCvXrI5zrvAmWKlzz2BTRM7s8INkI5SckbDmt-2BWdjKKGbLk6cfcI6HcTo-2FzwJlVunOo1mcou5HeXnw7GlMEdlJgHyRsIReKr1RL-2FmTWEJjgDvPf1rRoCdRvSC2X9LLr7JckGEJvAtkziNNSWafF-2FfaAr5hylqWXmLybrKvGeO2DvWOpDXKTcUb-2FUjefQ0NeJQxwPQaCIqCv5R7vWjNFdx3zKJR-2BK67Vo9MdqvoJJnbwgPYzDFKqjAY0PLOrEhylA6p6dcGAeSCArbdlndvODkZ3Xu2qFEV72wqfN8jFTIlrQyH3IAXDnsNLacyRkWw-2F33zllzNQa3JlZMGQJusRjEiITgs-2FUH47KMWp5aCNLuaPvVdsBa2iVCUUOJaIyb-2Bh7kvcAOa-2F-2FgB2Nm-2Fzro2m1Tb3ZgYe0dKCuYe4XAcGHUyt1wE7jt-2BYbdVC0EE-2F08E-2BOhlcr8U2DYbgme3PSldlzNg0wGbln83xjeA-2BCKPDNo0HZLq6aVgVFMTulOkILp4MM9DBsgKmBrtnYzg6-2BBptGcbV).

# Name It, Change It, Do It
---
Generations for America Foundation published a motivational book called _Name It, Change It, Do It_ available for purchase on [LuLu](http://email.robly.com/ls/click?upn=u001.P2x6L4rJRHUTLoJQXbN-2FlgZweFSlMXp6k5sFyDYGTq-2BNUaMfTM7YQyRkTrzXfOF-2FRDzdJy9eTBWfkaMpkw43hbwyRTDc3H1LzE-2F-2FlCdndI8JhxUGpsYh-2FiDBp7kdNuqIMn9rTGbxuIQ4qa9O0iKKb0U-2BhxH4izLUiL-2FIzKrj617I3YJcUAI6VYr9i5ieElAOVLdIGhErWH9GYabyTZ7O7bsqrObZjOIAmQqHP59ct4k-3D0WJz_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVCvXrI5zrvAmWKlzz2BTRM7s8INkI5SckbDmt-2BWdjKKGbLk6cfcI6HcTo-2FzwJlVunOo1mcou5HeXnw7GlMEdlJgHyRsIReKr1RL-2FmTWEJjgDvPf1rRoCdRvSC2X9LLr7JckGEJvAtkziNNSWafF-2FfaAr5hylqWXmLybrKvGeO2DvWOpDXKTcUb-2FUjefQ0NeJQxwPQaCIqCv5R7vWjNFdx3zKJR-2BK67Vo9MdqvoJJnbwgPYzDFKqjAY0PLOrEhylA6p6dcGAeSCArbdlndvODkZ3Xu2qFEV72wqfN8jFTIlrQyH3IAXDnsNLacyRkWw-2F33zllzNQa3JlZMGQJusRjEiITgs-2FUH47KMWp5aCNLuaPvdW6DPK4x9k68Zcn7P2nwChu-2FFI2xQsxM-2BQCJ7zo2o6ePLwqmwzj1nBRBeMJga9yx3s17WygIl7At6M2mMv7Gbj0SSLcrupJ-2BXCqSfEOvYtd02owE4UIMZtV1AMq3nVfKiZ2eZbObxA7FYo-2BuPBzsN8XC9ysBCYXBOlQRpNXRWkG). We followed that up with an empowerment event based on the practical wisdom from the book called Accelerate & Activate a Change Conference in North Charleston.
---
| |
---
|
# Political Candidate Meet and Greets
---
Generations for America, a 501(C)(4), organized and provided event night support for political candidates running for U.S. Senate, SC Governor and SC Attorney General. We encourage candidates to reach out to the voters and we will give non-partisan event support.
---
| |
---
|
# Ingrid Centurion Podcast
---
Ingrid and her guests discuss and debate timely public affairs topics concerning critical issues many of which involve the U.S. Constitution. Watch episodes now at the [Ingrid Centurion Podcast.](http://email.robly.com/ls/click?upn=u001.P2x6L4rJRHUTLoJQXbN-2FlsupUhCySvHyiHtX8dCsiuolEq-2FfHoQ4k6YoQ6Ljan9nkm0n8lHFctbIytu0OMeKcg-3D-3DpAvZ_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVCvXrI5zrvAmWKlzz2BTRM7s8INkI5SckbDmt-2BWdjKKGbLk6cfcI6HcTo-2FzwJlVunOo1mcou5HeXnw7GlMEdlJgHyRsIReKr1RL-2FmTWEJjgDvPf1rRoCdRvSC2X9LLr7JckGEJvAtkziNNSWafF-2FfaAr5hylqWXmLybrKvGeO2DvWOpDXKTcUb-2FUjefQ0NeJQxwPQaCIqCv5R7vWjNFdx3zKJR-2BK67Vo9MdqvoJJnbwgPYzDFKqjAY0PLOrEhylA6p6dcGAeSCArbdlndvODkZ3Xu2qFEV72wqfN8jFTIlrQyH3IAXDnsNLacyRkWw-2F33zllzNQa3JlZMGQJusRjEiITgs-2FUH47KMWp5aCNLuaPvUc4u7fTyVgw1l-2FerpA-2BxnsqZOxbrNN28LsWXYDah61udpxtjfJIjUowgZ-2FVTJkgccxhQGgF5BTm1FpEE8ttzsvuuZEFGmBF9V4dK9N56DMrVfoqNjknIbMtBD-2B7UsTtvdavkYAkzNyij63jS2RdQZevBvTWQYakh5VK0nifPrsB) Please contact us to become a sponsor of the show or an episode. clean_body: Generations for America Foundation Ready to Fly in 2026 | | | HAPPY HOLIDAYS D. P.! | | From the Team at Generations for America and Generations for America Foundation Dear Friends and Supporters, As we celebrate this season of gratitude and reflection, we want to extend our heartfelt appreciation to every one of you who has supported Generations for America over the past three years. Your belief in our mission has fueled our progress, strengthened our reach, and empowered us to continue advocating for the constitutional principles that form the foundation of our great nation. This year, we have made tremendous strides through the Ingrid Centurion Podcast , where we engage in critical discussions on constitutional battles and civic responsibility. Our Shield of Rights Courses continue to grow, educating Americans of all ages on the importance of constitutional literacy, while our Roberts Rules of Order training equips future leaders with the tools they need to conduct meetings with integrity, discipline, and respect for process. We added four new board members with expertise and extensive experience in law enforcement and public safety, event management, international cultural affairs and strategic planning. Together, we are building an informed and capable generation—one ready to protect, defend, and carry forward the torch of liberty. As the holidays approach, we wish you and your families a joyful and peaceful Christmas season, and a prosperous New Year. May your homes be filled with warmth, love, and blessings, and may the coming year bring growth, opportunity, and continued strength to our community. Thank you for standing with us. We look forward to achieving even greater milestones together in the year ahead. With gratitude and hope, Ingrid Centurion and the Boards of Generations for America and Generations for America Foundation | | | English First Classes All our attendees want to improve their language skills, including improving their English and having conversations in English and Spanish. These classes are designed for native Spanish speakers to improve their English. We hold them at a local church and welcome anyone regardless of denomination or nationality. | | | Public Speaker Training Public speaking can be daunting and challenging for the speaker to reach and motivate audiences. Generations for America Foundation can help you deliver more professional and eloquent talks that target your audience. We can help you. | | | Black History Month Generations for America was instrumental in organizing the Gala event in 2023 and Ingrid delivered an inspiring speech! | | | Slam the Scam Public Safety From cyber threats to violence we must always be aware to protect our families and staff. Criminals often call, leave a voicemail, send a seemingly innocent social media connection, or email correspondence from something that looks legitimate. Don't be a victim. We've spoken at local libraries about the modern day dangers that you need to be aware of to protect yourself and you family. | | | Shield of Rights Constitutional Webinars A program that ensures everyone knows their rights and responsibilities. Special focus on law enforcement perspective is crucial for both officers and the public. A well-rounded program can help ensure that everyone knows their rights and responsibilities, leading to better community relations and more informed decision-making in law enforcement. Local libraries were given one-hour highlights. Ingrid delivered a rousing speech about the Willful Subversion of the U.S. Constitution in Greenville. | | | North Charleston Mayoral Debate Generations for America, a 501(C)(4), organized and moderated a public forum debate of six mayoral candidates at North Charleston City Hall. Our non-partisan efforts help the voters ask candidates the tough questions. | | | Penmanship Camp for Kids Our Penmanship Camp is designed to help children improve their handwriting skills, focusing on both print and cursive writing. Through music, history and fun engaging activities, children will develop proper writing techniques, including letter formation, spacing, and fluidity. | | | Robert's Rules of Order Develop effective participatory decision-making skills. Develop skills to be able to serve as a competent committee chairman or member. Develop skills to be able to function well as an organizational officer or member. Understand the rules and how they function. Register for our next course starting on January 7th at . | | | Expungement Clinics Ingrid Centurion explains the importance of getting your criminal record expunged on Fox24 News Now. See her interview at . | | | Name It, Change It, Do It Generations for America Foundation published a motivational book called Name It, Change It, Do It available for purchase on . We followed that up with an empowerment event based on the practical wisdom from the book called Accelerate & Activate a Change Conference in North Charleston. | | | Political Candidate Meet and Greets Generations for America, a 501(C)(4), organized and provided event night support for political candidates running for U.S. Senate, SC Governor and SC Attorney General. We encourage candidates to reach out to the voters and we will give non-partisan event support. | | | Ingrid Centurion Podcast Ingrid and her guests discuss and debate timely public affairs topics concerning critical issues many of which involve the U.S. Constitution. Watch episodes now at the Please contact us to become a sponsor of the show or an episode. We're also looking for guests who are authorities in their field or public figures who wish to talk about topics on the show. | | | | Please support our continued efforts in 2026 to inform, educate and inspire Americans both natural born and those that now call the USA their new home. We're glad you cherish our freedom and opportunity and want to help you succeed. Learn details about . Membership is available to participate in our educational offerings. Please reply for details. | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- © 2022-2025 All Rights Reserved | Generations for America Foundation 1985 Riviera Dr Ste 103 PMB 263 Mt Pleasant SC * 29464 |

California Democrats,
https://www.instagram.com/cademocrats/ [https://www.instagram.com/cademocrats/]
Happy Holidays! As 2025 comes to a close, we want to thank you for being partners in this fight with us to defend democracy, support working families, and protect our freedoms. Together, we ran the biggest coordinated campaign the state has seen to date, turning out millions of Californians to vote in an off-year special election. Because of your hard work and dedication, 64% of California voters delivered a landslide victory for Proposition 50 to protect democracy in all 50 states – a powerful reminder that together, we win!
We look forward to continuing this work alongside you in 2026 as we fight to flip seats and take back the House of Representatives. Wishing you peace, joy and rest this holiday season!
Sincerely,
Team CADEM

| Fellow Patriot,
---
| Charlie Kirk lived fast. And he lived loud.

He filled arenas. He lit a fire in the next generation on campus.

He confronted lies and spoke truth with boldness.

And he built a movement and a machine that few ever thought possible.

I saw it up close -- _Charlie moved at a pace most couldn 't keep up with. _

But in the middle of all the noise... he made a quiet decision that changed everything.

_**He started observing the Sabbath. **_

Not as a box to check. Not as a religious performance.

_But as an act of obedience. _

As a way of saying, **_" God, You are enough. And because You are enough, I need not carry the weight of a world that was never mine to hold." _**

Every week -- no matter what -- Charlie stopped.

He turned off the noise. He stepped away from the battlefield.

No email. No media. No work.

He gave his full attention fully to God, his wife Erika, and his children.

It was hard at first -- for someone who carried so much.

But over time, it changed him.

And before he was assassinated, he wrote a book about what he had learned...
---

| Fellow Patriot, like I mentioned, this isn't a political book.

It's not a culture war manifesto.

It's a call to stop.

To rest. To breathe. To return to God.

**Because Charlie believed America hadn 't just forgotten truth... It had forgotten trust. **

Trust that the world keeps spinning when you step away.

Trust that God is in control.

Trust that rest is not weakness -- it's worship.

**In _Stop, in the Name of God,_ you'll discover: **

🔥 How Charlie reclaimed the Sabbath in a world built on burnout

🔥 What sacred rest gave back to him -- as a father, husband, and believer

🔥 Why he believed this message could spark revival in a restless generation

Charlie wrote this book because he knew what it meant to nearly lose his peace -- and what it felt like to find it again.

That's the heartbeat of his final message.

| Charlie Kirk didn't waste his time on earth.

He left behind a family. He left behind a movement. And he left behind this truth...

For anyone ready to step off the treadmill... and walk back toward what's eternal.

Fellow Patriot, thank you -- in advance -- for helping reach the next generation with truth, faith, and moral courage.

These are the very things Charlie gave his life for.

May the message he left behind lead you -- just as it led him -- to a deeper trust in God...

A stronger love for your family...

And a renewed peace in your own soul.
---
| **For Charlie, **

**Justin Streiff **
Chief Operating Officer

clean_body: This is what gave him strength Charlie’s final message—support Turning Point USA & receive his last book. | | | Fellow Patriot, | Charlie Kirk lived fast. And he lived loud. He filled arenas. He lit a fire in the next generation on campus. He confronted lies and spoke truth with boldness. And he built a movement and a machine that few ever thought possible. I saw it up close -- Charlie moved at a pace most couldn 't keep up with. But in the middle of all the noise... he made a quiet decision that changed everything. He started observing the Sabbath. Not as a box to check. Not as a religious performance. But as an act of obedience. As a way of saying, " God, You are enough. And because You are enough, I need not carry the weight of a world that was never mine to hold." Every week -- no matter what -- Charlie stopped. He turned off the noise. He stepped away from the battlefield. No email. No media. No work. He gave his full attention fully to God, his wife Erika, and his children. It was hard at first -- for someone who carried so much. But over time, it changed him. And before he was assassinated, he wrote a book about what he had learned... | | This was Charlie's final message. His final act of trust. A book not about politics... but about peace. It 's called: Stop, in the Name of God. | | Fellow Patriot, like I mentioned, this isn't a political book. It's not a culture war manifesto. It's a call to stop. To rest. To breathe. To return to God. Because Charlie believed America hadn 't just forgotten truth... It had forgotten trust. Trust that the world keeps spinning when you step away. Trust that God is in control. Trust that rest is not weakness -- it's worship. In Stop, in the Name of God, you'll discover: 🔥 How Charlie reclaimed the Sabbath in a world built on burnout 🔥 What sacred rest gave back to him -- as a father, husband, and believer 🔥 Why he believed this message could spark revival in a restless generation Charlie wrote this book because he knew what it meant to nearly lose his peace -- and what it felt like to find it again. That's the heartbeat of his final message. | | Charlie Kirk didn't waste his time on earth. He left behind a family. He left behind a movement. And he left behind this truth... For anyone ready to step off the treadmill... and walk back toward what's eternal. Fellow Patriot, thank you -- in advance -- for helping reach the next generation with truth, faith, and moral courage. These are the very things Charlie gave his life for. May the message he left behind lead you -- just as it led him -- to a deeper trust in God... A stronger love for your family... And a renewed peace in your own soul. | For Charlie, Justin Streiff Chief Operating Officer Turning Point USA | | | P.S.Stop, in the Name of God is Charlie Kirk's final message -- written in obedience, shaped by Scripture, and grounded in trust in the Lord. | | 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044

Hi Peter, As we enter the final days of the holiday season, I come hat-in-hand asking for your help with a donation to Local Democracy Project. Our first year at LDP has been powerful. Out of a dream to get more local candidates organizing and elected outside the major cities, we have contributed to wins like prop 50 in CA, school board races, and developed a strategy that will add to the double digit shift/wins that we are seeing all across the country. _Now is the time to strike. Level 5 hurricane force winds are blowing in our direction because of a deeply unpopular administration._ We need LDP to continue training and organizing. As we saw with prop 50, deep red areas are becoming blue. This is more important than ever as we leverage local candidates to turn out more voters in Congressional districts. A school board or city council candidate that turns out 50-100% more votes than needed to win their specific local race, are votes that go to flipping the House of Representatives. name: Gretchen Whitmer
subject: We must do better
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC
body:
Republicans in Congress just failed to extend the Affordable Care Act subsidies that help more than 20 million Americans afford health insurance. |
#
---
Team, Republicans in Congress just failed to extend the Affordable Care Act subsidies that help more than 20 million Americans — including hundreds of thousands of Michiganders — afford health insurance. Let’s be clear about what this means: **Health care is getting more expensive, the coverage is worse, and Washington Republicans don't care.** Earlier this year, these same Republicans slashed Medicaid and SNAP benefits, kicking millions off coverage and leaving families wondering how they'll put food on the table. Time and time again, they choose to make your life harder. We need leaders who are serious about solving problems, not creating them. That’s why I launched Fight Like Hell PAC — to support leaders ready to get stuff done and take on those who keep making life harder for working families — and we’ve got big plans. We're going to fight back at the ballot box. We're going to support candidates who will actually stand up for affordable health care. And we're going to make sure every voter knows exactly who voted to raise their costs. **[But we can’t do it alone. So please, if you’re as fired up as I am, chip in whatever you can right now to help us fight back:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121791647/590593686/-1313101069?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251222_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2YyYzExNjEtNjBkZi1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAwZDNhMWVjOGM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=X6AJ9LA-7shDb4snvJu-VEu3q1L4WrFZCCZqD0EsRAU=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121791648/590593687/-1313101069?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251222_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2YyYzExNjEtNjBkZi1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAwZDNhMWVjOGM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=X6AJ9LA-7shDb4snvJu-VEu3q1L4WrFZCCZqD0EsRAU=)

clean_body: Republicans in Congress just failed to extend the Affordable Care Act subsidies that help more than 20 million Americans afford health insurance. | Team, Republicans in Congress just failed to extend the Affordable Care Act subsidies that help more than 20 million Americans — including hundreds of thousands of Michiganders — afford health insurance. Let’s be clear about what this means: Health care is getting more expensive, the coverage is worse, and Washington Republicans don't care. Earlier this year, these same Republicans slashed Medicaid and SNAP benefits, kicking millions off coverage and leaving families wondering how they'll put food on the table. Time and time again, they choose to make your life harder. We need leaders who are serious about solving problems, not creating them. That’s why I launched Fight Like Hell PAC — to support leaders ready to get stuff done and take on those who keep making life harder for working families — and we’ve got big plans. We're going to fight back at the ballot box. We're going to support candidates who will actually stand up for affordable health care. And we're going to make sure every voter knows exactly who voted to raise their costs. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thank you, Gretchen Fight Like Hell PAC PO Box 15093 Lansing, MI 48901 United States ** | mailto:info@fightlikehellpac.org| | Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC. name: Delia Ramirez
subject: Kristi Noem must be held accountable.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Justice Democrats
body:
I’m taking the first steps toward impeachment.
#
Peter,
Recently, during a House Homeland Security Committee hearing, I confronted Secretary of Homeland Security Kristi Noem with a reality she has spent months trying to evade: her actions have consequences. Noem lies with impunity, she rejects checks and balances, and she ignores Congress and the courts. Her options are limited: either she’s going to resign, Trump’s going to fire her, or she will be impeached. **And I’ve already started working on her impeachment.**
**[Before I tell you how I'm fighting back against Noem, will you join us in standing up against the illegal arrest and deportation of innocent people by splitting a donation to my campaign and Justice Democrats?](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251222-1-dr.1QwcAt&refcode=em20251222-37295&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=37295%2E1203867%2E7Jz-li)**
I made it clear that her patterns of dishonesty, defiance of congressional oversight, and disregard to court orders cannot continue. When a cabinet secretary operates as if checks and balances don’t apply to them, **accountability is no longer optional—it becomes necessary.**
Under Noem’s leadership, the Department of Homeland Security has encouraged racial profiling and the dehumanization of our neighbors. We have seen due process trampled, families terrorized and separated, and court rulings ignored. DHS and ICE are participating in gross abuses of power, and their unlawful acts are only continuing to grow bolder.
Even more disturbing, we’ve watched elected officials, judges, and students targeted and arrested on charges so thin they collapse under scrutiny—manufactured by right-wing extremists to justify intimidation and silence dissent. This is what happens when an agency meant to protect the public is weaponized for political ends. This is what happens when authoritarian leaders are given free reign to weaponize federal agencies for political ends.
**[Split $10](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140428?c0=jd-em-20251222-1-dr.Ou7XV6&refcode=em20251222-37295&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=37295%2E1203867%2E7Jz-li)**
**Noem is not fit to hold her office. I’m taking the first steps toward impeachment** and formally calling on the Judiciary Committee to open an investigation into her lawlessness. No official, no matter their title, is above the Constitution.
**[I will continue to fight for accountability, transparency, and justice—but I can't do it alone. Split a donation with me and Justice Democrats so we can fight for a democracy our communities deserve.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251222-1-dr.1QwcAt&refcode=em20251222-37295&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=37295%2E1203867%2E7Jz-li)**
In solidarity,
Delia

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20251222-37295-footer&t=5&refcode2=37295_1203867_7Jz-li&akid=37295%2E1203867%2E7Jz-li)**
---

Remember, some folks, even those who may have some sort of status or protection, may not be aware whether they are subject to a final order of removal. name: Haley Stevens
subject: A Christmas Note
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
Why I Still Believe

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9oYWxleWZvcm1pLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.Z5E7xDwzc-9WWcOKbtoq3TjDnPA4XDArm6F9v4DiI2I?) for more
---
# [A Christmas Note](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=6380051&post_id=182028741&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgyMDI4NzQxLCJpYXQiOjE3NjY0Mjc5NDIsImV4cCI6MTc2OTAxOTk0MiwiaXNzIjoicHViLTYzODAwNTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.7oAndCpNxOkTnjrxgjTHSyYrCTYztBqtU5vxhpKS0Zc)
### Why I Still Believe
| | [Haley Stevens](https://substack.com/@haleyformi)
---
| Dec 22
---
| [](https://substack.com/@haleyformi)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9vcGVuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9wdWIvaGFsZXlmb3JtaS9wL2EtY2hyaXN0bWFzLW5vdGU_.0imc_tFzAQ9mmKRULpFPyTsfPpL7G36PwDJAFMYztvU?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/haleyformi/p/a-christmas-note?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

| [](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/d49b05dc-80a2-4022-b62d-2ab44aa283b4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
My dad and I getting our Christmas tree 🎄❤️
Christmas is almost here, and I wanted to reach out and speak honestly with you.
The holiday season can be about warmth, family, and joy. About love, generosity, and hope. It can be a magical time of year - especially for kids.
But for a lot of Michiganders, and folks across the country, **this Christmas feels heavier than it should.**
I've been hearing it everywhere I go:
_Working people_ lying awake at night doing mental math __ - wondering where another $300 a month will come from when their health insurance subsidies expire on Jan. 1.
_Seniors_ worried about their heating bills climbing higher and higher - debating whether to turn the thermostat down again, or cut back somewhere else.
_Parents_ who want nothing more than to give their kids a little Christmas magic - a big family meal, toys under the tree, decorations around the house - but who've seen grocery prices eat away the little extra they had.
That stress doesn't disappear just because it's the holidays. If anything, it can feel sharper.
And I want you to know:**I see you.** I hear you. I carry your stories with me every day.
And yet - I still believe. I still feel hope.
Many of you will be heading to Christmas Eve services this week, which are, at their core, a celebration of the birth of a child.
A child not born into wealth, and not born in a gold-plated palace - but born among farm animals and placed in a manger.
That story has always meant something to me, because I believe that great things come from humble beginnings. I believe in the goodness of people.**In the strength of coming together with hopeful expectations.** In the simple, everyday courage of communities that show up for each other, day in and day out.
I see it in parents juggling two jobs and still making it to a school concert. In the resilience of small businesses, the solidarity in union halls, and the pride on factory floors.
That's what I'm holding on to this Christmas.
**Folks, our country has had a tough year. Michigan has had a tough year. But we won 't lose hope.**
We adapt. We help each other. And we fight back when the system stops working for the people it's supposed to serve. That's why I'm running for U.S. Senate.
**Because I believe we can build an economy where families don 't have to choose between heat and health care. **Where working people aren't punished by chaos in Washington. Where dignity, fairness, and decency aren't partisan - they're expected.
So as Christmas approaches, my hope for you is simple: that you find moments of joy and peace. That you feel connected to the people you love. And that you know, even if things feel uncertain - you are not alone.
And if you're in a position to help - and truly, only if you're able - a contribution to this grassroots campaign helps us keep fighting for Michigan families. **[Every dollar goes toward reaching voters, fighting back against the chaos, and building a future that works for everyone.](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/bd0ff9b4-ee3e-4871-8a1c-c090b883c3a8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[ Donate](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/bd0ff9b4-ee3e-4871-8a1c-c090b883c3a8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
But more than anything, I just wanted to say this: I believe in Michigan. I believe in you. And even in hard seasons, I believe we can still choose hope.
Let's create something better, together.
Merry Christmas.
With grit and gratitude,
Haley
* * *

A personal note from Haley 👋

I'm a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. I've spent my career fighting for Michigan's working families - and now I'm running for the U.S. Senate to keep standing up for the people I love.

But here's the truth: Senate control could come down to Michigan. And Trump and his megadonors know it. That's why they're gearing up to spend tens of millions to defeat me and hand this seat to a MAGA Republican.

I need your help to fight back. This race will be one of the most competitive - and expensive - in the country, and I'm counting on grassroots support to win.

If you're with me, will you chip in today?
[Donate](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/bd0ff9b4-ee3e-4871-8a1c-c090b883c3a8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
###### Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate.

---

33717 Woodward Ave #539, Birmingham, MI 48009

name: Kamala Harris
body:
---
Derek, The first step toward fighting for our democracy is truly believing that the power is with the people. It may seem like a small step, but it has a big impact. Next year marks our opportunity to take that step together. In 2026, Democrats have a chance to retake the House and Senate. If we are going to see a shift in our country, we must win back Congress. The stakes have never been higher — for our rights and freedoms, our pocketbooks, and our entire nation. Right now, the political environment we are in is making people feel on edge and alone. It is very disempowering to feel as though you do not have community. But Derek, the DNC is doing so much of the important work of building that community in every corner of the country. And that’s exactly what we’ll have to do to win tough races next year. As you read this, thousands of people are coming together to join the DNC and fight for our democracy. Now, they are counting on you to do the same. [**If you’re ready to join a community of your fellow Democrats who are gearing up to send a powerful message to Donald Trump next year, I’m asking you to pitch in to the DNC today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2025?amount=7&refcode=em_20251222_5614_fr&refcode2=5629_22930333_bmJzG1&akid=5629%2E22930333%2EbmJzG1) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-december-2025?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=em_20251222_5614_fr&refcode2=5629_22930333_bmJzG1&akid=5629%2E22930333%2EbmJzG1)**

I firmly believe the power is with the people. I hope you do, too.
Thank you for everything you’re doing,
Kamala

clean_body: Derek, The first step toward fighting for our democracy is truly believing that the power is with the people. It may seem like a small step, but it has a big impact. Next year marks our opportunity to take that step together. In 2026, Democrats have a chance to retake the House and Senate. If we are going to see a shift in our country, we must win back Congress. The stakes have never been higher — for our rights and freedoms, our pocketbooks, and our entire nation. Right now, the political environment we are in is making people feel on edge and alone. It is very disempowering to feel as though you do not have community. But Derek, the DNC is doing so much of the important work of building that community in every corner of the country. And that’s exactly what we’ll have to do to win tough races next year. As you read this, thousands of people are coming together to join the DNC and fight for our democracy. Now, they are counting on you to do the same. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly. | | | ** | | | | | | | ** I firmly believe the power is with the people. I hope you do, too. Thank you for everything you’re doing, Kamala If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support.

body:
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34881?t=1011&refcode=email-20251222_v&akid=10002%2E5885482%2EoE7hIA ]Our Revolution logo

Peter Willis,

This just dropped: The NEXT No Kings Day has been officially announced for
2026. And Our Revolution is going ALL IN.

In June, 5 million people joined 2,100 No Kings Day actions across the
country. Then, in October, we broke every record and turned out 7 million
people in 2,700 cities.

The Trump Machine and its Republican megadonors panicked. Their attempts
to try to silence dissent picked up steam as they smeared our organizers,
and even introduced bills to open the door to PROSECUTE No Kings Day
funders.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34882?source=email-20251222&t=1061&akid=10002%2E5885482%2EoE7hIA ]Headline: Ted Cruz says his bill will allow DOJ to 'prosecute' those
who fund No Kings protests, which have been overwhelmingly peaceful

But we will not back down. No way, no how. Our grassroots, people-powered
movement is ready to turn out MILLIONS more for No Kings Day 2026 – in
every community, red states and blue. But that takes resources. Trump’s
billionaire buddies have unlimited Super PACs, but we have something
stronger: PEOPLE like you.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34881?t=1057&amount=22&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&refcode=email-20251222nd&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=10002%2E5885482%2EoE7hIA ]Will you chip in right now to power organizing, recruiting, and training
across the country, so we can break records at No Kings Day 3 and stand up
to authoritarianism – together?

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation to Our Revolution will process immediately.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34881?t=1042&express_lane=true&amount=9&refcode=email-20251222nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=10002%2E5885482%2EoE7hIA ]CHIP IN $9 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34881?t=1043&express_lane=true&amount=22&refcode=email-20251222nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=10002%2E5885482%2EoE7hIA ]CHIP IN $22

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34881?t=1047&express_lane=true&amount=66&refcode=email-20251222nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=10002%2E5885482%2EoE7hIA ]CHIP IN $66 [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34881?t=1048&amount=9&refcode=email-20251222nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=10002%2E5885482%2EoE7hIA ]CHIP IN OTHER AMOUNT

Last October, millions of you organized events in your communities, filled
entire streets, waved homemade signs, led chants, and showed the strength
of our opposition to Trump. That was people power at work. And now, with
your support, we could see 10 million at No Kings Day 3 in early 2026.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34882?source=email-20251222&t=1060&akid=10002%2E5885482%2EoE7hIA ]Photo of OUr Revolution activists at a No Kings protest in New York

We know the stakes. We know Trump and his enablers are trying to
intimidate and silence us. But when we say NO KINGS, we mean it. This is
about democracy, justice, and a country where the people set the agenda –
not oligarchs, not authoritarians.

If 7 million people showed up in October, we know we can go even bigger
this time. We just need the resources to take the fight to every corner of
this country. Which is why we need your help today to turn out our
movement like never before, and make sure every organizer and every
protester gets the resources, training, and support they need.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/34881?t=1054&amount=22&refcode=email-20251222nd&amounts=9%2C22%2C27%2C46%2C66&firstname=Peter%20Willis&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&akid=10002%2E5885482%2EoE7hIA ]Will you donate right now so we can recruit, train, and organize the
grassroots to turn out MILLIONS more people for the third No Kings Day?
Together let’s make this the biggest day of nonviolent resistance America
has ever seen.

This is our moment. Let’s make history – again.

Our Revolution

name: In This Together PAC HQ
subject: We do more than talk the talk
disclaimer_text: Paid for by In This Together PAC
body:
Democrats can win in any district, in any state, in any corner of the country.

Peter –- in just a moment, **[we're going to ask you to consider chipping in whatever you can to support our efforts to elect for-the-people leaders in critical races across the country.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121793591/590600237/1089852515?refcode=em25_251222_evergr_fndd_gq_act___ittpachq_ettx&&&&utm_campaign=em25_251222_evergr_fndd_gq_act___ittpachq_ettx&&&&utm_medium=email&&&&refcode2=7d751018-65df-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&refcode2=7d751018-65df-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTAzNjMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiN2Q3NTEwMTgtNjVkZi1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAwZDNhMWVjOGM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=w2OEveU6FHWyjpv_iaoDtY_9U-VTm9Q6pz1WFa3WUKs=)**

_But first, we want to explain why:_

There's a reason we're taking what we learned here in Kentucky and helping candidates across the country.

Gov. Andy Beshear's three statewide wins in Kentucky have proven that Democrats can win in any district, state, and corner of the country. He won by being himself and connecting with voters by listening to their concerns and offering real, tangible solutions. He didn't just talk the talk. Once elected, Andy delivered results that made a difference in people's lives.

It sounds simple, because it is, Peter. Our politics shouldn't be riddled with partisan games and tactics that leave the American people behind. Our leaders should fight to make our lives better, not bow down to special interest groups or wealthy individuals who want to keep lining their pockets to advance their dangerous, self-serving agendas.

That’s why In This Together PAC is working so hard to support real, honest leadership. We've seen this work in Kentucky, and now we need to make sure it happens in key races across the country.

**[We're reaching out to you to ask for your help with our mission. If we want real leadership at every level of government, then we need to fight for it every single day. clean_body: Democrats can win in any district, in any state, in any corner of the country. Peter –- in just a moment, = But first, we want to explain why: There's a reason we're taking what we learned here in Kentucky and helping candidates across the country. Gov. Andy Beshear's three statewide wins in Kentucky have proven that Democrats can win in any district, state, and corner of the country. He won by being himself and connecting with voters by listening to their concerns and offering real, tangible solutions. He didn't just talk the talk. Once elected, Andy delivered results that made a difference in people's lives. It sounds simple, because it is, Peter. Our politics shouldn't be riddled with partisan games and tactics that leave the American people behind. Our leaders should fight to make our lives better, not bow down to special interest groups or wealthy individuals who want to keep lining their pockets to advance their dangerous, self-serving agendas. That’s why In This Together PAC is working so hard to support real, honest leadership. We've seen this work in Kentucky, and now we need to make sure it happens in key races across the country. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thanks, In This Together PAC HQ | Andy and In This Together PAC are working to support leaders who will lead with compassion and decency, reject anger politics, and always do what's right. Defending OR-06 is our best bet to flip the House blue, and protect future generations of Oregonians.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121793725/590600599/-1080040549?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWQ1ZWRmMy02NGRmLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExZWM4YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sGpkgQLFbNp8VHrHZ9X-2R8VoeunF4KIAc6-oUxytrI=) My daughter Amelia turned 21 last week. She is one of the reasons I ran for Congress in the first place – to create a better future for the next generation. **But what is happening in our country today is deeply concerning, and I have never been more worried about my daughter’s future.** [_**By defending OR-06, we can help flip the House for Democrats and regain a majority that will fight to protect our children’s future — not destroy it. But I need support from people like you to fuel this fight: Can I count on you to chip in $6?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121793727/590600601/318555295?amount=6&refcode=email_121925_concerned&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NWQ1ZWRmMy02NGRmLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExZWM4YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sGpkgQLFbNp8VHrHZ9X-2R8VoeunF4KIAc6-oUxytrI=) Our children are the future of our country, and they are coming up in a world that is unrecognizable. In less than a year, Donald Trump and his MAGA loyalists have taken a sledgehammer to our Democracy. They have unlawfully sent troops into cities, fired thousands of federal workers, and passed a budget scam that threatens healthcare for thousands of Oregon families. **If you think it will stop there,_you are_ _mistaken_.** [_**Our best path forward is by taking back the Majority in Congress and electing leaders who will fight for future generations. That starts with defending OR-06 and flipping the House blue. So what do you say? name: Adam Schwarze
subject: Poll: Should Tim Walz resign?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
He lied about his service in the military, resigning in shame so he wouldn’t have to deploy to an active war zone. | [](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=edf285a92bd84f0dbe4ecd5e1dd24d04&_e=2FBzKhc5GJFs4qrXubP7g8t8cEiEUnSu6ZKKwyh03gCpqyPZjDLx2nys1kf7adtjmO9ouxicClZJCqrUjnY4csch9D67_-8o6s0eK5opwdncX3vVJ7jNfMzcrlXr4_UKAPG1qWauHj84rlJzVBlPNsXJ5W7lcWdYYgCo-5vc_qY_qRoYbo5yYeWDdBr8lfN8rQAUTwMx19WZCEN2ZO4vs162k8TJ2FbLykmjYKhJTSnx4VEd6l8pW1SBrMAr4otJhibfRtx_JpRvRc3MEk3NTdQKYO1YzugVy4dXI9goXW0DVFNBs_ycpK7qc_dtCJTblcnFUa5_H54LEBieQo4iRrRxySuTXq6YouzzHVXJvc-Zty-1VppdMNiWlYBoP0cxF4PEMcynaB01aWbMlh5UcQ1HTpBhUxx2-7lzGbJH3SHe53UDCQlrYLUTS5uI4NuCy-k-CqBN_edzyOkN4PDRv1r1IrBIjfSsl9CAqqWM5Fc5PTjM1J_Z8U25_B6FkW7qmp2fDvo5ivY711VeyK28AVDqOTS7XDUgVNYDIncggscuxxdfIMjXApmes9pdlO_oHS4VIAvZE0CsCq2I4rAuJc4JXM4fxSVGKAZOMFFwrNNeMaV46agqJVnMeWMOrtG7siZvzpzX-EWtlR_stZ1Qzra6XwXDaoq1qF8_HCrXKREEZoe7xIf-ZtmwsQ-YLK0VOFSapbQKDB9egmiUiseXUn1rgfDxh635FxfBXiyFQt1CjDNmc9XI-V1uN72Y79iXenwtjO-LSS5OlStZ7g2J9g%3D%3D)

---
Fellow Conservative,

My name is Adam Schwarze, and I’m running for the U.S. Senate in Minnesota.

**I’m a former Navy SEAL who doesn’t beat around the bush.** I’ve put myself in harm's way more times than I can count because I love what this country stands for.

Leadership doesn’t start on the day one is elected; it’s a quality that one learns from a young age - you exercise it, and it develops over time. President Trump personifies it - so does Marco Rubio.

**But Tim Walz?** He lied about his service in the military, resigning in shame so he wouldn’t have to deploy to an active war zone.

That isn’t leadership, it’s cowardice.

**As governor, the Somali community in Minnesota has defrauded taxpayers of hundreds of millions of dollars, including:**

* **$300m** to pay for the therapy of children with autism, who, in fact, didn’t have autism.

* **$250m** stolen from funds meant to feed hungry children.

So far, Governor Walz has taken ZERO accountability and **[I’m calling on him to RESIGN.](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=edf285a92bd84f0dbe4ecd5e1dd24d04&_e=2FBzKhc5GJFs4qrXubP7g8t8cEiEUnSu6ZKKwyh03gCpqyPZjDLx2nys1kf7adtjmO9ouxicClZJCqrUjnY4csch9D67_-8o6s0eK5opwdncX3vVJ7jNfMzcrlXr4_UKAPG1qWauHj84rlJzVBlPNsXJ5W7lcWdYYgCo-5vc_qY_qRoYbo5yYeWDdBr8lfN8rQAUTwMx19WZCEN2ZO4vs162k8TJ2FbLykmjYKhJTSnx4VEd6l8pW1SBrMAr4otJhibfRtx_JpRvRc3MEk3NTa6QUXOhD4qyMWu_pACtjl4MqTQ6zR-kcv8cb2Ae5lqxWIpAwOVdr8xYlCsZYwg79I99M-PXJpJHe4LGJZ0fqrGAGQb7eu6Gyy1Rd6BFx4N6labVqKVrOWDkb7jg4NbAtgxxCFDyatbdXogPI_RX5vmMQdXfocQjBv08HveLvNe8Iap6OgNxkxOB3kD09CPcvhq4qowB4y_IWSejrR5W21fmjtWZ8JeRiWlQUfFfVakohV5oqLjD4QbdQTFdLcl6HuyVFGwGhGvEaBAaOh3kiVpS0Ky9CWY2rFdGtVJ2zU8smnrRH2Rsi1gwz6U1-fArbo-Unrw4ZRPIrZxWGXE88yxq7J3yphZQ275LvSO0Ojf_tl96lvoVgE0bUIizesHOe0GtThJc6dXdH5CQzu4w6DYvi7P6IVNVPxeZeXAECazoWuVuPr9Z4NKTPE5u8IaTzSiCdCZqSmG_LPhIFHafZYn0qmFUpbDD4YtkTDnf-ax6EfVuoXGYS6lhcUiY1Ur91g%3D%3D)**
