clean_body: He lied about his service in the military, resigning in shame so he wouldn’t have to deploy to an active war zone. | Fellow Conservative, My name is Adam Schwarze, and I’m running for the U.S. Senate in Minnesota. I’m a former Navy SEAL who doesn’t beat around the bush. I’ve put myself in harm's way more times than I can count because I love what this country stands for. Leadership doesn’t start on the day one is elected; it’s a quality that one learns from a young age - you exercise it, and it develops over time. President Trump personifies it - so does Marco Rubio. But Tim Walz? He lied about his service in the military, resigning in shame so he wouldn’t have to deploy to an active war zone. That isn’t leadership, it’s cowardice. As governor, the Somali community in Minnesota has defrauded taxpayers of hundreds of millions of dollars, including: $300m to pay for the therapy of children with autism, who, in fact, didn’t have autism. $250m stolen from funds meant to feed hungry children. So far, Governor Walz has taken ZERO accountability and In service, Adam Schwarze Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate – Minnesota Former Navy SEAL officer Marine Corps Veteran Proud Minnesotan FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Center for Reproductive Rights
subject: 2025 Recap: The Year of Defiance
body:
How we fought back for reproductive freedom | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/121794243/590601865/1141910609?sourceid=1151049&utm_campaign=26emjge-1212aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=5xmatch&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NmNkYTc5Yy02NmRmLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExZWM4YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=caBkqevWBqd_b_ry_SUf-pw28QsD7AP5i6MoDfrMt6o=&emci=890af6a2-5ddf-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&emdi=66cda79c-66df-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&ceid=954237)
---
|
---
**2025 IN REVIEW: THE YEAR OF DEFIANCE** Peter—

This year was a pivotal one in the fight for reproductive rights. It was a year marked not only by relentless attacks on our freedoms—but by our relentless _defiance._

[With you by our side, we've led the fight for reproductive freedom with everything we have: in the courts, in our communities, and in the halls of power.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/121794244/590601866/1141910609?sourceid=1151049&utm_campaign=26emjge-1212aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=5xmatch&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NmNkYTc5Yy02NmRmLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExZWM4YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=caBkqevWBqd_b_ry_SUf-pw28QsD7AP5i6MoDfrMt6o=&emci=890af6a2-5ddf-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&emdi=66cda79c-66df-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&ceid=954237)

Here's what we accomplished together in 2025, in the United States alone:
## Suing the Trump Admin for Withholding Records on Medication Abortion
When the Trump administration announced plans to re-evaluate mifepristone—medication abortion proven safe and effective through decades of peer-reviewed science—based on discredited extremist policy papers rather than medical evidence, the Center demanded transparency. When officials ignored multiple Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) requests about their review process, we sued.

[The public deserves to know whether the FDA is making decisions based on science—or political pressure. We won't stop until we have answers.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/121794245/590601867/1141910609?sourceid=1151049&utm_campaign=26emjge-1212aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=5xmatch&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NmNkYTc5Yy02NmRmLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExZWM4YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=caBkqevWBqd_b_ry_SUf-pw28QsD7AP5i6MoDfrMt6o=&emci=890af6a2-5ddf-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&emdi=66cda79c-66df-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&ceid=954237) | [DEMAND ACCOUNTABILITY 5X](https://click.everyaction.com/k/121794246/590601868/1141910609?sourceid=1151049&utm_campaign=26emjge-1212aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=5xmatch&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NmNkYTc5Yy02NmRmLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExZWM4YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=caBkqevWBqd_b_ry_SUf-pw28QsD7AP5i6MoDfrMt6o=&emci=890af6a2-5ddf-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&emdi=66cda79c-66df-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&ceid=954237)
---

* * *
## Fighting Back Against Medicaid Defunding
Trump's so-called "big beautiful bill" restricted Medicaid funding for family planning clinics that provide abortion care—putting lives at risk, especially in rural areas. For providers like our client **Maine Family Planning (MFP)** , this threatened access to essential care for thousands of low-income patients.

MFP serves around 8,000 patients at its 18 clinics and mobile unit every year, with tens of thousands more receiving care through subcontracted clinics statewide. This attack followed another unlawful move: freezing Title X, the nation’s only dedicated family planning safety-net program.

[The Center fought back. We filed FOIA requests to expose the illegal withholding of Title X funds and sued the Trump administration on behalf of MFP over the dangerous defunding of Medicaid.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/121794247/590601869/1141910609?sourceid=1151049&utm_campaign=26emjge-1212aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=5xmatch&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NmNkYTc5Yy02NmRmLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExZWM4YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=caBkqevWBqd_b_ry_SUf-pw28QsD7AP5i6MoDfrMt6o=&emci=890af6a2-5ddf-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&emdi=66cda79c-66df-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&ceid=954237)

_"We will keep fighting to make sure all Mainers—no matter where they live or what insurance they have—can access the healthcare they need from the provider they trust."_ –Nancy Northup, President and CEO
[FIGHT BACK 5X](https://click.everyaction.com/k/121794248/590601870/1141910609?sourceid=1151049&utm_campaign=26emjge-1212aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=5xmatch&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NmNkYTc5Yy02NmRmLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExZWM4YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=caBkqevWBqd_b_ry_SUf-pw28QsD7AP5i6MoDfrMt6o=&emci=890af6a2-5ddf-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&emdi=66cda79c-66df-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&ceid=954237)

* * *
## Exposing Efforts to Dismantle our Reproductive Rights
From day one, the Trump administration has taken unprecedented action to restrict and roll back reproductive rights—often out of public view.

To expose these efforts, we launched the **Repro Red Flags Tool** , which tracks:
* The Trump admin's full assault on reproductive rights
* Key appointees, agency leaders, and their records
* Executive actions impacting health care

Our tool cuts through misinformation with facts and legal analysis—revealing the real threats to our rights.
[FIGHT MISINFORMATION 5X](https://click.everyaction.com/k/121794249/590601871/1141910609?sourceid=1151049&utm_campaign=26emjge-1212aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=5xmatch&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NmNkYTc5Yy02NmRmLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExZWM4YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=caBkqevWBqd_b_ry_SUf-pw28QsD7AP5i6MoDfrMt6o=&emci=890af6a2-5ddf-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&emdi=66cda79c-66df-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&ceid=954237)

* * *
## Winning Expanded Protections for Midwives in Hawai'i
A 2023 law in Hawai'i placed severe restrictions on traditional midwives, worsening an already dire maternal health crisis. We challenged the law—and won. [As a result, lawmakers repealed many of the harmful restrictions, protecting Native Hawaiian midwives from criminalization and expanding pathways for future providers.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/121794252/590601874/1141910609?sourceid=1151049&utm_campaign=26emjge-1212aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=5xmatch&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NmNkYTc5Yy02NmRmLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExZWM4YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=caBkqevWBqd_b_ry_SUf-pw28QsD7AP5i6MoDfrMt6o=&emci=890af6a2-5ddf-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&emdi=66cda79c-66df-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&ceid=954237)

clean_body: How we fought back for reproductive freedom | | | 2025 IN REVIEW: THE YEAR OF DEFIANCE Peter— This year was a pivotal one in the fight for reproductive rights. It was a year marked not only by relentless attacks on our freedoms—but by our relentless defiance. Here's what we accomplished together in 2025, in the United States alone: Suing the Trump Admin for Withholding Records on Medication Abortion When the Trump administration announced plans to re-evaluate mifepristone—medication abortion proven safe and effective through decades of peer-reviewed science—based on discredited extremist policy papers rather than medical evidence, the Center demanded transparency. When officials ignored multiple Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) requests about their review process, we sued. | Fighting Back Against Medicaid Defunding Trump's so-called "big beautiful bill" restricted Medicaid funding for family planning clinics that provide abortion care—putting lives at risk, especially in rural areas. For providers like our client Maine Family Planning (MFP) , this threatened access to essential care for thousands of low-income patients. MFP serves around 8,000 patients at its 18 clinics and mobile unit every year, with tens of thousands more receiving care through subcontracted clinics statewide. This attack followed another unlawful move: freezing Title X, the nation’s only dedicated family planning safety-net program. "We will keep fighting to make sure all Mainers—no matter where they live or what insurance they have—can access the healthcare they need from the provider they trust." –Nancy Northup, President and CEO Exposing Efforts to Dismantle our Reproductive Rights From day one, the Trump administration has taken unprecedented action to restrict and roll back reproductive rights—often out of public view. To expose these efforts, we launched the Repro Red Flags Tool , which tracks: The Trump admin's full assault on reproductive rights Key appointees, agency leaders, and their records Executive actions impacting health care Our tool cuts through misinformation with facts and legal analysis—revealing the real threats to our rights. Winning Expanded Protections for Midwives in Hawai'i A 2023 law in Hawai'i placed severe restrictions on traditional midwives, worsening an already dire maternal health crisis. We challenged the law—and won. * These are just a few examples of the lawsuits, legal strategies, and resources that your support makes possible. But the fight ahead will be intense—and preparation is everything. | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|--- The Center for Reproductive Rights uses the power of law to advance reproductive rights as fundamental human rights around the world. © Center for Reproductive Rights Center for Reproductive Rights 199 Water St. New York, NY 10038 United States

body:
|
**My former opponent Karoline Leavitt just attacked me on New Hampshire radio.**
She also said President Trump is intending to **flip “as many seats as possible”** and that she will be _“keenly watching”_ our race for Senate.
It doesn’t matter if Karoline’s spin comes from behind the podium or on the radio: **New Hampshire isn’t buying it.** When Karoline ran for Congress against me in 2022, Granite Staters rejected her and her MAGA agenda. With your help, we’ll do it again.
**[Will you split a donation between my campaign and Adam Schiff to stop Republicans from flipping this Senate seat and keep me in the fight for Granite Staters?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=abs-em-pappas25.90nCIT&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20251222_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=3&akid=9327%2E5257348%2EN_d7-u)**
I’ve stood up to Karoline and her far-right agenda before. Now she and National Republicans are preparing to do everything they can to flip this Senate seat so they can stop Democrats from reclaiming the Senate majority.
**[I’m doing the work to win this race and help Democrats flip the Senate, but I need you with me to overcome the noise of the MAGA machine. Can you split a donation between my campaign and Adam Schiff today?](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=abs-em-pappas25.90nCIT&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20251222_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=9327%2E5257348%2EN_d7-u)**

Minnesotans almost always lead the nation in voter turnout — topping nearly 80 percent. That does not happen by accident. It happens because people trust our elections.
And we have fought hard to protect that trust.
We pushed back when the DOJ demanded private data on millions of Minnesota voters.
We challenged unlawful federal overreach — and won.
We strengthened election security while national partners were being weakened.
We prepared for scenarios we hope never occur, because that is the responsibility of this office.
**But the pressures on our democracy are only growing.**
And heading into 2026, we must show strength, not just on Election Day, but right now.
**[If you believe in protecting the freedom to vote, if you believe in truth over disinformation, I’m asking you personally to support our work before our public fundraising deadline on 12/31.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121794457/590602524/329411655?amount=25&refcode=ss_em_fr_90DO_251222&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAzNTUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODVhYjZkNzUtNjdkZi1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAwZDNhMWVjOGM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=hO1RA3Hf1jrPUNZKuAJLHTkgudF80y4zncJIxoYDiUY=)**
Thank you for standing with me,
Steve

With Steve’s leadership, Minnesota has led the nation in voter turnout for the past three out of four elections. His top priorities are defending our democracy, strengthening the freedom to vote for all eligible Minnesotans, pushing back against dangerous disinformation about our elections, providing support for small businesses, and enhancing security protections for our most vulnerable. [Please consider contributing a small gift today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121794461/590602528/-1787004069?refcode=footer&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAzNTUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiODVhYjZkNzUtNjdkZi1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAwZDNhMWVjOGM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=hO1RA3Hf1jrPUNZKuAJLHTkgudF80y4zncJIxoYDiUY=)

body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23767%2E4449941%2EWsirA1) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23767%2E4449941%2EWsirA1) Did you see this, team!? [ **NATIONAL POLL SHOWS SUPPORT FOR MONTANA-BASED SOLUTION TO _CITIZENS UNITED_**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71243?t=3&akid=23767%2E4449941%2EWsirA1)

[_Daily Montanan:“Montana’s proposed ballot measure would challenge the money spent in elections by_ _**attacking the _Citizens United_ ruling in a different way”**_]()
* * *
[ **SHOULD WE BAN _CITIZENS UNITED_ STATE-BY-STATE?**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71243?t=4&akid=23767%2E4449941%2EWsirA1) | | | [YES >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71243?t=5&akid=23767%2E4449941%2EWsirA1)
---
| [NO >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71243?t=6&akid=23767%2E4449941%2EWsirA1)
---
[UNSURE OR PREFER NOT TO SAY >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71243?t=7&akid=23767%2E4449941%2EWsirA1)
---
* * *
Since _Citizens United_ in 2010, billionaires and corporations have flooded our elections with unlimited money, drowning out everyday Americans' voices.

We've tried Constitutional Amendments. We've pushed federal legislation. Nothing has worked. **But Montana just found a different way – and it's gaining momentum.**

**Here's the key:** Every corporation needs a state charter to do business. Montana's proposal would update those charters to ban unlimited political spending. Simple as that.

The beauty of this strategy? We don't need Congress. Each state can act independently, and national polling shows this approach has broad public support – even among voters who disagree on other issues.

**If Montana succeeds and other states follow, we could build a firewall against Dark Money state by state, election by election.**

[**This is truly innovative thinking, and we need to gauge whether Democrats across the country believe this is the path forward. So please, let us know what you think below:**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71243?t=8&akid=23767%2E4449941%2EWsirA1)
* * *
[ **SHOULD WE BAN _CITIZENS UNITED_ STATE-BY-STATE?**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71243?t=9&akid=23767%2E4449941%2EWsirA1)
| | [YES >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71243?t=10&akid=23767%2E4449941%2EWsirA1)
---
| [NO >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71243?t=11&akid=23767%2E4449941%2EWsirA1)
---
[UNSURE OR PREFER NOT TO SAY >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/71243?t=12&akid=23767%2E4449941%2EWsirA1)
---
* * *
Thanks for your input, team.

Fight for Reform

[FULL TRUMP MEMO](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
**Friend
Top Patriot in the Country** **[December 2025]**
[](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
[](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
**12/2025**
Dear Friend,
A letter is just so much more personal, don’t you think so?
It’s very rare that I get to deliver good news myself – I am pretty busy these days – but this was something I had to take the time and do personally.
Let me be the very first to congratulate you on earning an invitation to the Trump Platinum Club – you’ve made it into the top 1% of supporters!
You are a cherished member of the America First movement, and I couldn’t imagine facing the challenges of the next three years without you by my side.

# Hello Capitalists,
### Here is everything you should be following today:
* Gold soars again with Silver and Copper hard on its heels
* Gold now up 70% in 2025
* Copper hits $12,000 per ton, analysts see more to come in 2026
* Oracle is still in the hotseat over debt jitters
* Nvidia hopes to have its new chips going to China by mid-February
* San Fransisco power outage stalls Waymo but not Tesla

### **Today 's markets + assets:**
* **✅ DOW: 48447.82 (⬆️ 0.65%)**
* **✅ S&P: 6880.08 (⬆️ 0.67%)**
* **✅ NASDAQ: 23450.37 (⬆️ 0.61%)**
* **⚠ ️🔴CBOE VIX Volatility Index: 14.35 (⬇️ 3.76%)**
* **✅ Gold: $4472.20 (⬆️ 1.94%)**
* **✅ Silver: $68.55 (⬆️ 1.56%)**
* **✅ Bitcoin: $89,250 (⬆️ 0.45%)**

* * *
* * *
## The Capitalist is a reader-supported publication Reject Corporate Left-Wing Journalism
[Support What We Do](https://substack.com/redirect/a238e472-9689-4f27-94ca-50acdcb856c8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
* * *
# Gold and Silver both shatter epic records as prices spiral upwards
As economic turbulence grips global markets, **[gold and silver prices skyrocketed](https://substack.com/redirect/5d81967b-a82c-4b3d-8e37-dc786e8f6df7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** to unprecedented highs Monday, with gold topping $4,445 per ounce and silver hitting $69 amid fiscal deficits and investor hedging.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5d81967b-a82c-4b3d-8e37-dc786e8f6df7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Yearly Gains Surge Dramatically** : Gold prices climbed nearly 70% since January, while silver doubled that with a 128% increase, outpacing broader market trends.
* **Expert Sees Monetary Hedge** : Matthew McLennan emphasizes gold's revival as a safeguard against outsized deficits in major economies like the U.S. and China.
* **Miners ' Shares Jump Premarket**: U.S.-listed gold and silver mining stocks rose, including a 2.7% ETF gain, reflecting defensive portfolio shifts.
* **Inflation Concerns Loom Ahead** : Market focus is shifting to wage inflation and Fed independence in the new year, potentially sustaining precious metals' upward trajectory.

* * *
* * *
**[Together with PolitiBrawl Shop](https://substack.com/redirect/1adcf904-ed42-40b7-b570-f6ad8cc5f15b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

Made from 100% durable polyester, this flag is designed to withstand the elements while maintaining vibrant colors and high visibility. With its double-sided design, you can showcase it's message on both sides, ensuring that it looks great from any angle.
[Order your "Jolly Donald" flag today](https://substack.com/redirect/9a0cc6c0-53bb-4b58-8f94-27dbd6ba85eb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
* * *
# Copper skyrockets toward $12,000 milestone
Copper prices **[hit a fresh record Monday,](https://substack.com/redirect/41f9a674-27fa-4e42-98de-e570ff1b35e7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** nearing $12,000 per ton on the London Metal Exchange, as banks predict even higher gains fueled by global supply shortages and a U.S. stockpiling rush to dodge potential tariffs.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/41f9a674-27fa-4e42-98de-e570ff1b35e7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Record Annual Gains Achieved** : Copper's value soared nearly 40% in 2025, its biggest yearly jump since 2009, amid trade turmoil and bullish long-term demand outlooks.
* **Mine Outages Fuel Frenzy** : Unplanned disruptions at mines, coupled with surging AI infrastructure needs, drove investors to pile into futures and mining stocks despite production setbacks.
* **Banks Issue Bold Predictions** : Citigroup forecasts prices reaching $13,000 per ton by Q2 2026, while Goldman Sachs names copper its top metal pick for the year ahead.
* **Smelters Face Severe Squeeze** : Annual ore contracts set processing fees at zero dollars per ton, the lowest ever, prompting shutdowns and heightening refined metal supply strains.

* * *
* * *
# Oracle's AI debt spiral fuels bubble frenzy
Amid investor **[jitters over unproven AI payoffs,](https://substack.com/redirect/71cdfaa1-9ce7-4a3d-8166-67a7ee844ea6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Oracle's stock has cratered more than 40% from its September peak, symbolizing broader fears of a tech bubble bursting under mounting leverage and hazy returns.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/71cdfaa1-9ce7-4a3d-8166-67a7ee844ea6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Stargate venture sparks surge** : Oracle kicked off 2025 with a $500 billion US AI infrastructure commitment alongside OpenAI and SoftBank, announced by President Trump, propelling shares upward and briefly crowning Larry Ellison the world's richest.
* **Earnings hype fades fast** : June and September reports touted AI deals projecting $166 billion in cloud revenue by 2030, but shifting sentiment erased gains despite a 15% yearly stock rise.
* **Debt issuance alarms markets** : Oracle floated nearly $26 billion in bonds this year, swelling total debt 40% to $124 billion while cash outflows jumped to $10 billion, widening credit default swap spreads to 2009 highs.
* **Off-balance risks mount** : An SEC filing disclosed $248 billion in future data center lease commitments from 2026-2028, heightening analyst warnings about leveraged AI pursuits threatening financial stability.

* * *
* * *
# Nvidia's H200 chips to head to China under new Trump policy
Nvidia plans to kick off **[shipments of its high-powered H200](https://substack.com/redirect/9ae0d707-9132-4f3e-aa47-243bb3d2f805?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** AI chips to Chinese clients by mid-February, leveraging the Trump administration's policy U-turn on export restrictions, amid lingering uncertainties over Beijing's final approval.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9ae0d707-9132-4f3e-aa47-243bb3d2f805?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Initial Shipment Volumes Detailed** : Nvidia expects to deliver 5,000 to 10,000 chip modules from existing stock, equating to 40,000 to 80,000 H200 units before the Lunar New Year.
* **New Production Capacity Timeline** : Orders for freshly manufactured H200 chips will become available starting in the second quarter of 2026.
* **Superior AI Performance Highlighted** : The H200 provides roughly six times the capability of Nvidia's downgraded H20 chip tailored for the Chinese market.
* **Potential Regulatory Conditions Discussed** : Beijing is weighing requirements for buyers to pair H200 purchases with a specified ratio of domestic-made chips.

* * *
* * *
# Waymo robotaxis stall in blackout chaos
A massive power outage sparked by a substation fire left dozens of Waymo's driverless **[robotaxis stalled amid San Francisco's gridlocked streets](https://substack.com/redirect/48378f43-93a0-4729-9b61-634abed235f5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Saturday, forcing a temporary service halt before resuming Sunday after city coordination.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/48378f43-93a0-4729-9b61-634abed235f5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Substation Fire Ignites Crisis** : A blaze at a PG&E facility caused widespread damage, initially cutting power to 130,000 customers and lingering for over 21,000 into Sunday morning across neighborhoods like the Presidio and Golden Gate Park.
* **Vehicles Treat Signals Cautiously** : Waymo cars handled dark intersections as four-way stops but lingered longer due to massive congestion, with social media videos capturing them halted in traffic lanes.
* **Musk Highlights Tesla Edge** : Elon Musk noted on X that Tesla's supervised robotaxi service remained operational, as it requires human drivers and lacks permits for fully driverless ops in California.
* **Broader AV Challenges Exposed** : The incident underscores urban infrastructure vulnerabilities for autonomous vehicles, fueling public fears and calls for regulatory limits on robotaxi fleets in cities.

* * *
* * *
# Musk's wealth doubles rivals as Tesla soars
Elon Musk's net worth **[skyrocketed to $681 billion,](https://substack.com/redirect/86bd0a0e-4f66-483c-baff-2efdb35d0b6a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** more than double Google co-founder Larry Page's $249 billion, fueled by Tesla's record stock surge amid robotaxi testing breakthroughs and a paused California sales suspension.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/86bd0a0e-4f66-483c-baff-2efdb35d0b6a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Tesla Stock Hits Peak:** Shares reached a new record closing high this week, climbing to yearly highs after announcements on unsupervised robotaxi trials.
* **Rivals Trail Far Behind:** Jeff Bezos holds $239 billion, Sergey Brin $229.9 billion, and Larry Ellison $229.6 billion, per Forbes' real-time rankings.
* **DMV Eases Restrictions:** California regulators halted a 30-day Tesla sales ban over alleged misleading Autopilot and Full Self-Driving marketing.

* * *

Oracle's AI debt spiral fuels bubble frenzy Amid investor Oracle's stock has cratered more than 40% from its September peak, symbolizing broader fears of a tech bubble bursting under mounting leverage and hazy returns. | | ---|---|--- Stargate venture sparks surge : Oracle kicked off 2025 with a $500 billion US AI infrastructure commitment alongside OpenAI and SoftBank, announced by President Trump, propelling shares upward and briefly crowning Larry Ellison the world's richest. Earnings hype fades fast : June and September reports touted AI deals projecting $166 billion in cloud revenue by 2030, but shifting sentiment erased gains despite a 15% yearly stock rise. Debt issuance alarms markets : Oracle floated nearly $26 billion in bonds this year, swelling total debt 40% to $124 billion while cash outflows jumped to $10 billion, widening credit default swap spreads to 2009 highs. Off-balance risks mount : An SEC filing disclosed $248 billion in future data center lease commitments from 2026-2028, heightening analyst warnings about leveraged AI pursuits threatening financial stability. Nvidia's H200 chips to head to China under new Trump policy Nvidia plans to kick off AI chips to Chinese clients by mid-February, leveraging the Trump administration's policy U-turn on export restrictions, amid lingering uncertainties over Beijing's final approval. | | ---|---|--- Initial Shipment Volumes Detailed : Nvidia expects to deliver 5,000 to 10,000 chip modules from existing stock, equating to 40,000 to 80,000 H200 units before the Lunar New Year. New Production Capacity Timeline : Orders for freshly manufactured H200 chips will become available starting in the second quarter of 2026. Superior AI Performance Highlighted : The H200 provides roughly six times the capability of Nvidia's downgraded H20 chip tailored for the Chinese market. Potential Regulatory Conditions Discussed : Beijing is weighing requirements for buyers to pair H200 purchases with a specified ratio of domestic-made chips. Waymo robotaxis stall in blackout chaos A massive power outage sparked by a substation fire left dozens of Waymo's driverless Saturday, forcing a temporary service halt before resuming Sunday after city coordination. | | ---|---|--- Substation Fire Ignites Crisis : A blaze at a PG&E facility caused widespread damage, initially cutting power to 130,000 customers and lingering for over 21,000 into Sunday morning across neighborhoods like the Presidio and Golden Gate Park. Vehicles Treat Signals Cautiously : Waymo cars handled dark intersections as four-way stops but lingered longer due to massive congestion, with social media videos capturing them halted in traffic lanes. Musk Highlights Tesla Edge : Elon Musk noted on X that Tesla's supervised robotaxi service remained operational, as it requires human drivers and lacks permits for fully driverless ops in California. Broader AV Challenges Exposed : The incident underscores urban infrastructure vulnerabilities for autonomous vehicles, fueling public fears and calls for regulatory limits on robotaxi fleets in cities. Musk's wealth doubles rivals as Tesla soars Elon Musk's net worth more than double Google co-founder Larry Page's $249 billion, fueled by Tesla's record stock surge amid robotaxi testing breakthroughs and a paused California sales suspension. | | ---|---|--- Tesla Stock Hits Peak: Shares reached a new record closing high this week, climbing to yearly highs after announcements on unsupervised robotaxi trials. Rivals Trail Far Behind: Jeff Bezos holds $239 billion, Sergey Brin $229.9 billion, and Larry Ellison $229.6 billion, per Forbes' real-time rankings. DMV Eases Restrictions: California regulators halted a 30-day Tesla sales ban over alleged misleading Autopilot and Full Self-Driving marketing. The Capitalist is a reader-supported publication Reject Corporate Left Wing Journalism You're currently a free subscriber to . For the full experience, | | | | | | | (C) 2025 The Capitalist 548 Market Street PMB 72296, San Francisco, CA 94104 ? ?

I was proud of George’s win back in November 2024. He was one of just a handful of Democrats who flipped Republican-held seats in a tough election year.

He did it as a true advocate for our community – as someone who served as NASA Chief of Staff under Obama where he received its highest award for distinguished service. As someone who created hundreds of jobs in the Antelope Valley, founded an organization focused on wildfire research, and did it all as a devoted husband and father.

I’m even more proud of the swift action he’s taken in the House. Days after he was sworn in, Southern California faced the worst wildfires in its history – and George was immediately back in our area advocating for aid.

Looking forward, this seat is one of the few that can decide House control in next year’s midterm elections – and with it, Democrats are much more likely to win the majority and provide real oversight to this administration.

It’s why George is already on the receiving end of Republican attacks, and it’s why this FEC quarterly deadline is key. George’s fundraising numbers will be public for everyone from our allies to our opponents to see.

name: Voter Action Project
subject: More attacks on another segment of voters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
TPM: Inside the GOP’s Assault on Youth Voting Rights [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=122225_2&amount=25]
Team, we'll be blunt: The lies about a “ stolen ” 2020 election are still being used to justify “ election integrity ” efforts that are stripping Americans, particularly certain vulnerable populations, of their fundamental democratic rights.
We've seen this in the dismantling of the Voting Rights Act (VRA), it is part of the ongoing hyper-partisan redistricting efforts across the country, but the least visible front is the widespread assault on youth voting rights.
New “ voter integrity ” laws have hit college-age voters particularly hard across the country, but especially in states like North Carolina, Indiana, and Ohio. Cleta Mitchell, a lawyer, fundraiser, and Trump ally, has gone state to state, spreading the lies about the 2020 presidential election and calling for banning voting on college campuses, rolling back same-day voter registration, and ending the practice in some states of automatically mailing ballots to registered voters.
These are all attacks on youth voting. It's clear that opponents of voting rights see suppressing the youth vote as a key pillar in their attempts to hold onto power in perpetuity.
We need to spread the word and protect our fundamental right to vote regardless of age, but the corporate media isn't paying attention. Will you pitch in with $25 or whatever you can today to help us spread the word and fight back against these suppressive laws? >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=122225_2&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=122225_2&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=122225_2&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=122225_2&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=122225_2&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=122225_2&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=122225_2&amount=35]
Youth voting rights were part of the post-WWII expansion of voter inclusion and were realized through the 1971 passage of the 26th Amendment, which lowered the voting age from 21 to 18 and banned discrimination based on age in ballot access.
Even President Richard Nixon declared that “ America’s new voters, America’s young generation ” would bring “ moral courage ” and “ a spirit of high idealism ” to the country. It seems vengeful partisans in his party would rather win elections than uphold the ideals of our democracy.
These new state laws restrict basic election modernization tools that a new generation of voters expects, such as online voter registration or curing — essentially correcting minor errors — on vote-by-mail ballots. These bills ban polling places on college campuses and prevent voters from using their student I.D. — with their picture on it — as proof of identity. And some states are even considering physical residency time requirements, which would suppress college students who live both at school and at home with their parents.
Opponents of voting rights aren't going to stop their work to suppress their way to victory until we make them stop. Support our efforts to protect our fundamental right to vote with $25 or whatever you can today >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=122225_2&amount=25]
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=122225_2&amount=20]

clean_body: Voter Action Project [] TPM: Inside the GOP’s Assault on Youth Voting Rights [] Team, we'll be blunt: The lies about a “ stolen ” 2020 election are still being used to justify “ election integrity ” efforts that are stripping Americans, particularly certain vulnerable populations, of their fundamental democratic rights. We've seen this in the dismantling of the Voting Rights Act (VRA), it is part of the ongoing hyper-partisan redistricting efforts across the country, but the least visible front is the widespread assault on youth voting rights. New “ voter integrity ” laws have hit college-age voters particularly hard across the country, but especially in states like North Carolina, Indiana, and Ohio. Cleta Mitchell, a lawyer, fundraiser, and Trump ally, has gone state to state, spreading the lies about the 2020 presidential election and calling for banning voting on college campuses, rolling back same-day voter registration, and ending the practice in some states of automatically mailing ballots to registered voters. These are all attacks on youth voting. It's clear that opponents of voting rights see suppressing the youth vote as a key pillar in their attempts to hold onto power in perpetuity. We need to spread the word and protect our fundamental right to vote regardless of age, but the corporate media isn't paying attention. Will you pitch in with $25 or whatever you can today to help us spread the word and fight back against these suppressive laws? >> [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [] OTHER AMOUNT [] Youth voting rights were part of the post-WWII expansion of voter inclusion and were realized through the 1971 passage of the 26th Amendment, which lowered the voting age from 21 to 18 and banned discrimination based on age in ballot access. Even President Richard Nixon declared that “ America’s new voters, America’s young generation ” would bring “ moral courage ” and “ a spirit of high idealism ” to the country. It seems vengeful partisans in his party would rather win elections than uphold the ideals of our democracy. These new state laws restrict basic election modernization tools that a new generation of voters expects, such as online voter registration or curing — essentially correcting minor errors — on vote-by-mail ballots. These bills ban polling places on college campuses and prevent voters from using their student I.D. — with their picture on it — as proof of identity. And some states are even considering physical residency time requirements, which would suppress college students who live both at school and at home with their parents. Opponents of voting rights aren't going to stop their work to suppress their way to victory until we make them stop. Support our efforts to protect our fundamental right to vote with $25 or whatever you can today >> [] [] [] [] [] [] Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [] Donate Now [] Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003. | | I have been laser-focused on the families of the 5th District. From addressing the skyrocketing health care costs to fighting to end food insecurity, our community needs support and leadership more than ever before. Between our assistance events in places like Danbury and votes in Washington, I have to tell you, _fundraising has been the last thing on my mind._ But in a district as competitive as ours, we need to be raising a certain amount each month to stay competitive and ward off Republican opponents looking to flip this seat. **[So I wanted to personally reach out and ask: Will you pitch in $5 right now to help me keep up the fight for the 5th District? clean_body: | | I have been laser-focused on the families of the 5th District. From addressing the skyrocketing health care costs to fighting to end food insecurity, our community needs support and leadership more than ever before. Between our assistance events in places like Danbury and votes in Washington, I have to tell you, fundraising has been the last thing on my mind. But in a district as competitive as ours, we need to be raising a certain amount each month to stay competitive and ward off Republican opponents looking to flip this seat. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = Right now, Democrats are seeing unprecedented levels of momentum, and we have a real chance at flipping the House blue next year. If we win, we can undo the damage of the Trump administration and deliver relief for the families that need support. But in order to get there, we have to protect every seat we currently hold, including mine right here in Connecticut. We know that the big Republican donors working to expand the narrow Republican majority will spend big in any race they see as vulnerable, so we cannot show any signs of weakness. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = | = | = | = | = Thanks for your support, Jahana Hayes | | About Jahana** Jahana Hayes proudly represents Connecticut's 5th Congressional district. name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: On behalf of Judge Chris Taylor, I’m humbly asking
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Taylor for Justice
body:
# [](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/18?refcode=em20251222-934&t=1&akid=934%2E294397%2EKp0yBO)
[](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20251222_1_ak.Xhkqr1&amount=10&refcode=em20251222-934&t=3&akid=934%2E294397%2EKp0yBO)
Before the holidays, I wanted to reach out with a quick, but important ask.
Judge Chris Taylor is running for the Wisconsin Supreme Court at a moment when so much is at stake — from reproductive healthcare access, to workers’ rights, to the future of our democracy.
**And at the end of this month, Judge Chris Taylor’s campaign faces a major public fundraising deadline.**
After December 31, everything her campaign has raised will be made public — and you can be sure right-wing special interests will be paying close attention.
They’re looking to see whether this campaign has the grassroots strength to stand up to their dark money spending.
I know Judge Chris Taylor’s campaign does, and I know supporters like you are the reason why.
[**If you’re able, can you pitch in $10 before the holidays to help Judge Chris Taylor report the strongest numbers possible after December 31?**](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20251222_1_ak.Xhkqr1&amount=10&refcode=em20251222-934&t=4&akid=934%2E294397%2EKp0yBO)
**[Donate $10 ››](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20251222_1_ak.Xhkqr1&amount=10&refcode=em20251222-934&t=23&akid=934%2E294397%2EKp0yBO)**
Thank you for everything you do to support leaders who put fairness, integrity, and justice first.
Happy holidays,
Tammy
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_jct_footer?refcode=em20251222-934&t=24&refcode2=934_294397_Kp0yBO&akid=934%2E294397%2EKp0yBO)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=25&akid=934%2E294397%2EKp0yBO)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=934%2E294397%2EKp0yBO)

Email us: [info@chrisforjustice.com](info@chrisforjustice.com)

PO Box 1921
Madison, WI 53701

name: Abdul El-Sayed
subject: None of it matters if people never hear from us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abdul for U
body:
[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=&t=1001&akid=1458%2E251025%2Ek4GS89 ]Abdul for US Senate [ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/30?refcode=&t=1002&akid=1458%2E251025%2Ek4GS89 ]Abdul for US Senate

Hi Peter, did you see what our MAGA opponent, Mike Rogers, has been
up to?

He just released his first attack ad targeting us, and if I’m being
honest, it was... something. It opens with a family on a couch who look like
they were told, “Just act natural!” and immediately forgot how.

[ A ]A GIF from Mike Rogers' ad, which shows a family looking uncomfortable

And then it flashes to me, made to look like a villain in a low-budget
movie.

[ A ]A screenshot from the ad, showing Abdul in front of a storm around the
Capitol

But behind the wackiness hides a really interesting observation: Mike
Rogers is terrified of running on his actual record.

Because what did he choose to defend in that ad? His support for Donald
Trump’s Big Ugly Bill — the disastrous piece of legislation that:

* Cut healthcare for 15 million people
* Slashed Medicare by $500 billion
* Eliminated 760,000 manufacturing and energy jobs
* Put hundreds of rural hospitals at risk of closing

All so that billionaires could walk away with massive tax breaks. That’s
what Mike Rogers is trying to distract from with this cartoonish attack
ad.

Mike Rogers is banking on the hope that voters won’t remember what he did.
Our job is to make sure every voter in Michigan understands that.

And the good news is, we have the winning message to do it.

Because when we tell people the truth about what our campaign is fighting
for...

* Getting money out of politics
* Putting more money in your pocket
* Passing Medicare for All

...you feel the energy change. That’s what a real winning message sounds
like.

But none of it matters if people never hear from us.

Mike Rogers has wealthy donors, corporate PACs, and the old guard behind
him. They can blanket the airwaves with attack ads like this one and drown
out the truth if they want to.

If we’re going to reach voters with our message through ads, canvassing,
digital organizing, and every tool we have... we need the resources to do
it.

That’s why the upcoming FEC deadline is so important. If we don’t hit our
$250,000 digital goal before December 31, we simply cannot reach the
number of voters we need — and Mike Rogers will define our campaign for
us.

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20251222-1-ak.okdekX&amount=10&refcode=em20251222-1454&t=1004&akid=1458%2E251025%2Ek4GS89 ]Peter, will
you chip in $10 or whatever you can today to help us hit our
goal and make sure voters hear our campaign’s message?

[ https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=em-ms-aes-20251222-1-ak.okdekX&amount=10&refcode=em20251222-1454&t=1023&akid=1458%2E251025%2Ek4GS89 ]Donate $10 ››

Your friend in the fight,

Abdul

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. To contribute via check, please address it to Abdul for U.S. Senate, PO Box 126, St. Clair Shores, MI 48080.

Receive Fewer Emails: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=1024&akid=1458%2E251025%2Ek4GS89
Update Your Information: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/signup/update-your-information
Unsubscribe: https://act.abdulformichigan.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1025&akid=1458%2E251025%2Ek4GS89

Email us: info@abdulformichigan.com

Paid for by Abdul for U.S. Senate

name: April Christenson
subject: Give now: What can we do without a living planet?
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/t28-fgcXRUmjEwNoP96SgQ2?am=50&contactdata=WKzkFH0eGDRgjp8tIcUIyPhTDKn1djVPRiBx4J0G2JsPkHqlDdQeV0xf3v2HipddiSYlvv13ET12GwXgdEgloZ4eSS494Jp9Ki6YS01TUveuLxX7+ChQ2jWvW8Y3lPUD [https://secure.ngpvan.com/t28-fgcXRUmjEwNoP96SgQ2?am=50&contactdata=WKzkFH0eGDRgjp8tIcUIyPhTDKn1djVPRiBx4J0G2JsPkHqlDdQeV0xf3v2HipddiSYlvv13ET12GwXgdEgloZ4eSS494Jp9Ki6YS01TUveuLxX7+ChQ2jWvW8Y3lPUD]
Dear Peter,
I’ve been on staff at OLCV for a decade now. During my time here I’ve built strong relationships with our donors, and I can confidently say that our OLCV members are the most passionate and committed allies. By providing our organization with reliable funding, OLCV members are the foundation for all that we do to protect Oregon’s flowing rivers, fresh forest air, glorious mountains, and all of the wildlife and people that call this beloved place home.
You too can make all the difference by making a generous end-of-year gift now, ensuring that we have the resources to continue strong into 2026. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/t28-fgcXRUmjEwNoP96SgQ2]
Make a gift [https://secure.ngpvan.com/t28-fgcXRUmjEwNoP96SgQ2?am=50&contactdata=WKzkFH0eGDRgjp8tIcUIyPhTDKn1djVPRiBx4J0G2JsPkHqlDdQeV0xf3v2HipddiSYlvv13ET12GwXgdEgloZ4eSS494Jp9Ki6YS01TUveuLxX7+ChQ2jWvW8Y3lPUD]
I know that there is much on your mind this past year. But as our donors know, nothing else matters without a living planet. OLCV is here to help voters identify the candidates who are most likely to take us into a liveable future, and to hold those accountable who aren’t.
Eve Heidtmann from Portland, has been a member of OLCV for over 45 years. While in conversation with Eve about her membership, she told me:
What could be more important than the future of life on Earth? Decisions made by elected officials determine what will be left for all children and all species. OLCV helps us find and support the candidates who are most committed to saving habitats, climate, air and water.
Eve chooses to give to OLCV year after year because of the impactful personal connections she’s made to our staff and members, and for the accessible and straight information that OLCV provides voters with. Donors like Eve are what keeps OLCV alive.
Make a gift [https://secure.ngpvan.com/t28-fgcXRUmjEwNoP96SgQ2?am=50&contactdata=WKzkFH0eGDRgjp8tIcUIyPhTDKn1djVPRiBx4J0G2JsPkHqlDdQeV0xf3v2HipddiSYlvv13ET12GwXgdEgloZ4eSS494Jp9Ki6YS01TUveuLxX7+ChQ2jWvW8Y3lPUD]
If you too love Oregon and our planet, please consider making a generous gift to OLCV now, so that we can keep fighting to ensure a liveable future for all. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/t28-fgcXRUmjEwNoP96SgQ2]
Sincerely,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AVLCV/1/70877/images/April%27s%20Signature.png]
April Christenson (she/her)
OLCV Development Director
P.S.: We are in the big push for end of year fundraising. If you would no longer like to receive emails related to end of year fundraising, please fill out this form here to opt-out [https://secure.everyaction.com/c2_U_ki-NEyU8Gdkttquug2] but still remain on our general email list!
https://www.facebook.com/oregonlcv [https://www.facebook.com/oregonlcv] https://bsky.app/profile/olcv.org [https://bsky.app/profile/olcv.org] https://www.instagram.com/olcv/?next=%2F [https://www.instagram.com/olcv/?next=%2F] https://x.com/OLCV [https://x.com/OLCV]

Oregon League of Conservation Voters
1110 SE Alder Suite 220
Portland, OR 97214
United States

Redwood National Park. Photo by Max Forster

| | Dear Peter,
---
There’s nothing quite like a winter walk through a redwood grove, with tall trees shimmering with snow, crisp air, and the exhilarating feeling of being part of something bigger. We’re grateful for these snowy sanctuaries that uplift and inspire us. And we're grateful for your support in protecting forests, restoring habitats, and strengthening communities.Though the days are short as we pass the solstice, winter offers us space to slow down and recharge. To inspire your own moments of renewal, here are a few of our favorite images of winter magic. Best enjoyed with a mug of hot cocoa.

clean_body: Here are a few of our favorite winter images, perfect for setting an inspiring solstice mood| | | | | | | Redwood National Park. Photo by Max Forster | | Dear Peter, There’s nothing quite like a winter walk through a redwood grove, with tall trees shimmering with snow, crisp air, and the exhilarating feeling of being part of something bigger. We’re grateful for these snowy sanctuaries that uplift and inspire us. And we're grateful for your support in protecting forests, restoring habitats, and strengthening communities.Though the days are short as we pass the solstice, winter offers us space to slow down and recharge. To inspire your own moments of renewal, here are a few of our favorite images of winter magic. Best enjoyed with a mug of hot cocoa. | | Alder Creek. Photo by Roy E. Williams II Lady Bird Johnson Grove, Redwood National Park. Photo by Max Forster Sequoia National Park. Photo by Steve/AdobeStock Gray fox. Photo by dfriend150/AdobeStock Alder Creek. Photo by Max Forster Alder Creek. Photo by Victoria Reeder Stay cozy, Save the Redwoods League | | Save the Redwoods League 111 Sutter Street, 11th Floor San Francisco, CA 94104 United States CONNECT WITH US | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- |

name: Dan Goldman
subject: My bill would make billionaires pay their fair share
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
|
#
---
Peter, In the richest country in the world, the dramatic increase in wealth inequality that we’ve seen over the last thirty years is shocking and unacceptable. **A primary reason is because the wealthiest billionaires pay almost**** _nothing_****in taxes.** According to a 2021 ProPublica investigation, the 25 wealthiest people in America pay an average effective tax rate of 3.4%. Elon Musk pays 3% and Jeff Bezos pays 1%. How? Instead of selling their Tesla or Amazon stock and paying capital gains tax, they borrow billions of dollars against their stock — and pay no tax on the loans. A system where working New Yorkers pay their taxes on every paycheck while the wealthiest among us pay almost no taxes is rigged against working families. **That ends now. It’s time for the ultra-wealthy to pay their fair share.** My ROBINHOOD Act would close this loophole by imposing a 20% federal tax on these loans — the same tax as capital gains. It’s estimated that this new tax could generate at least _$276 billion_ over 10 years. That’s enough money to fully fund universal childcare for all kids under 5 or restore the American Rescue Plan’s childcare investments that cut child poverty by more than 40%. [**We have to act now to address the wealth inequality crisis. If you agree, will you sign on now as a supporter of my new ROBINHOOD Act?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121797055/590610109/858078164?refcode=AU_DSG_EG_GEN_PET_NO_20251222_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTBmM2FhNy02Y2RmLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExZWM4YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yQuOeBePWA5OFmvU4ySoDtBU2u7qhFuvGeur5pKdiwU=&emci=ba90a84b-66df-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&emdi=610f3aa7-6cdf-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&ceid=13556823) | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121797056/590610110/858078164?refcode=AU_DSG_EG_GEN_PET_NO_20251222_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTBmM2FhNy02Y2RmLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExZWM4YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yQuOeBePWA5OFmvU4ySoDtBU2u7qhFuvGeur5pKdiwU=&emci=ba90a84b-66df-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&emdi=610f3aa7-6cdf-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&ceid=13556823)

|
Peter,
The holidays are a beautiful time, but for grassroots campaigns like ours, they are absolutely brutal.
Between travel and gift buying, donations have hit a major bump in the road:
---
| | [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001iOy8lqEVlkFO_LxuKVvYjTgxVNKsqj7v-aU_VYTokJgWAiZEX22zOmtgHI9pthtUPvORWLO-zEzbfDmWtkH3HWc13Swsx3-GayedlbW-d7vFk2PNaLSc5NNvQRUClzfXDWMljFdjk4OfyzGAk26R3GmoGe8QAhbS8myjN8MFmBreUdH7_G6W3yZ_Ne4ptxleS5YZELxaEYwTHAFBWD4pfbfqBEADpFqTkXn0Lvguf3c=&c=gqQK9UuiBdo_5BTH3mfF_94vOaj8Mug_IeSg4ziiuqFoKm5K4tsXrQ==&ch=HAa232yPey3_4ckffcfyLqCM22J4QA9fQNv3s61GSs55Fe3-sUbMoQ==)
---
| Our fundraising just got run over by a reindeer.
This slump is coming at the worst possible time--December 31st is our end-of-the quarter deadline.
On New Year's Eve, our books close. After that, our fundraising total for the last three months becomes public record. It is the single most important metric used by the press, potential endorsers, and the establishment to measure the strength of our campaign.
If we post a weak number, the critics will say our movement has lost its steam. They'll use it as an excuse to write us off.
We can't let the holiday rush knock us off course. We've worked too hard and built too much momentum to be on the sidelines now. We need to show the world that our supporters are still in this fight--even when the reindeer are out.
[Will you rush a donation of $25, $10, or even $5 right now to help us stay on track before the December 31st deadline?](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001iOy8lqEVlkFO_LxuKVvYjTgxVNKsqj7v-aU_VYTokJgWAiZEX22zOmtgHI9pthtUlDGscGrkEnwydRG9E8X0FkAUwjLnUCkxGlG-GblZ37qQWbiWZXgTH5F5sZhgPRwzWNd1EjwmHbsS5_-jzTFhhxP0xdSfwO0DqDINlIWtoEqvfZAwxl8nJmX6cFYKvkKV-BhlnijCrL0B8Z_XtJ9rxppyMw72lTl6EuKoFZ5B49A=&c=gqQK9UuiBdo_5BTH3mfF_94vOaj8Mug_IeSg4ziiuqFoKm5K4tsXrQ==&ch=HAa232yPey3_4ckffcfyLqCM22J4QA9fQNv3s61GSs55Fe3-sUbMoQ==)

clean_body: | | | | | == | Peter, The holidays are a beautiful time, but for grassroots campaigns like ours, they are absolutely brutal. Between travel and gift buying, donations have hit a major bump in the road: | | == | Our fundraising just got run over by a reindeer. This slump is coming at the worst possible time--December 31st is our end-of-the quarter deadline. On New Year's Eve, our books close. After that, our fundraising total for the last three months becomes public record. It is the single most important metric used by the press, potential endorsers, and the establishment to measure the strength of our campaign. If we post a weak number, the critics will say our movement has lost its steam. They'll use it as an excuse to write us off. We can't let the holiday rush knock us off course. We've worked too hard and built too much momentum to be on the sidelines now. We need to show the world that our supporters are still in this fight--even when the reindeer are out. == | If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | == | We don't have billionaire dark-money groups to bail us out. We only have you. Let's finish this holiday season stronger than ever. Team Bushra | | | | == | Mail checks to: Bushra for Congress PO Box 911 Skokie, IL 60076 | | == | | | | Bushra for Congress | PO Box 911 | Skokie, IL 60076 US | |

name: Wes Moore
subject: I have a quick question
body:
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=1100%2E1086043%2EFOcYml)
Hi Peter, it’s Wes. I have a quick question:
**[Will you chip in to support our re-election campaign right now?](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-202601222-1.DwCfBg&refcode=em-202601222&t=2&akid=1100%2E1086043%2EFOcYml)**
I know that’s direct — but your grassroots support is so important.
We’re building a Maryland where we leave no one behind, and we’re facing an uphill battle with the federal government shutdown and the Trump administration coming after Democratic governors like me.
**But I won’t let that stop me from delivering on that mission.** I’ve got a calendar on my desk that reminds me of how many days I have left in this term to make progress for Marylanders, and I’m not wasting a single one.
**[I need your help to stay in that fight. Will you chip in $5, $25, $50 or whatever you can today so we can win the progress Maryland needs?](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-202601222-1.DwCfBg&refcode=em-202601222&t=3&akid=1100%2E1086043%2EFOcYml)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-202601222-1.DwCfBg&amount=5&refcode=em-202601222&t=22&akid=1100%2E1086043%2EFOcYml)**
Thank you for being a key supporter of our movement, Peter.
Elevate,
Wes
[](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/417?c0=wes-em-202601222-1.DwCfBg&refcode=em-202601222&t=23&akid=1100%2E1086043%2EFOcYml)

* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-202601222&t=24&refcode2=1100_1086043_FOcYml&akid=1100%2E1086043%2EFOcYml)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=25&akid=1100%2E1086043%2EFOcYml)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.wesmoore.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=1100%2E1086043%2EFOcYml)

Email us: [info@wesmoore.com](mailto:info@wesmoore.com)
BY AUTHORITY: WES MOORE FOR MARYLAND, MARY TYDINGS, TREASURER

body:
| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/kevinformi/kevin-kijewski-for-michigan-ag-mid-december-update-4741180?e=4b10910eed)

| | | | | |
# Mid-December Update from Kevin
---
| | Dear Friend and Patriot,
Merry Christmas! As we approach celebrating the season with our family and friends, I want to thank you for your unwavering support in our campaign for Michigan's next Attorney General. Your prayers, encouragement, volunteer efforts, and generous contributions are building the momentum we need to restore public safety, defend our constitutional rights, end lawfare, and secure our elections in 2026.
After our campaign’s meeting with the White House and over 15 Republican AGs last week, there has been a whirlwind of connecting with patriots like you across Michigan during this joyful time:
✅ I [spoke at the Michigan District 2 Republican Committee's Ugly Sweater Party](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=a507160014&e=4b10910eed) in Belding, where the energy was electric and the applause thunderous as I outlined our plan to make Michigan safe and red again:
---
| | | | | | | | | | [|
---](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=c28154e54c&e=4b10910eed)
| | | | | | | | | | | | ✅ Appeared on the [Steve Gruber Show discussing the latest revelations from the House Oversight hearing to discuss MI AG Dana Nessel](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=cf8f40b873&e=4b10910eed) repeatedly breaching ethical "conflict walls" in cases tied to her political allies and even her own spouse - personally contacting Jocelyn Benson to pull back a criminal referral involving dark money and Nessel's wife. [Click below to watch](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=b500e6d5dd&e=4b10910eed):
---

They reflect that more people across the state see the urgency of this race and want real leadership.
* Dr. Dawn Asper, President-elect, Republican Women's Federation of Michigan
* Deborah Bloomfield, Wayne County
* Ben Hansel, Vice Chairman, Michigan College Republicans

| | **Let’s Keep Winning!**
[ We've also celebrated key victories, like the failure of the ranked-choice voting ballot effort for 2026](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=ce8179f156&e=4b10910eed) – a win for election integrity that keeps our system straightforward and trustworthy.
On the issues, I've continued highlighting the need for real change: from opposing soft-on-crime policies that endanger families, to [calling out sanctuary-style obstructions that put criminal aliens ahead of Michiganders,](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=d0508bc24d&e=4b10910eed) to [protecting American workers from discrimination](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=c5925e7358&e=4b10910eed) and f[ighting government overreach like massive data centers draining our resources](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=01c7a75e5c&e=4b10910eed).
With President Trump's administration going strong, 2026 is our year to partner with federal authorities, fully prosecute violent offenders, deport criminals, and put Michigan families first.
None of this would be possible without you. As we head into the new year, your continued support – whether through volunteering, spreading the word, or contributing – will help us build the strongest campaign to replace the radical status quo.
[Please consider a year-end donation to help us hit the ground running in 2026. Together, we'll make Michigan safe, prosperous, and red again!](https://kevinformi.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=39782b0ca6b504d2faad7a196&id=0b5c993478&e=4b10910eed)
Merry Christmas and Happy New Year to you and your families. God bless Michigan and the United States of America. As we close out 2025, I'm deeply grateful for patriots like you standing with us. Together, we'll restore trust, safety, and freedom in Michigan!
Very truly yours,Kevin Kijewski
Candidate for Michigan Attorney General

body:

| | **Musk Made History — Now Trump Is Making His Move**
---
| [ Trump's Next Move ](https://links.main.yourcapitalminds.com/u/click?_t=affa6bfca09a497f86454ba803e6a9a2&_m=2a02a0b3ac8f4a36888b0e38a201f478&_e=g5CLyt5cUyaKOoYebzxa-5lkGWI9_Uh1hm9MnMOFuI7r5geOXpr2bdTDNttjyABL6SJMdlttzyCvcPowIn6cR7UDioasRcCdnthFEFKhQC9-rPGoQoa4l-lNIBO0WT8llPDLPPYUXVAFRLpVmcHt0ztwt6INfVdyAaN6A1EYqCmqnSggtrxiy_iYJ1Y2jS-R3YdhYR212H5VsRslkKtLChQKwXkK0tLDmJHXJ-3pGYl_gCsmHy0Lb2C8fzcqCZam8jfZJXBcjdg3xoymqBcTIec2hnqruaS6yXd91ZypCf0cuIdVwxV74FKTJ6MQXVGCdItShl9pBJQXTMkldCxDFUjV_PHqmJWLXrqcWwyGGe-4i1phleAGp6uBiRh9sOvbiDnrfBxM26_IxUVxA-sxJb0xJGYk45t2DpMkzjkuLo2jgg_zOvTV5Tu6VRqsM2u1M0vzkB5yzvVnURVqLX6kW36XS88kaCGhRXCr729JidCdHb0uYLa2RfqVM2fMnNTK2B7rqJhn2a7Vy1lpOrS3EmBCgewpk7BdMHTiWaB2uLdt2vFBVMDlrqDuLycA8g-yq_dogqv5P18v_IwOR8J0mA%3D%3D)

| | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.
