clean_body: Elon Musk just received one of the biggest compensation deals in U.S. history — nearly $1 trillion.| | | | December 22 | | | | | Musk Made History — Now Trump Is Making His Move | | | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." name: Ryan Busse
subject: The Forest Service is under attack
body:
These guys just keep on coming

| [|
---](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/PzuLx6Pv5xZoIq8yyC16AQ~~/AAUS1hA~/WMMkyWK4wIJZAOEnCdBZf4ZS3oqyeC3e9i63rl7_WTL6rwZ4RtSDjvHLh10j9LueCHDAAzsL3TxB6fuy70A3Z4VPFpzmmbV8nt2fMD7XkTTWhc8WYmso2RFjm80UYZsk)
| | | | Peter, Donald Trump has handed the keys to 193 million acres of our national forests and grasslands—to a billionaire who’s spent years attacking, intimidating, and stealing from the Forest Service. Trump’s nominee to oversee the U.S. Forest Service, Idaho billionaire Michael Boren, has:
* **Illegally constructed a cabin** on public land and diverted a stream to it
* **Blocked** federal access roads
* **Built a runway and hangar** in protected wilderness, then sued locals who fought back
* **Buzzed Forest Service employees** with his personal helicopter to scare them off public trails

This man has no environmental background. No forestry credentials. All he has is loyalty to Donald Trump. Trump and Boren have a few things in common. They’re hostile to public lands, hate oversight, and want to pillage what belongs to all of us. He’s exactly the kind of lawless oligarch Trump and his MAGA goons want running our government. This isn’t just a bad appointment. It’s a coordinated looting of our public lands—and it’s only going to get worse unless we fight back. [**I’m asking you to donate to Public Land Warriors today to help us keep up the fight. To expose guys like Michael Boren, challenge MAGA’s public lands sabotage, and build a campaign to defeat the extremists enabling this theft.**](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/6ANsd_PMXXHx9YaFsi9dOQ~~/AAUS1hA~/dvv1vepxdWPIqt22scl7gfLkshdGg_AHMmk2ZJNM-6sR3wIBjAxYR14SHW1yqkzK1-nSFigc4siVW2JUjk5N9H1-pnLlVyIxhiAH4cokAqIChdqY_xqZ3qZY3MSqHtc3PYlqJPvhE7N8MDKkExx04SxF4dCC-U_UAWHVWv33FAdqTg02chv7ZRtrJnRfLdu2jsukU32YC-Qi7RabmdVmYM-dnpDiRn_QTWvSAHIoBGUh898wEChg9JB8bCVZ-23q) We can’t sit this one out. The Forest Service is being gutted. Nine regional offices— _including Montana’s_ —are on the chopping block. Thousands of career experts are about to be purged. And in their place? Billionaire bullies and Trump’s cronies. This is one more step toward the privatization of everything, **including your land.** We need to act. Loudly. Now. [**Chip in $5, $25, or whatever you can today to help us hold the line.**](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/-e52338YqfRh-cK4iLL2NA~~/AAUS1hA~/Kao_-tEMLDdhtg_5nprzWguARQ6BqYJgSAe6v_La5Ey9FEVQLIDSM6zxXMKsYF3dSbbXq13D0gRLFCixSlaWgDqRFaRpvZze7874EdshhiJr3zagHB4y7OSguArgmJKlgoaTRzxbz-EytSofdGh6q1x4rFgz9RY4qKH4R9oFFGvkjZIveed_Iy7d6sPcriAFuxtYZ12l61euL8qRqHkYzXnN7Xb3nWNBs0dLBtnkOaOa2ql3vTGFobQjMadkjbVT) For the land,
Ryan Busse **[**DONATE »** ](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/-oieli8B7p-yiztRMFW-0A~~/AAUS1hA~/TcgFzG4--m2l6Pu460Dy3xYfyV5tcn1uHuHzk8_O5PoEv90HE01wn-nIm4SvjKs6cL4K0Zz_urfC8GUdmed3CIgxq01Iz5bYDzAMVMepM3yECq7sfUJ2N2P8WdZ67DcdR_ENLXRMfwe1xU7SE5GzzXBMufxetOCPXRq8_PAM7j9VsMicP7yGYrZB5Wt77j-56IUCzcMG3t6e_jcU6Q-_BFPFdeaUoYzCgRjfbH93CT2DxxQs6LJZ8I4Si3iycLq3) ** **

name: Team Cori
subject: Cori won’t stop fighting
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori For Us
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251222_coridelivers_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251222_coridelivers_act]
Hi Peter,
In Congress, Cori secured over $2 billion for St. Louis, funding affordable housing, education, disaster relief, public transportation, and healthcare.
After years of relentless advocacy and collaboration with community voices, friends, and even people across the aisle, like Senator Josh Hawley, we are proud to see Cori’s efforts to decontaminate Coldwater Creek come to fruition. This is real progress for our neighborhoods and the people who live here.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251222_coridelivers_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251222_coridelivers_act]
Unfortunately, my opponent and his dark-money donors are attempting to overshadow Cori’s record of fighting for her community with misleading ads. They want you to believe that flashy slogans matter more than the tangible improvements families, communities, and district can feel today.
We know better. Cori has fought tirelessly for St. Louis, and she won’t stop now. But to finish this year strong and start 2026 with momentum, we need to show the GOP and their dark-money backers that real people power wins.
With only NINE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251222_coridelivers_act] days until our end-of-year FEC deadline, every donation counts.
Chip in $5, $10, or $25 today to help keep Cori’s message on the air, grow our movement, and make sure St. Louis continues to get leaders who actually deliver, not just talk. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251222_coridelivers_act]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?express_lane=true&amount=&refcode=x_251222_coridelivers_act] DONATE $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?express_lane=true&amount=&refcode=x_251222_coridelivers_act]

DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=x_251222_coridelivers_act] OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?express_lane_other=true&refcode=x_251222_coridelivers_act]
In solidarity,
Team Cori
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251222_coridelivers_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-25q4?refcode=x_251222_coridelivers_act] Cori Bush is a pastor, nurse, survivor, and formerly unhoused single mother of two who knows what it means to struggle and what it means to rise .
As a Congresswoman, she has always shown up when it’s hardest: securing disaster relief, lowering insulin costs, and delivering millions for our communities.
Across St. Louis, families are being priced out and pushed out. Cori Bush is fighting back for affordable housing, fair wages, and utilities as a human right. Be part of this people-first movement. Visit CoriBush.org [https://www.coribush.org] to learn more.

Everyone is watching us. **I really mean it:** Everyone is watching to see whether we will hit our $50,000 fundraising goal for the **final FEC deadline** before the midterm election year.
* **News outlets are watching us:** The amount of money we raise will indicate how strong this grassroots movement is — and how much momentum we have to flip the Senate blue.

* **Trump is watching us:** The MAGA movement will do whatever it takes to tighten their grip on the House and Senate and hold their majorities. We need to show that we’re ready to fight against their upcoming flood of dark money.

* **And the Democratic candidates we support are especially watching us:** They know the amount of support they’ll be able to receive next year hinges on how much money we raise by the deadline.

I really mean it: Everyone is watching to see whether we will hit our $50,000 fundraising goal for the final FEC deadline before the midterm election year. News outlets are watching us: The amount of money we raise will indicate how strong this grassroots movement is — and how much momentum we have to flip the Senate blue. Trump is watching us: The MAGA movement will do whatever it takes to tighten their grip on the House and Senate and hold their majorities. We need to show that we’re ready to fight against their upcoming flood of dark money. And the Democratic candidates we support are especially watching us: They know the amount of support they’ll be able to receive next year hinges on how much money we raise by the deadline. = It’s absolutely critical we show off the power of our movement on December 31st to everyone watching. subject: I’m launching something new

body:
United for Virginia’s Future starts today.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121798053/590612334/943692417?refcode=BLU_EM_UFVF_2025-12-22_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYWU5NjdiMTEtNmZkZi1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAwZDNhMWVjOGM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=yZmLBPwIBHShUn3NerXXKW3mTSJFmLU7EAqTUYoJsOs=)

| Peter,

This November, we delivered a major victory for Virginia together. We showed the Commonwealth – and the nation – what is possible when people come together around commonsense leadership and a commitment to getting things done.

I will always be grateful for the trust you placed in me, and for the campaign we built side by side. But our work is far from finished.

**Today, I’m launching United for Virginia’s Future PAC, an effort focused on recruiting and supporting candidates in critical elections and leaders who will put people first, just as we did in this campaign.**

This effort is about more than one race or one office. It’s about making sure the priorities and values that unite us and the issues my campaign focused on – lower costs, stronger public schools, and safer communities – continue to shape the future of Virginia and the future of our country.

I hope you will be part of this exciting next chapter.

name: Team Cooper
subject: Whatley says “Bah! Humbug!” to health care
body:
We’ve got a better option.
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2365?source=&t=1&akid=205%2E124072%2E7Yyk8I)
Peter — Roy Cooper’s opponent Michael Whatley and Ebenezer Scrooge aren’t that different, except for one thing: By the end of the story, the greedy banker in _A Christmas Carol_ turns his life around after learning the true value of generosity, kindness, and service to others. **We can’t count on Whatley to do the same.** **[Michael Whatley says he would have voted for Trump’s health care cuts “in a heartbeat.” We can’t send him three ghosts who will persuade him to change his ways, but YOU can send a powerful message TODAY: Donate to Roy Cooper’s campaign for U.S. Senate and show Whatley he can’t drown our movement in MAGA money>>>](https://act.roycooper.com/go/3216?t=7&akid=205%2E124072%2E7Yyk8I)** | [DONATE NOW](https://act.roycooper.com/go/3216?t=8&akid=205%2E124072%2E7Yyk8I)
---
When we look at Whatley’s actions toward North Carolina voters, it’s clear how much of a Scrooge he is:
❄️ He supported legislation putting 690,000+ North Carolinians in danger of losing their health insurance due to steep Medicaid cuts.
❄️ He opposed capping insulin costs for seniors.
❄️ He thought we shouldn’t extend health care tax credits, even though letting them lapse would _double_ insurance premiums for the average North Carolinian.
**Every time he has a chance to help North Carolinians, Michael Whatley’s answer is essentially the same:_Bah! Humbug!_**
**[Peter, experts are saying this is one of the top races to watch for all of 2026. We need YOUR help to prove that in the end, greed and cruelty don’t pay — and we’ve GOT to meet our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline. Can you donate today?>>>](https://act.roycooper.com/go/3216?t=9&akid=205%2E124072%2E7Yyk8I)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[DONATE $5](https://act.roycooper.com/go/3217?t=10&akid=205%2E124072%2E7Yyk8I)
---
[DONATE $10](https://act.roycooper.com/go/3218?t=11&akid=205%2E124072%2E7Yyk8I)
---
[DONATE $25](https://act.roycooper.com/go/3219?t=12&akid=205%2E124072%2E7Yyk8I)

[DONATE $50](https://act.roycooper.com/go/3220?t=13&akid=205%2E124072%2E7Yyk8I)
---
[DONATE $100](https://act.roycooper.com/go/3221?t=14&akid=205%2E124072%2E7Yyk8I)
---
[DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.roycooper.com/go/3222?t=15&akid=205%2E124072%2E7Yyk8I)
---
Thank you, and happy holidays,
– Team Cooper
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?source=&t=2&akid=205%2E124072%2E7Yyk8I)**

The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.

name: Mark Kelly
subject: A humble request
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
I know most people will be tuning out over the next couple days, and our fundraising will drop considerably. That’s not a bad thing — it’s great. I hope you get to spend some time with loved ones.
#

Team, I hope you don’t mind me reaching out this close to the 25th.
This won’t take long. [**I’m humbly asking you to make a donation before Christmas.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-dec25.Z7kwU5&refcode=em251222-1-90&t=1&akid=6308%2E6688874%2EdI9JDJ)
I know most people will be tuning out over the next couple of days, and our fundraising will drop considerably. That’s not a bad thing — it’s great. I hope you get to spend time with your loved ones.
But the reality here is that our final FEC deadline of the year is on the 31st, and Trump, Patel, and Hegseth have shown no sign of backing off. We still have goals to hit, and they aren’t arbitrary numbers. They’re what we need to raise to show strength and fight back.
If you can chip in before then, knowing we’ll stay on track to those goals would give me and my team some real peace of mind.
[**I know I’ve asked a lot of you, but please: Could you make a donation today?**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-dec25.Z7kwU5&refcode=em251222-1-90&t=2&akid=6308%2E6688874%2EdI9JDJ)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[Donate $10](https://act.markkelly.com/go/2678?c0=mek-em-dec25.Ig_Y-G&refcode=em251222-1-90&t=21&akid=6308%2E6688874%2EdI9JDJ)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1397?c0=mek-em-dec25.MGFwOF&refcode=em251222-1-90&t=22&akid=6308%2E6688874%2EdI9JDJ)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1390?c0=mek-em-dec25.sOeTkU&refcode=em251222-1-90&t=23&akid=6308%2E6688874%2EdI9JDJ)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1391?c0=mek-em-dec25.o5fT6u&refcode=em251222-1-90&t=24&akid=6308%2E6688874%2EdI9JDJ)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1392?c0=mek-em-dec25.2fVsB7&refcode=em251222-1-90&t=25&akid=6308%2E6688874%2EdI9JDJ)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1395?c0=mek-em-dec25.VlCD_n&refcode=em251222-1-90&t=26&akid=6308%2E6688874%2EdI9JDJ)**

****
Thank you so much for your support.
Mark

name: Alex Kelloff
subject: I still haven’t heard from you yet
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alex Kelloff for Colorado
body:
Hey folks,
My team and I have been reading through all the thoughtful, candid responses pouring in from our End-of-Year Survey.
I’m grateful for everyone who’s taken the time to share their stories and opened up about their experiences with this administration’s policies, but I noticed we still haven’t heard from you yet.
Will you please take a moment to complete my End-of-Year survey and tell me how the challenges of this moment are showing up in your life? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/VdscbC0jykOnqbGmOMBMtA2]
SHARE YOUR THOUGHTS » [https://secure.ngpvan.com/VdscbC0jykOnqbGmOMBMtA2]

body:
We wanted to make sure you didn’t miss this.
| Democrats just raised the stakes to IMPEACH Pete Hegseth:

_**“His actions are not just reprehensible, but illegal.”**_

So we wanted to make sure you had a chance to sign our petition demanding he be held accountable!

[With the GOP holding a _paper-thin_ House majority, we only need to convince a few Republicans to stand up: Add your name NOW »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/impeach-hegseth-pet/?source=VPP_20251222_EMPET_E3_T0_NS&t=6&akid=22330%2E878179%2EmUFCoq) | [ADD MY NAME TO THE PETITION: DEMAND CONGRESS IMPEACH PETE HEGSETH »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/impeach-hegseth-pet/?source=VPP_20251222_EMPET_E3_T0_NS&t=7&akid=22330%2E878179%2EmUFCoq)

Thank you!

The Voter Protection Project

---
**FIRST** Trump selected completely UNQUALIFIED Fox News host Pete Hegseth to lead the Department of Defense.

**THEN** Hegseth JEOPARDIZED national security by sending classified war plans in an insecure group chat.

**NOW** Democrats and even some Republicans are DEMANDING Hegseth’s impeachment after his illegal military orders. _HE MUST GO NOW!_

**[If we don’t get 15,000 signatures by midnight, our demand for accountability will look weak. Be the first Democrat from your state to add your name DEMANDING Pete Hegseth be IMPEACHED>>](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/impeach-hegseth-pet/?source=VPP_20251222_EMPET_E3_T0_NS&t=10&akid=22330%2E878179%2EmUFCoq)**

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

subject: Asking for your input​​, Derek: Will you fill out my campaign’s end-of-year Priorities Survey?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
As we head into the end of the year and prepare for the next phase of my reelection campaign, I am asking for something deeply important. And no, it’s not money.

|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121799393/590617423/-165121341?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_SVY_PrioritiesRsnd_251222_T1_1&ms=MW_ATA_EM_SVY_PrioritiesRsnd_251222_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTg4ZjE2Mi03MWRmLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExZWM4YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pU4tOr-Spyvbu5XR_gwNI9lMPkG5Ap1Np3QLj2S5l2o=) Derek,

As we head into the very last days of the year and prepare for the next phase of my reelection campaign, I am asking for something deeply important. And no, it’s not money.

Today, I am asking for your direct input.

[_**Will you spare a couple minutes to fill out my campaign’s end-of-year Priorities Survey, Derek?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121799394/590617426/-1087753640?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_SVY_PrioritiesRsnd_251222_T1_1&ms=MW_ATA_EM_SVY_PrioritiesRsnd_251222_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTg4ZjE2Mi03MWRmLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExZWM4YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pU4tOr-Spyvbu5XR_gwNI9lMPkG5Ap1Np3QLj2S5l2o=&emci=67b6078a-57df-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&emdi=4988f162-71df-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&ceid=4568237) ****[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121799395/590617427/-1087753640?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_SVY_PrioritiesRsnd_251222_T1_1&ms=MW_ATA_EM_SVY_PrioritiesRsnd_251222_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTg4ZjE2Mi03MWRmLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExZWM4YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pU4tOr-Spyvbu5XR_gwNI9lMPkG5Ap1Np3QLj2S5l2o=&emci=67b6078a-57df-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&emdi=4988f162-71df-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&ceid=4568237)**** While I keep up the fight to hold Trump accountable and take back the Senate next year, I want to know what issues are top-of-mind for you, and how this campaign can best represent your values.

You’re the backbone of this campaign, so I want your voice to guide our work in the months ahead.

[_**That’s why we’re asking 1,000 grassroots supporters to complete our Priorities Survey today. Can I count on you to share your thoughts? Your input is invaluable to me as we chart our course.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121799397/590617428/-1087753640?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_SVY_PrioritiesRsnd_251222_T1_1&ms=MW_ATA_EM_SVY_PrioritiesRsnd_251222_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTg4ZjE2Mi03MWRmLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExZWM4YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pU4tOr-Spyvbu5XR_gwNI9lMPkG5Ap1Np3QLj2S5l2o=&emci=67b6078a-57df-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&emdi=4988f162-71df-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&ceid=4568237)

Thank you for taking the time,

Mark Warner **Before you go:**

Republicans will spend whatever it takes to hold onto power, no matter how unpopular their agenda is with voters.

**And they know that there’s no Senate majority for Democrats without Virginia.**

[_**Will you consider a contribution today as an early investment in the campaign infrastructure we're building to reelect Mark Warner and flip control of Congress? Your donation today will have a much bigger impact than a donation of the same amount made right before the midterm elections.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121799398/590617429/-165121341?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_SVY_PrioritiesRsnd_251222_T1_1&ms=MW_ATA_EM_SVY_PrioritiesRsnd_251222_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTg4ZjE2Mi03MWRmLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExZWM4YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pU4tOr-Spyvbu5XR_gwNI9lMPkG5Ap1Np3QLj2S5l2o=)**__********[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121799399/590617430/-165121341?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_SVY_PrioritiesRsnd_251222_T1_1&ms=MW_ATA_EM_SVY_PrioritiesRsnd_251222_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0OTg4ZjE2Mi03MWRmLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExZWM4YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pU4tOr-Spyvbu5XR_gwNI9lMPkG5Ap1Np3QLj2S5l2o=)**********

**$10 becomes $20, $20 becomes $40, and every contribution makes twice the impact to defend democracy.**
Your generosity could go twice as far to prevent attempts at voter suppression, including mass voter purges.
Twice as far to stop the GOP from silencing voters of color through racially discriminatory redistricting.
Twice as far to elect Democracy Champions in 2026 and beyond.
And twice as far to stop the rise of autocracy in America.
We each face individual opportunities to fight for free and fair elections, and we each contribute in different ways at different times — from attending protests, to driving neighbors to the polls, to filling our group chats with voter registration links.
But if you can make a donation at this moment, it could make twice the difference to expand our collective power. And it would represent an opportunity to end 2025 not just on a high note — but on a defiant note.
We refuse to submit to authoritarianism. We refuse to give up on free and fair elections. And we are resolved to ensure the freedom to vote.

clean_body: Only for a limited time | | | This is huge, team: from now through December 31, thanks to a generous donor,=** | = $10 becomes $20, $20 becomes $40, and every contribution makes twice the impact to defend democracy. Your generosity could go twice as far to prevent attempts at voter suppression, including mass voter purges. Twice as far to stop the GOP from silencing voters of color through racially discriminatory redistricting. Twice as far to elect Democracy Champions in 2026 and beyond. And twice as far to stop the rise of autocracy in America. We each face individual opportunities to fight for free and fair elections, and we each contribute in different ways at different times — from attending protests, to driving neighbors to the polls, to filling our group chats with voter registration links. But if you can make a donation at this moment, it could make twice the difference to expand our collective power. And it would represent an opportunity to end 2025 not just on a high note — but on a defiant note. We refuse to submit to authoritarianism. We refuse to give up on free and fair elections. body:
The Department of Defense is upgrading its preliminary review of Mark Kelly to an official investigation.
Peter, Mark Kelly here.
They are escalating.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98596?refcode=em20251222-9867&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9867%2E614464%2EGh4Y3W)
We hadn't heard anything significant since December 10th, and then they dropped this.
Honestly, we learned about this the same as everyone else. We found out that Trump called for my arrest and execution by tweet. We heard about this investigation for the first time by tweet. And now that they're escalating, we hear it by tweet — again.
Trump and Hegseth won't let this go — but I refuse to back down. And I need you with me to have any chance against them.

clean_body: The Department of Defense is upgrading its preliminary review of Mark Kelly to an official investigation. Peter, Mark Kelly here. They are escalating. We hadn't heard anything significant since December 10th, and then they dropped this. Honestly, we learned about this the same as everyone else. We found out that Trump called for my arrest and execution by tweet. We heard about this investigation for the first time by tweet. And now that they're escalating, we hear it by tweet — again. Trump and Hegseth won't let this go — but I refuse to back down. And I need you with me to have any chance against them. These MAHA activists push anti-science and anti-vaccine propaganda that leads to children's preventable deaths.
Measles was declared eliminated in 2000. A quarter century later, we're experiencing one of the worst outbreaks of childhood measles in living memory, and our MAHA conspiracy theorist Secretary of Health and Human Services, RFK, Jr., couldn't care less. The same RFK Jr. who repeated the baseless, racist theory that COVID was designed to avoid "Jews and Chinese." The same RFK Jr. whose doctors once found a dead worm in his brain.

From sea to shining sea, people are watching. Wondering. Asking the same question in their own way: Do we keep moving forward, or do we let it all slide backward?

That question isn’t abstract. It shows up in Congress every single day.

**_If Democrats flip this seat,_** they don’t just gain another vote. They gain another **roadblock**. Another **obstructionist**. Another reliable “no” vote designed to stall, delay, and dismantle President Trump’s America First mandate.

They’ll _block_ border security.
They’ll _grind_ conservative reforms to a halt.
They’ll do whatever it takes to claw back power, even if it hurts the country.

[**I’m running because I refuse to let that happen.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=1aecf12c19ff49d2b81afcf76e2285d5&_e=Sz1HSWrXSmPT2DeocYdINdEv-QAEo5QIbqzWFByiDZOUT2QTQNijEJvZARMhrm4yIe-8cS6V3b2r4reSSEuVJoyoUwh3cqac_rb-F7AIw8wsWeypK7znO9jVaZ_bOqnZsaGZn_uLQ_xaxwuv228bKHi_SpGXEVx5gtiGZ5EmSEMKaNA5lkv-O3cHjxPE_-hBqzfiIT--ouC2lkTMl8szJDbCktPCi3y62jwfTH2_vZkyWX0ya8SJP767oroY8hDpL-6lKETrBdDxEdz01cAwxLmfEHy525QyPda6nMYdU7cHTXYwzN35qplGBLVEIY7Is0xh4-u2HNhvXX4XhlfOh3C-nJbi-vwekid-uXivDuEP9Y5dk3Qgg0YK6ytdBSq-MbvKDGXeykproKojvBo9gI_-9sO0Xa_8j5Bok62cjaMnwzFXB1u6p4sMdeCxc39LMPPNhV7y-QsAsmSGMXCykDHxqMQkNi9cIGeQ4dZgtSy2SuBA9D6tmevnv7kngC3kcZWtlsJvZ0X5J2En3zg0FkAix_8_PV5aWM6HVDtydaSWwDst3VIimu7ljcsGv5BWxrk73ysIMFQXFl63RIsszMSwwbkxAmS_zYDr5yaPD0FrqHrI8XAeuBw9iMLjuy70gG4-hvIG_-QezBrJTTLJz2QONAz8IXc5Obqx_QgRYdg%3D)

Our Founding Fathers risked everything to give us a nation rooted in freedom, a beacon of hope for the world. They didn’t play it safe. They didn’t sit on the sidelines.

I won’t either.

The House majority is razor-thin. Every district matters. **This one included.** And the radical left knows it. That’s why they’re already lining up money, operatives, and outside attacks to flip this seat.

What gives me confidence is the support we’re seeing, not just here at home, but from patriots across the country who understand what’s at stake.

I’m grateful for it. Truly.

[**If you’re able to help us hold the line, protect the House majority, and keep Democrats from gaining another seat they’ll use to obstruct everything Americans voted for, I’d appreciate your support today.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=1aecf12c19ff49d2b81afcf76e2285d5&_e=Sz1HSWrXSmPT2DeocYdINdEv-QAEo5QIbqzWFByiDZOUT2QTQNijEJvZARMhrm4yIe-8cS6V3b2r4reSSEuVJoyoUwh3cqac_rb-F7AIw8wsWeypK7znO9jVaZ_bOqnZsaGZn_uLQ_xaxwuv228bKHi_SpGXEVx5gtiGZ5EmSEMKaNA5lkv-O3cHjxPE_-hBqzfiIT--ouC2lkTMl8szJDbCktPCi3y62jwfTH2_vZmj8zGaKzfgohBWkHKHA3Jc9J2ZrG3m0FXD5BhKEK8cZRc0klKjfGHp65e3tD5RJxdxjvZ5SOqwAfPI9GG2cuxqjhHj_S5erZiKVaIYDIJ2PYa35eWK1rRwCcRji2-TwXZgWQlwSbwjcleGXNWYTR9L-o5UPgKe7KQSHGSxi2r-q0yHIiRd50E9D8DE-r7jVv8vF_om3lxE1AnRBbrwIKMAp0yODtp__D7eJ6mUqxjAJldWhd1d9V-0uxpPraiD2Du0_OMUaXJsQA-sFx-OctIrtzyUbt6KeFbhtVgFXByynZrSBrV4h2e8KdKg_5zVdqYg8rqdtomn7rEjx4p4h0AVxX-TVtqxLMHeybX-Dh3wn4g9Es4IAXRN9MYH2W16sa4_VPPFpdAznFTl0-A8kg7rJE9ZyLIFNsy7saGrWRSXRhZA7i9qQacEbLR2uuTLlL0%3D)

name: Dr. Kim Schrier
subject: Why I never *really* stopped practicing medicine:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121800230/590620187/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWZiYzIyNi03NWRmLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExZWM4YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Mxqk3oYF0TRr1lieAz8idvK9K2IvKtwTD7VxVmsrb0A=&emci=ed77be78-87db-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=4efbc226-75df-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter,

A stethoscope hangs on the coat rack in my congressional office in Washington, D.C., right next to my desk.

Even after years serving in Congress, I’m still a pediatrician first.

Doctoring has shaped almost every instinct I have, every decision I make, and every fight I take on for the people of WA-08. Medicine has taught me something I'll never forget: You do what's right for the patient, _not for yourself._

In the exam room, that means listening carefully, asking the right questions, and working together with families to restore—and then maintain—health. Doing the most good for the most people, and helping others before you help yourself, means refusing to give up on someone just because the diagnosis is tough or the treatment will take time.

_**Serving as your representative in Congress, at least for me, looks the same.**_

Doctors don't walk away when things get hard. We show up—every step of the way—with a caring hand, a steady voice, and thoughtful treatment. That's the kind of leadership I bring to Congress, and it's never been more necessary than it is at this moment. But to keep doing this work, I need you with me. WA-08 is a swing district, and we already have three Republican opponents in this race. As we prepare to head into an election year, everything we do from here on out has the power to shape the outcome of this race.

[**If you believe in compassionate, steady, people-first leadership, chip in $5 to help keep a fighter like me in clean_body: Peter, A stethoscope hangs on the coat rack in my congressional office in Washington, D.C., right next to my desk. Even after years serving in Congress, I’m still a pediatrician first. Doctoring has shaped almost every instinct I have, every decision I make, and every fight I take on for the people of WA-08. Medicine has taught me something I'll never forget: You do what's right for the patient, not for yourself. In the exam room, that means listening carefully, asking the right questions, and working together with families to restore—and then maintain—health. Doing the most good for the most people, and helping others before you help yourself, means refusing to give up on someone just because the diagnosis is tough or the treatment will take time. Serving as your representative in Congress, at least for me, looks the same. Doctors don't walk away when things get hard. We show up—every step of the way—with a caring hand, a steady voice, and thoughtful treatment. That's the kind of leadership I bring to Congress, and it's never been more necessary than it is at this moment. But to keep doing this work, I need you with me. WA-08 is a swing district, and we already have three Republican opponents in this race. As we prepare to head into an election year, everything we do from here on out has the power to shape the outcome of this race. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for always stepping up, Kim Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, so we need your help to keep Kim in Congress. Chip in now to help protect Kim's seat. = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. **An Emerge supporter has offered to MATCH all donations made between now and December 31.**

clean_body: An Emerge supporter has offered to MATCH all donations made between now and December 31. | = | | Peter, We’re just 9 days away from the year-end deadline, and we just got HUGE NEWS: An Emerge supporter has offered to MATCH all donations made between now and December 31. That means every dollar you give today will go twice as far to recruit as many Emerge women as possible for the ballot next year, because we know when our women run, they win. We’re behind on the year-end goal we must hit to power our 2026 work. And if we don’t close this gap now, we will be forced to scale back the very programs that elect the women our democracy depends on. This is the moment when year-end giving makes or breaks what we can build next year. = | = | = | = | = | = * | | = Paid for by Emerge America Emerge America 818 Connecticut Avenue NW Suite 450 Washington, DC 20006 United States | = =

**➤➤ “The DOJ can take a hike.” – CO Secretary of State Jena Griswold** Friend, This is a crisis of power, privacy, and principle. **Trump’s Department of Justice is demanding full access to sensitive voter data,** including Social Security numbers, driver's license records, and home addresses. But Democratic Secretaries of State are not backing down. Colorado Secretary of State Jena Griswold just drew a line in the sand: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121800355/590620604/-248329304?refcode=em-12.22.25-all-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOGEyMTFiYS03NWRmLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExZWM4YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rmfBolQjAMOttTqliieZdTYiGwiB9SGaYRdUMp4rsik=) She’s right. name: Team Pramila
subject: Before you log off
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Let us explain why this deadline is so important.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20251222-5733-footer&t=1&akid=5733%2E420207%2EnZ-CBG)
Hi Peter,
Before you log off for the holidays, we wanted to make an important ask: [**Can you chip in $3 or any amount to help us meet our end-of-year fundraising goal before the big FEC reporting deadline next Wednesday?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20251222.Q-Ph_h&refcode=em20251222-5733&amount=3&t=2&akid=5733%2E420207%2EnZ-CBG)
Here’s why this deadline is so important:
With most people taking time to rest and be with loved ones, donations tend to slow down at the end of the year.
But the work doesn’t pause — and neither do Trump and MAGA Republicans’ attacks on working people. That’s why supporters stepping up right now make such a big difference.
Just last week, House Democrats successfully passed a discharge petition that will force a vote to extend the Affordable Care Act subsidies that make health insurance premiums affordable for millions — **but Mike Johnson is still refusing to hold a vote until the new year.**
If those credits are allowed to lapse, premiums will **rise by an average of $1,016** next year.
When Congress returns next month, Republicans will do everything they can to vote those extensions down.**Pramila will be on the front lines fighting back, pushing to protect coverage, lower costs, and stop families from losing care.**
But she can’t do it alone.
**[So if you’re able, will you pitch in $3 before the deadline to help us finish the year strong and head into 2026 ready for the fights ahead?](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20251222.Q-Ph_h&refcode=em20251222-5733&amount=3&t=3&akid=5733%2E420207%2EnZ-CBG)**
**[Contribute $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20251222.Q-Ph_h&amount=3&refcode=em20251222-5733&t=22&akid=5733%2E420207%2EnZ-CBG)**
In solidarity,
Team Pramila
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20251222-5733-footer&t=23&refcode2=5733_420207_nZ-CBG&akid=5733%2E420207%2EnZ-CBG)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=24&akid=5733%2E420207%2EnZ-CBG)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=5733%2E420207%2EnZ-CBG)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

**My background is a little different than some of my colleagues in Congress.**
I grew up in a working-class family, and I’m the granddaughter of a police officer and the daughter of two teachers. As a child, I had an interest in engineering, which led me to receive a college scholarship to study electrical engineering.
I worked at General Motors before transitioning to running a small business with my husband in Oregon. Then, I went on to serve my community in the Oregon State Legislature.
I was proud to fight for Oregonians in Salem and work to ensure our voices were heard. But I knew I had to do more if I was going to build a better future for the next generation.
That’s why I decided to run for Congress in 2024. It was an extremely competitive race, but with the support of this grassroots team, we flipped OR-05 from red-to-blue — and I became Oregon’s first Black U.S. Representative.
I’m honored to be working for the good people of Oregon’s 5th District in Washington and fighting to deliver practical solutions to the issues impacting our communities — from working to lower costs to protecting affordable healthcare to strengthening public education.
**I’m proud of the work I’ve accomplished, and I’m determined to continue fighting for the next generation in Congress — and I’d appreciate your support.**
[_**We’re gearing up for another competitive race to defend OR-05 and help Democrats take back the House in 2026, and it’s going to take all of us to get the job done. Will you chip in a few bucks today to keep this seat blue and flip the House?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121800544/590621224/1565084121?refcode=email_122225_engineer&amounts=5%2C25%2C50%2C75%2C100%2C250%2C500&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY3MjEiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmVmY2FmMWItNzdkZi1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAwZDNhMWVjOGM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=46z2haUGex_5XjjVsfDLfjNjXwpfAb_D8D_h_V5lslw=)

name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Judicial Watch Sues Justice Dept for FBI Records on Hunter Biden’s Infamous Laptop
body:
Judicial Watch announced it filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the U.S. Department of Justice for all FBI investigative records concerning Hunter Biden’s abandoned laptop, which contained extensive evidence of Biden family business dealings (Judicial Watch Inc. v. U.S. Department of Justice (No. 1:25-cv-04240)).

name: Don Jr.
subject: Peter, I saved this message just for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
Peter, it's Don Jr. I wanted to take a moment to express my heartfelt gratitude for your unwavering support. My father and I know that this fight isn't possible without patriots like you who are willing to stand up for what's right.

We're honored to have you on our team, Peter.

name: Steve Daines
subject: We didn't do it.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana
body:
We're already more than halfway through December, and I have some bad news. |
---

Fellow American,

We're already more than halfway through December, and I have some bad news.

My campaign fell $2,045 short of its mid-month fundraising goal. We cannot afford to fall short of our final fundraising goal for 2025. We cannot start Election Year 2026 in the "red."

Friend,

**We can’t think of anything scarier than Republicans staying in control of the House next year.**

They own the historically long government shutdown, and their cruel agenda is putting billionaire donors above working families.

Nikki is standing up to their betrayal in Washington. Her outspoken action for working families, farmers, veterans, and more have made her a target of the GOP – we’ve already faced attacks from the NRCC and are bracing for more from special interest groups.

And with multiple Republican challengers in this race, we can’t afford to leave the outcome of this competitive race to chance. There’s too much at stake.

**[That’s why we’re asking our supporters to chip in $13 to protect IL-13 ahead of our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline. I’m respectfully asking: [_**Can you split a donation of $5 to my reelection campaign and Josh Harder today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121801233/590623712/1639951651?&refcode=E16911-20251219-JonOssoff-SL-Surrogate&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWU0NTk4MzQtNzlkZi1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAwZDNhMWVjOGM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8irhf3v5ffFl0uEzDc3mlaYVRIC76b4QwspmO5dAjR0=) Sorry to be so direct, but winning in 2026 is our only hope to regain Congressional power and reverse our ongoing descent toward one-man rule. And I am the _only_ Democratic U.S. Senator up for reelection in a state Trump won. That makes me MAGA’s #1 target in 2026. They’re _already_ spending MILLIONS of dollars to try to defeat me. _**There is no path back from the brink of authoritarianism without defending this seat — the very seat that secured the Democratic majority in 2021.**_ So I'm asking for your help. Not for me, **for all of us.** [_**If you’re able, please make a contribution of any amount to my campaign and Josh Harder today.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121801234/590623723/1639951651?&refcode=E16911-20251219-JonOssoff-SL-Surrogate&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWU0NTk4MzQtNzlkZi1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAwZDNhMWVjOGM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8irhf3v5ffFl0uEzDc3mlaYVRIC76b4QwspmO5dAjR0=) The campaign will be brutal. _But this team wins the hardest battles._ We flipped Georgia when no one thought it was possible. Remember? We unseated an entrenched GOP incumbent to win the Senate majority. And we will win again — with your help. [_**Please: send $5 to my reelection campaign and Josh Harder today.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121801235/590623733/1639951651?&refcode=E16911-20251219-JonOssoff-SL-Surrogate&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWU0NTk4MzQtNzlkZi1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAwZDNhMWVjOGM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8irhf3v5ffFl0uEzDc3mlaYVRIC76b4QwspmO5dAjR0=) With gratitude, Senator Jon Ossoff [DONATE »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121801236/590623742/1639951651?&refcode=E16911-20251219-JonOssoff-SB-Surrogate&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOWU0NTk4MzQtNzlkZi1mMDExLTgxOTQtMDAwZDNhMWVjOGM2IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=8irhf3v5ffFl0uEzDc3mlaYVRIC76b4QwspmO5dAjR0=)

name: Kristen McDonald Rivet
subject: This is important, folks.
body:
|
#
This is important, friend. In just nine days, we’ll reach our last major fundraising deadline for the year. After December 31, we’ll have to submit our fundraising numbers to the Federal Election Commission (FEC). And once our report is made public, everyone will see how deep our grassroots coalition runs and the support that we have behind us. **MI-08 was JUST named the “tipping point” seat.** That means we are the tiebreaker that will determine control of the House – seat 218. The stakes are higher than ever, so we want this final report to send a message to everyone watching – this campaign is ready to secure the win we need to take back Congress. As a reminder, GOP super PACs have already spent over $1 million on attacks against me – more television than any other House Democrat in the country. If we’re going to keep this seat, we’re going to need you on our side. **[We’re getting closer and closer to hitting our fundraising goal, but we’re still falling a bit short. clean_body: | This is important, friend. In just nine days, we’ll reach our last major fundraising deadline for the year. After December 31, we’ll have to submit our fundraising numbers to the Federal Election Commission (FEC). And once our report is made public, everyone will see how deep our grassroots coalition runs and the support that we have behind us. MI-08 was JUST named the “tipping point” seat. That means we are the tiebreaker that will determine control of the House – seat 218. The stakes are higher than ever, so we want this final report to send a message to everyone watching – this campaign is ready to secure the win we need to take back Congress. As a reminder, GOP super PACs have already spent over $1 million on attacks against me – more television than any other House Democrat in the country. If we’re going to keep this seat, we’re going to need you on our side. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, Kristen | We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Thank you for supporting Kristen McDonald Rivet for Congress! Kristen for Michigan P.O. Box 854 Bay City, MI 48707 United States

name: Movement 4 Freedom
subject: We see you. We’re with you.
body:
Sending love + solidarity this holiday season.

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/819d480b5eb0/tockcw1cwy-226?e=81ab29c4d2)
---
[|
---](https://movement4freedom.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c20cdecc59106d39c65725a01&id=85435ebf4b&e=81ab29c4d2)
| | | | | | Peter,
---
| | As we move through this holiday season, we want every single member of our community to know something deeply important:
**We see you.** We see your light, your courage, and your resilience.We see your strength in the midst of struggle.And we are grateful to be in community with you.
This time of year can be joyful — but we also know it can be heavy. Many of us are navigating hardships, loss, uncertainty, and systems that continue to fail our communities.
But even in the toughest moments, **we stand together.** We lift one another up. And we keep building a future rooted in justice, safety, and community.
From all of us at the Movement for Freedom, may your holidays be filled with warmth, love, and moments of peace, however they find you and wherever you are.
Thank you for being part of this movement. You make it stronger.
---
| |
**With gratitude,**_**The Movement for Freedom Team**_
---
|
---
|
---
| | | | | | | [|

name: Nellie Pou
subject: I want to say this
body:
I’m so grateful

| |
---
Hi team, As we head into the final stretch of our end-of-quarter push, I’ve been reflecting on everything we’ve accomplished together this year.
* We launched this campaign.
* We held events in communities across the district.
* We met families, workers, immigrants, seniors, and small business owners. All of them are sharing what they need from Congress.
* We built a strong, people-powered movement that’s growing every day.

And we’ve brought on extraordinary supporters and partners along the way, including EMILYs List, GIFFORDS, and the League of Conservation Voters Action Fund. I am incredibly proud to stand with them and with so many local leaders, organizers, and community champions who believe deeply in what we can achieve. Now we turn to next year, and the stakes couldn’t be higher. This race will help determine control of the House. The policies that shape the economy, health care, reproductive freedom, and the future of New Jersey all flow through that majority. But to enter 2025 strong, we must close out this EOQ with real momentum. **[If you’re able, I’m asking you to make a contribution today. Every dollar gets us closer to the majority we need to deliver for working families. clean_body: I’m so grateful | | Hi team, As we head into the final stretch of our end-of-quarter push, I’ve been reflecting on everything we’ve accomplished together this year. We launched this campaign. We held events in communities across the district. We met families, workers, immigrants, seniors, and small business owners. All of them are sharing what they need from Congress. We built a strong, people-powered movement that’s growing every day. And we’ve brought on extraordinary supporters and partners along the way, including EMILYs List, GIFFORDS, and the League of Conservation Voters Action Fund. I am incredibly proud to stand with them and with so many local leaders, organizers, and community champions who believe deeply in what we can achieve. Now we turn to next year, and the stakes couldn’t be higher. This race will help determine control of the House. The policies that shape the economy, health care, reproductive freedom, and the future of New Jersey all flow through that majority. But to enter 2025 strong, we must close out this EOQ with real momentum. = | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately. Thank you for being part of this campaign and this community, Nellie | | | ---|---|--- About Nellie Pou Nellie Pou is the first Latina to represent New Jersey in Congress, and will be a target for the NRCC in 2026. As a mother and grandmother, Nellie knows what New Jersey families are facing and will continue to bring down costs while creating good-paying jobs. Nellie has dedicated her entire life to the community that raised her, and in Congress she will do the same. | = | = ---|--- Follow Nellie | | | ---|---|--- Checks may also be mailed to: Nellie Pou for Congress - PO BOX 2696, Paterson, NJ, 07509 Paid for by Nellie Pou for Congress Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so . name: Mark Kelly
subject: BREAKING: Escalation from Pete Hegseth
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| The Department of Defense is upgrading its preliminary review of Mark Kelly to an official investigation.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=5158%2E35263%2ELDa7Z9)
Peter, Mark Kelly here. They are escalating. [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/4731?t=4&akid=5158%2E35263%2ELDa7Z9) We hadn't heard anything significant since December 10th, and then they dropped this. Honestly, we learned about this the same as everyone else. We found out that Trump called for my arrest and execution by tweet. We heard about this investigation for the first time by tweet. And now that they're escalating, we hear it by tweet — again. Trump and Hegseth won't let this go — but I refuse to back down. And I need you with me to have any chance against them. [**Please. subject: Right now, I’m madder than a wet hen!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
[](https://links.iterable.com/s/c/fFli8BY5sYa76akxPudTsb7bEwPlXRZJi5ylVc_JApIoDIt7Zl7zYbMjGZAMeEr7ZvTBzgbRdcKTe4i2MgQ2lc1tYvqqelmD42NJKd-6sNMOWd_Dng3bBk6gvaeztuyFTU7taxhGKAJ6JDL2SugE1FMc8Wh7PgZw7aNmqfJ2q0nsgxBKmOy-VqztLP05ViOcjB7kBAEEq53HBfVGxtSVKLvCdxG_vuxQnujTBWHSIU9uKID0QujPNfw0h8q0mZXdHCDjQDJ3u3i6A9Qk1XTa6e1LocRaptMyD-9XEs4AVXIJOx6ovnfRfnwWM_e_e09J7_Srfcp3m_1KkQE1hvBXlrJw3ENc-jSKdq0o7DQWFQjMdXayH5-S-wuRLHDLeY0kLj22PzFFIpso-wk41QWpTBKQeqyCIF69r4YJtswhEkdWVNHyGpS0IEuVHe98s8r_zsOZn9BqBhKNa4oN1ZyrWJFCctLXSmxcX7QtmQrom3HkhBTS_6YI-a88Uem5nM2b39frGrtA32AsjE4PgF5uPF9g4BGZjJBqsV-G6tn0fxyAkAAH1_oe9pWysy4NndrU7JSzlvpiHJCqUpiZxyv-7fKd53srMHXMASlDFZ2YPWkvbaV4PY9T0zJKLEZqrZNywVGYwwnXZFbJaFdisbPXQvxkwX0UEcNLkoEINm-AzTb6UWEpjdG3CSM_fQy08YyBBh2DOgVDs9dEQunR_zcq_tgzWwXkDgHg-j5e-5CdtQMMTeoYgt_IiSOllTTHngW09N8lA8MD28lFgJCr4T-kspfbeW80wMP0AgAB6C6i6eqyJxQdD9l-h3ZvLH-pO3bMRDlQBBE/GnCTY4Qli9iPIhJ-nFlmmgBx7B9grIkv/16)The way these Democrats are acting up right now's got me madder than a wet hen in a tote sack.
This ain't the same Party that it was when I first entered the big leagues. It's become a paradise for Liberal hogwash and downright anti-American behavior.
Whether it's...

* Rioting in cities across America and burning Old Glory
* Storming ICE facilities, doxxing agents, and throwing sandwiches at law enforcement
* Having actual COMMUNISTS run some of our greatest cities

It sure seems like once you think the Democrats can't stoop any lower, they grab a shovel and prove you wrong... Guess they never heard the first rule of holes: if you're in one, STOP DIGGING.
_But let me tell you the God-honest truth. They have the money to do it and if we don 't get our act together, they just might put us in their place._
Right now, the Democrats have a well-oiled fundraising machine that is raking in the big bucks from its out-of-touch, elitist donors - 100 million bucks, to be exact.
After seeing that, I knew I had to step in.
**_[So my good friend Majority Leader Steve Scalise and I got to talking. clean_body: way these Democrats are acting up right now's got me madder than a wet hen in a tote sack. This ain't the same Party that it was when I first entered the big leagues. It's become a paradise for Liberal hogwash and downright anti-American behavior. Whether it's... Rioting in cities across America and burning Old Glory Storming ICE facilities, doxxing agents, and throwing sandwiches at law enforcement Having actual COMMUNISTS run some of our greatest cities It sure seems like once you think the Democrats can't stoop any lower, they grab a shovel and prove you wrong... Guess they never heard the first rule of holes: if you're in one, STOP DIGGING. But let me tell you the God-honest truth. They have the money to do it and if we don 't get our act together, they just might put us in their place. Right now, the Democrats have a well-oiled fundraising machine that is raking in the big bucks from its out-of-touch, elitist donors - 100 million bucks, to be exact. After seeing that, I knew I had to step in. Do you reckon you could be one of those Conservatives? we all step up and work together I think we'll be able to keep these Democrats at bay and continue to deliver wins for good, hard workin' Americans. But I can 't do it without you, Peter. Thanks for hearing me out, John N. Kennedy A personal note from Majority Leader Steve Scalise: I'm humbled to announce that I am your new House Majority Leader. My first order of business is checking in with our best supporters, so I just launched my new MAJORITY LEADER SURVEY for that specific reason. | | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.

The hardware, the security, the scale... absolutely shocking for a place this quiet.

This isn’t rumor or theory—it’s a live site, and what’s happening there could have real implications for how money and technology move in the years ahead.

[Watch this Virginia video now and decide for yourself what this footage might mean.](https://links.main.yourcapitalminds.com/u/click?_t=affa6bfca09a497f86454ba803e6a9a2&_m=093067c1ef374f2a88d1e1187b440655&_e=M8L6PcgxHjB7Jj40DTjkehxtODCwwuUjvspE_CYCkOb7-AL2bCklvVhnPvSM7hPdBNY9Oa67BVYx52nL6qDtFJxnHDj7o5H2HhO-Eke2IcAY-YSZNt7dguXugwkuBJzCDkeSyYTaoj0XGZnEcJAFgQ0JO6n67-bb5nUZAPl36AEop_guMuzsxgiGk4dJx5XZoFfU2Y7YOswZlFIyGkVX8ZdUQZK73-EnlM-yIyPPTCAMnzdRfqpUT5qDHZRoRzp35qPiDftv7atetJHfTculVvHiLYhSIbYlz6tmXAlbF835Vy33jjQgIIAGed27HraPv15UM0kad1QpGreoavGyAsfGyS3KhtLCbL6ymHhKDJE03j7EBoz148GbC1OkHiiqpHLmaXI2flV0pSPj6_10jZsQW6Fj7lQUzPm98nipPrY82iPKDiIgX-yU-dvjan7FHbjNX_9GYwa7oaU-lVVD5fSz0ZusMEySwmIxUoHcqA_pW3wX2GkRGgp3GGAVZNnp4CEvf3rqU-UvjwbCTZliysTOpGdu2bECay3K5HoWissnn7Pm5ay0t8XY2OdlftSspCv45DENhIA_1d7uHHc1sg%3D%3D)
Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671. | | You are receiving this newsletter from Your Capital Minds (YCM), an esteemed member of the Stark Media LLC family. name: Sherrod Brown
subject: Is there anything I can say?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii**
body:
|
#
---
_Peter, this is Mazie. My friend Sherrod is running for the Senate in Ohio to help us retake the majority. Sherrod is a champion for workers in Ohio and across the country, and his voice is sorely missed in the Senate. name: Kyle (Finance Director, Heidi Hall for Congress)
subject: Let's compare and contrast
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HEIDI HALL FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251222_em_fr_b1_KFD_big [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251222_em_fr_b1_KFD_big]
Friend, I'm Kyle, Heidi's finance director. So I'm literally the numbers guy.
And I wanted to take a second before the Holidays to look at Heidi and her opponents fundraising numbers to do a little "compare and contrast."
But before my expert analysis, I have to point out that our End of Year Fundraising Deadline and our final Public Filing Deadline of the Year are just a week away, and this is going to be the first time our fundraising numbers go public since Prop 50.
Putting up a strong report is important (you'll see why below) and we need your help. Can you chip in before the holidays and support Heidi in this race? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251222_em_fr_b1_KFD_big]
Here's what stands out from everyone's fundraising numbers:
➡️ 54% of Kevin Kiley's contributions in 2023-2024 are from large individual donations (contributions larger than $200). I guess his wine tasting fundraisers in Napa paid off.
➡️ 63% of one of our other opponent's (I'll let you guess who) contributions in 2023-2024 are from corporate pacs with his largest donor being... AIPAC.
➡️ 0% of what Heidi has raised has come from corporate PACs or groups like AIPAC. Instead, a majority of her funds have come from thousands of small dollar donors who gave an average contribution of just $52!
Friend, the numbers don't lie.
Heidi has the grassroots support to win this race, but since we're going up against such rich opponents, we need to be ready for whatever they throw at us in 2026.
Will you please donate before Heidi's End of Year Fundraising Deadline to help her unseat Kevin Kiley and fight for real change in Congress? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251222_em_fr_b1_KFD_big]
If you have saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process instantly.DONATE $15 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/Hall-email?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=20251222_em_fr_b1_KFD_big_]
DONATE $35 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/Hall-email?express_lane=true&amount=35&refcode=20251222_em_fr_b1_KFD_big_]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/Hall-email?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=20251222_em_fr_b1_KFD_big_]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/Hall-email?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=20251222_em_fr_b1_KFD_big_]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/Hall-email?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=20251222_em_fr_b1_KFD_big_]
Another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251222_em_fr_b1_KFD_big_]
In solidarity,
Kyle
Finance Director, Heidi Hall for Congress
Heidi Hall has spent her three-decade public service career working with others to solve problems, protect our land and water, improve health, and build opportunities for others, all while raising two boys primarily as a single mom.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251222_em_fr_b1_KFD_big [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251222_em_fr_b1_KFD_big]
Raised by parents who had persisted to make a middle-class life for their kids in Contra Costa County while lifting up others, Heidi was taught to push through and overcome challenges rather than complain about them. She learned to stick up for the vulnerable, to respect working people, and to value equal opportunity and justice.
After graduating from Pomona College and earning graduate degrees from Columbia and Rutgers, Heidi went to work for the Rockefeller Foundation promoting reproductive care and then began her career at the Environmental Protection Agency, stopping the dumping of toxic waste and holding corporate polluters accountable.
Today, Heidi chairs the Nevada County Board of Supervisors, where she’s taken on homelessness, expanded broadband access, and worked to reduce crime and illegal cannabis growth. Heidi flipped her seat from red to blue – and now she’s ready to do it again in Congress to take on toxic politics in Washington and put people first.
Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to:
Heidi Hall for Congress
PO Box 729
Grass Valley, CA 95945
SUPPORT HEIDI [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20251222_em_fr_b1_KFD_big]
PAID FOR BY HEIDI HALL FOR CONGRESS

Heidi Hall for Congress
PO Box 729
Grass Valley, CA 95945
United States
