name: Voter Action Project Courts Watch
subject: Another case to watch in the Supreme Court about mail-in ballots
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
DemDocket: SCOTUS to Hear GOP Lawsuit That Could Radically Restrict Mail Voting [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=122225_3&amount=25]
Team: Mail-in ballots are under attack again.
The Supreme Court agreed to hear arguments in RNC v. Wetzel, a lawsuit challenging Mississippi’s law allowing a five-day grace period for late-arriving ballots mailed by Election Day. In simpler terms, it's a case about whether your vote will count if you mail it on or before Election Day, but your ballot arrives after Election Day.
It's clear why a political party -- in this case, the Republican National Committee (RNC) -- is claiming that states must reject ballots that arrive after Election Day. Doing so would potentially disenfranchise a large number of voters, restricting the number of participants in an election. And the data is clear, over the last several election cycles, Republicans have been outnumbered in the use of mail-in ballots.
The RNC is making a blunt decision that their ability to win elections matters more than your vote. It's a cynical attempt to stay in power by suppressing ballots that are delivered late by the postal service. It's the kind of partisan work that shows they'd rather believe in their own power and control than the principles of democracy, of a country where all our votes should count, regardless of party.
Team: We cannot allow blatant partisanship to overrule our right to vote. Help make every mail-in ballot count in Mississippi and beyond with $25 or whatever you can today to make every voice heard in our elections >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=122225_3&amount=25]
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=122225_3&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=122225_3&amount=25]
GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=122225_3&amount=50] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=122225_3&amount=100]
GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=122225_3&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=122225_3&amount=35]
Our position is clear: If your ballot was postmarked by Election Day, it should count.
This shouldn't be a partisan question. No political party -- Democrat, Republican, Green, Working Families, Libertarian, Reform, Conservative -- should be against voting. No party in our democracy should want to restrict the fundamental right of our fellow citizens to make their voice heard through voting.
But now we're facing a case where the Supreme Court’s decision could strike down or uphold laws in 16 states (and Washington D.C.) allowing late-arriving ballots postmarked on or before Election Day to be counted if they arrive within a set grace period.
How do we know what is at stake? Data from the 2024 Massachusetts elections shows that their three-day grace period for ballots to arrive after Election Day resulted in a 60% drop in rejected ballots as compared to no grace period. That means thousands of votes still counted, more than 1.5% of the total vote count. In a close election, that 1.5% could easily mean the difference between winning and losing.
Our fundamental right to vote should matter so much more than a partisan desperation to win. Chip in $25 or whatever you can to help us defend the use of mail-in ballots and make every vote count in elections nationwide >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=122225_3&amount=25]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=122225_3&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=122225_3&amount=20]

body:
My first year in Congress was one of the wildest and strangest in American history. But the active, consistent engagement from supporters like you was a bright spot.

| Peter, **With a few days left in the year, I am asking you to fill out our quick end-of-year survey.** **→ _[What are your hopes for 2026?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121804235/590633422/-1744008630?contactdata=NJd/XOXJY5nbL1a2nqPZpBdmSu0xTOAHuQNbPVLEM7g7AutF3PHfOK2xk7sNBzv+uudF/BUOshz3dggNJ8HJT3mDk5iSuKjdBZMEU8qeDWz8e1lxR5wtgW08hb76/iMRsywEmmDBG5+UFx4fHapKPuBtCdl7t+4klA4aXAEv2Zw=&refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.12.23_Hope2026_90do&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTZkMWM5Ni04M2RmLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExZWM4YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f0J8jazLEwnaCvtFLqhb3prynZajmK_vnEU2o_lcBew=&emci=1d8a12b6-79df-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&emdi=716d1c96-83df-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&ceid=23483442)_** [TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121804236/590633423/-480779055?contactdata=NJd/XOXJY5nbL1a2nqPZpBdmSu0xTOAHuQNbPVLEM7g7AutF3PHfOK2xk7sNBzv+uudF/BUOshz3dggNJ8HJT3mDk5iSuKjdBZMEU8qeDWz8e1lxR5wtgW08hb76/iMRsywEmmDBG5+UFx4fHapKPuBtCdl7t+4klA4aXAEv2Zw=&refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.12.23_Hope2026_90do&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTZkMWM5Ni04M2RmLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExZWM4YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f0J8jazLEwnaCvtFLqhb3prynZajmK_vnEU2o_lcBew=&emci=1d8a12b6-79df-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&emdi=716d1c96-83df-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&ceid=23483442) I don’t need to tell you that 2025 has been a tough year (that’s an understatement). My first year in Congress was one of the wildest and strangest in American history. But the active, consistent engagement from supporters like you was a bright spot. Whether you came to town halls, responded to surveys, or replied to emails like this one, you truly embodied the saying: **“Democracy is not a spectator sport.”** As we close out the year, here are a few of my hopes for 2026: 🌟 We will end the GOP healthcare crisis and bring down health insurance premiums for millions of Americans. 🌟 My Republican colleagues will start acting like the Republicans I grew up with – committed to the Constitution, not any one person. 🌟 We will elect a new generation of Democratic leaders: folks like Jo Mendoza, Manny Rutinel, Marni von Wilpert, Denise Powell – and maybe even a Democrat in the Yakima Valley! 🌟 My neighbors will be safe from ICE abuses, and every person in the Northwest Detention Center will be treated with respect and dignity. 🌟 And of course, in November 2026, we will take back the House, replace Speaker Mike Johnson, and get to work for working people. (That includes campaign finance reform!) [_**Those are a few of (the MANY) things on my mind – how about you? Take our one-question survey about what you’re hoping for in 2026 →**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121804237/590633424/-480779055?contactdata=NJd/XOXJY5nbL1a2nqPZpBdmSu0xTOAHuQNbPVLEM7g7AutF3PHfOK2xk7sNBzv+uudF/BUOshz3dggNJ8HJT3mDk5iSuKjdBZMEU8qeDWz8e1lxR5wtgW08hb76/iMRsywEmmDBG5+UFx4fHapKPuBtCdl7t+4klA4aXAEv2Zw=&refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.12.23_Hope2026_90do&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTZkMWM5Ni04M2RmLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExZWM4YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f0J8jazLEwnaCvtFLqhb3prynZajmK_vnEU2o_lcBew=&emci=1d8a12b6-79df-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&emdi=716d1c96-83df-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&ceid=23483442) Thank you so much for everything you do 💙 – Emily | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121804238/590633425/131447847?refcode=RS_EM_EN_2025.12.23_Hope2026_90do&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NzI5OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MTZkMWM5Ni04M2RmLWYwMTEtODE5NC0wMDBkM2ExZWM4YzYiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=f0J8jazLEwnaCvtFLqhb3prynZajmK_vnEU2o_lcBew=&emci=1d8a12b6-79df-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&emdi=716d1c96-83df-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&ceid=23483442) Emily Randall is proud to represent Washington’s 6th District in Congress. But the active, consistent engagement from supporters like you was a bright spot. | Peter, With a few days left in the year, I am asking you to fill out our quick end-of-year survey. → I don’t need to tell you that 2025 has been a tough year (that’s an understatement). My first year in Congress was one of the wildest and strangest in American history. But the active, consistent engagement from supporters like you was a bright spot. Whether you came to town halls, responded to surveys, or replied to emails like this one, you truly embodied the saying: “Democracy is not a spectator sport.” As we close out the year, here are a few of my hopes for 2026: 🌟 We will end the GOP healthcare crisis and bring down health insurance premiums for millions of Americans. 🌟 My Republican colleagues will start acting like the Republicans I grew up with – committed to the Constitution, not any one person. 🌟 We will elect a new generation of Democratic leaders: folks like Jo Mendoza, Manny Rutinel, Marni von Wilpert, Denise Powell – and maybe even a Democrat in the Yakima Valley! 🌟 My neighbors will be safe from ICE abuses, and every person in the Northwest Detention Center will be treated with respect and dignity. 🌟 And of course, in November 2026, we will take back the House, replace Speaker Mike Johnson, and get to work for working people. name: Navy SEAL Adam Schwarze
subject: Polling Memo: Should Walz resign?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
As governor, the Somali community in Minnesota has defrauded taxpayers of hundreds of millions of dollars, including: | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=a2e1292fcd014609bafdf8554122f1da&_e=H7HjvwPxxTZxXcF2iJh7a3NA1zdcfQvKFs0GABbC1tAQCyUkP510RPdJ7NZoTyqENj43WkD3hS6jcWfOX2qQxaphmLGkbwVZPdF9BficQMoGFze8NU7SbbRQaUYxUGdoSnGY6qdGLkz4S4w64FM3tCBEZb4iXuLc5Hup391P4OfakoHwmTgMfUs1FHzwtZZ49ZO6ix2JfVelrWn1JqhTfoxdcFZoDNNjn8jqIFWxs2Frsv0Z0-DFjjo106X3x76H5YsZhK1IHCmbJm58KYXgnOtcL4u7mTQzpw2ywrXfvDL8H5ImLMKORC4_VfC9I8zebxMPPXZxfb-BCT8COBlyYZ2vcPd8j027IRIJpnQKPGjIv1jIwkFbRq-Iwf0saheTAaJwejQxwTlkKWYwaiD8pS_gCxnr5ftfRVIj169esS0cCY2GDAv4FrIXq-Vwq-ZzgmweYsSWtvLWGBNnzcT6jBGBfTb1Q2zur47Ohe01dUXIEQbrT3dPm9Dwmh49-2gSI-jNEXUBil6K8FwjDU5YF-IyN6xcK5iqW9GM0V1-k--PN5_9951us0DNcxi44Bt4pSXVLoFXIxT1b-8VbOnd3CJjngH8AFcznUeHh0qQ-DGbsCD8L7Swe3Yt9J57ls4SBdGuSsZR9JqsLbqeRkxC8pUJXpsXdkODeGJpKcbVwG03ujHbKnb7lEZfbvwW9g7wEwCMQDcpYSk_bT4LladADn_nUdePAf96hp4VnEcvNqW3VMMmmyzDyjchAE1WQGeLx7fFWAgVC4q4vNWwaVnwkA%3D%3D)

---
Peter,

My name is Adam Schwarze, and I’m running for the U.S. Senate in Minnesota.

**I’m a former Navy SEAL who doesn’t beat around the bush.** I’ve put myself in harm's way more times than I can count because I love what this country stands for.

Leadership doesn’t start on the day one is elected; it’s a quality that one learns from a young age - you exercise it, and it develops over time. President Trump personifies it - so does Marco Rubio.

**But Tim Walz?** He lied about his service in the military, resigning in shame so he wouldn’t have to deploy to an active war zone.

That isn’t leadership, it’s cowardice.

**As governor, the Somali community in Minnesota has defrauded taxpayers of hundreds of millions of dollars, including:**

* **$300m** to pay for the therapy of children with autism, who, in fact, didn’t have autism.

* **$250m** stolen from funds meant to feed hungry children.

So far, Governor Walz has taken ZERO accountability and **[I’m calling on him to RESIGN.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=a2e1292fcd014609bafdf8554122f1da&_e=H7HjvwPxxTZxXcF2iJh7a3NA1zdcfQvKFs0GABbC1tAQCyUkP510RPdJ7NZoTyqENj43WkD3hS6jcWfOX2qQxaphmLGkbwVZPdF9BficQMoGFze8NU7SbbRQaUYxUGdoSnGY6qdGLkz4S4w64FM3tCBEZb4iXuLc5Hup391P4OfakoHwmTgMfUs1FHzwtZZ49ZO6ix2JfVelrWn1JqhTfoxdcFZoDNNjn8jqIFWxs2Frsv0Z0-DFjjo106X3x76H5YsZhK1IHCmbJm58KYXgnC-P85VgSd6aNbHIHzF0GEQfNGKFloLEGX7_tYyKmIaauNlLJADayOKsaYGW6RPEMH9sKkb__1zhOVqlJX3rv45eAaUGWN0eTPNJAy9I1hvng4rR8EZl_FZ1CXFzw8tm8t8KrHPQz9CF6uWBXQcp7yMr7sSMbMJ1wAwKaRxx9bJMIY8WJP-LjN_NaBNJ7tGg_72udWlTAgok-wKbYUolW5GBhMrJooGmKaxsfBuUhct2ITVgdCzjCt7ts93UyW-b4ZHL6PiA8B-lBbXYiCGk9FB7M5KA6OXqm0e16yRuJ83V3E0x876crCAL0-awxPkw6PYxs6wJm4nWzgAKM01fqcQ5-xOkdPSVlU2Clne7XGiGZ2TWq26z_cdX06JgWe0lw82qGu8qPneSLq7GrggosKhsFcOOy5fGG5GlVQ0unVTec5zyGk4gBdnj0eXr5Rdt9vYI3aYy8l3kUlw46BSnoklb4-GwCYGIiRQNgUngqDzAz1_hXgO9SxgVwEfPBoN2Nw%3D%3D)**

clean_body: As governor, the Somali community in Minnesota has defrauded taxpayers of hundreds of millions of dollars, including: | Peter, My name is Adam Schwarze, and I’m running for the U.S. Senate in Minnesota. I’m a former Navy SEAL who doesn’t beat around the bush. I’ve put myself in harm's way more times than I can count because I love what this country stands for. Leadership doesn’t start on the day one is elected; it’s a quality that one learns from a young age - you exercise it, and it develops over time. President Trump personifies it - so does Marco Rubio. But Tim Walz? He lied about his service in the military, resigning in shame so he wouldn’t have to deploy to an active war zone. That isn’t leadership, it’s cowardice. As governor, the Somali community in Minnesota has defrauded taxpayers of hundreds of millions of dollars, including: $300m to pay for the therapy of children with autism, who, in fact, didn’t have autism. $250m stolen from funds meant to feed hungry children. So far, Governor Walz has taken ZERO accountability and In service, Adam Schwarze Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate – Minnesota Former Navy SEAL officer Marine Corps Veteran Proud Minnesotan FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

We need leaders who are direct, accountable, and focused on working families. That's what Seth is bringing to the table. Right now, we’re still short of our grassroots goal, and one of the places we need to close the gap is in 34223. This campaign is about delivering a new generation of leadership and ending the status quo that has failed Massachusetts families for too long. We need leaders who are direct, accountable, and focused on working families. That's what Seth is bringing to the table. As of today, we still need 29 more donors from 34223 before the quarter ends. = | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately. name: Team Jon Ossoff
subject: Logging off?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

Hey there, Peter. Before you log off we just have one more request for you:
**[Can you contribute $10 — or any amount — to Jon Ossoff’s campaign ahead of his end-of-quarter FEC fundraising deadline? We’ll explain in a minute, but this is our biggest deadline yet and we need a lot of donations to hit our goal.](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-dec25.lXrKfY&refcode=em251222-1-f-a&t=1&akid=1326%2E5691347%2EtcRA_6)**
Jon is MAGA’s top target next year because he’s the most vulnerable Senator on the ballot in the midterms. That means our team has to build the largest statewide campaign Georgia has ever seen to fight back against their attacks and win.
**And, we’re doing it with grassroots donations.** See, Jon doesn’t accept donations from corporate PACs or federal lobbyists — instead, he relies on donations from folks like you, who chip in a few dollars at a time when they can, to power our efforts.
We know we’ve called on you a lot this month, but we have a critical end-of-quarter public deadline approaching. And since December is a tough month for fundraising for campaigns like ours, we’re falling short of our goals.
**[Can you help us out one more time before you log off tonight by chipping in $10 to Jon’s campaign? Any amount you can give today will help us get back on track and finish the month out strong.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-dec25.lXrKfY&refcode=em251222-1-f-a&t=2&akid=1326%2E5691347%2EtcRA_6)

Email is a critical way to keep up with Jon and his work in the US Senate, but you can click [here](https://act.electjon.com/signup/fewer-emails-signup/?t=9&akid=1326%2E5691347%2EtcRA_6) to sign up to receive fewer emails, or click [here](https://act.electjon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=10&akid=1326%2E5691347%2EtcRA_6) if you'd like to unsubscribe.
clean_body: Hey there, Peter. Before you log off we just have one more request for you: Jon is MAGA’s top target next year because he’s the most vulnerable Senator on the ballot in the midterms. That means our team has to build the largest statewide campaign Georgia has ever seen to fight back against their attacks and win. And, we’re doing it with grassroots donations. See, Jon doesn’t accept donations from corporate PACs or federal lobbyists — instead, he relies on donations from folks like you, who chip in a few dollars at a time when they can, to power our efforts. We know we’ve called on you a lot this month, but we have a critical end-of-quarter public deadline approaching. And since December is a tough month for fundraising for campaigns like ours, we’re falling short of our goals. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | | | | | | | | ** Thank you! Team Ossoff Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate

name: Mark Ronchetti
subject: Governor says Keller didn't even try
body:
Plus: Tren de Aragua gang arrests and a climate bill that could crush you | New for dpwillis67@gmail.com

| | | | | |
---
[|
---](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=585c6e8589&e=567664f14c)
| | | | | | Hey everyone — [big show this week](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=43e077c192&e=567664f14c). The governor is publicly blasting Keller. Ben Shapiro and Megan Kelly had a very public falling out. A Venezuelan gang was holding Zoom calls before ordering a killing in Albuquerque. And the catch-and-release numbers from the sheriff's office will make you sick.

Let's get into it!
---
[|
---](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=03fb696434&e=567664f14c)
| |
**🔥 GOVERNOR GOES NUCLEAR ON KELLER**
The gloves are off. Governor Lujan Grisham just publicly eviscerated Mayor Keller over the failed $7 million National Guard deployment — and the timing is no accident.
Her office called out "lax engagement by local partners" and a criminal justice system that releases offenders "within days or even hours." She even contrasted Albuquerque's failure with Española's success using the same resources.
_We break down why this is happening NOW — after the election — and what it means._**
****⚠️ CATCH-AND-RELEASE: THE NUMBERS ARE INSANE**
The Bernalillo County Sheriff released data from Operation Route 66 that will make your blood boil.
640 arrests. Nearly all released. One guy has 41 arrests. Another has 29. Another has 21. All still walking free.
We show you the "Hall of Famers" and explain why nothing changes.
---
| [Stream Episode Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=d9790d443d&e=567664f14c)
---
| |
**😱 VENEZUELAN GANG OPERATING IN ALBUQUERQUE**
11 members of Tren de Aragua — the notorious Venezuelan prison gang — were just arrested in Albuquerque.
They killed a man, stuffed his body in a suitcase, and buried him at a remote location. Before the killing, gang members held a Zoom conference call with associates abroad to get the order.
**This is what's happening in your city. We have the details.

****🗳️ MIMI STEWART'S CLIMATE BILL COULD CRUSH YOU**
While crime spirals, the legislature is focused on the "Clear Horizons Act" — a climate bill that would devastate oil and gas and raise your energy costs dramatically.
Mark's take: It won't change the planet's temperature one bit, but it WILL bankrupt low-income families.
Contact your legislator before the session starts.
---
| [Stream Episode Now](https://nodoubtaboutitpodcast.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d2649c77b4f4f1f9d512804d2&id=76011ad38b&e=567664f14c)
---
| |
**💥 CONSERVATIVE CIVIL WAR EXPLODES**
Ben Shapiro publicly called out Megan Kelly at Turning Point. Kelly fired back and said they're no longer friends. Candace Owens is now blaming Israel for Charlie Kirk's death. Tucker's speech was a nightmare.
We break down what's really happening — and why the deeper issue is Israel dividing the right.

**🦌 PLUS: WILDLIFE BRIDGE NO ONE'S USING + TRAIN BLOWN OVER IN WYOMING**
Colorado opened the largest wildlife crossing bridge in North America. Animals aren't using it yet. And in Wyoming, an entire train got knocked on its side by wind. Just another week.

🎄 **Join us Wednesday for our Christmas episode! 🎄**
---
|
---

body:

Powered by People is exactly what it sounds like.
Everything we do—from registering new voters to hosting community events in every part of Texas—is powered by people like you. People who believe that showing up matters, that organizing matters, and that people power can change what’s possible and shape our future.
As we head into a critical 2026, we want to say thank you in a small but meaningful way. [**If you chip in any amount today, Beto will send you a postcard with a short note in the new year.**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-202512-postcard.EeYznG&refcode=ema20251222-240554&t=3&akid=240554%2E444211%2EeWa85Z)

This is a reminder that you’re part of something bigger—a people-powered movement that believes democracy works best when everyone is able to make their voice heard.
Powered by People has always been about neighbors organizing neighbors, building power from the ground up, bringing people in, and trusting them to lead the way. And it’s supporters like you who make that possible.
[**Chip in what you can today, and keep an eye on your mailbox!**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-202512-postcard.EeYznG&refcode=ema20251222-240554&t=5&akid=240554%2E444211%2EeWa85Z)

Powered by People

name: Ro Khanna
subject: BREAKING: Rep. Thomas Massie and I announced inherent contempt proceedings against Attorney General Bondi
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]
Peter,
BREAKING: Rep. Thomas Massie and I announced inherent contempt proceedings [https://www.washingtonpost.com/national-security/2025/12/21/epstein-files-photo-bondi-justice-department/Obwkw4gnbZZNNk-Uck61SgBrrs1J8gw11yk] against Attorney General Bondi for the DOJ’s failure to follow the law.
Within hours, the DOJ folded.
After months of stonewalling, they suddenly re-released a key Epstein document – now with “minimal redactions.” A 119-page file they claimed couldn’t be released responsibly was magically releasable once Congress acted.
That didn’t happen because of a tweet.
It happened because we took action. We’re still fighting to ensure our law is upheld and deliver justice for survivors.
https://x.com/rokhanna/status/2002774808321515630?s=46 [https://x.com/rokhanna/status/2002774808321515630?s=46]
Please let me know if you have my back. Sign if you agree: Partial compliance isn’t justice. The law must be fully obeyed – no carve-outs for the powerful. [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/epstein-files-doj-partial-compliance-petition?contactdata=ZnWBxwobAn/SJNh+LCIRJmw0s/Thu5kJpDZ5lOrLmd27vWIP2L+i7+JzMmAHJC65zT4s+pLwaON4MtnauHq/+MXP7sH2HzMU+i5PaZ9Rs9ejq2RCorVhmLf8W8T/I6X1FnmwCFdG4pBg9sMS/vjF1hHKu/7n5Jmcrjn4ZTrSci0WGdsgKwO4Gq5ImMOGQGE3]
SIGN THE PETITION [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/epstein-files-doj-partial-compliance-petition?contactdata=ZnWBxwobAn/SJNh+LCIRJmw0s/Thu5kJpDZ5lOrLmd27vWIP2L+i7+JzMmAHJC65zT4s+pLwaON4MtnauHq/+MXP7sH2HzMU+i5PaZ9Rs9ejq2RCorVhmLf8W8T/I6X1FnmwCFdG4pBg9sMS/vjF1hHKu/7n5Jmcrjn4ZTrSci0WGdsgKwO4Gq5ImMOGQGE3]
Real accountability means:
* Using constitutional power, not just rhetoric
* Standing up to powerful interests
* Forcing accountability — not asking for it
Thank you for having my back.
In solidarity,
Ro Khanna
Wait! One more thing–
Ro doesn't accept a cent from lobbyists or PACs, meaning our work is completely funded by grassroots supporters like you. By donating just $3 today, you’re helping us create a country that works for everyone, not just those at the top. That means a renewed investment in American manufacturing, Medicare for All, student debt relief, and a green future.
If you want to support our people-powered campaign as we continue to fight for progress in Washington, please consider making a donation of $3 or more today. Thank you!

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: One powerful way to fight back:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
One way to fight back is by supporting people-powered campaigns built on grassroots donations like ours.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2735%2E4032634%2EC31S5E)
---
I'll just be blunt: [**If you’re in a place where you can make a contribution to support our grassroots campaign today, it would be a huge help.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3296?t=8&akid=2735%2E4032634%2EC31S5E) Let me explain: Our nation is at a turning point as we enter 2026. Will we be a country that rewards the wealthy and well-connected, or will we build an economy that works for working families? Americans are seeing on full display where Donald Trump and the GOP’s priorities are: Ripping health care away from people. Skyrocketing the cost of everything with their chaotic tariffs. Building gilded ballrooms and bailing out Argentina. Serving billionaires and corporate executives. We need to fight back. One way to do that is by supporting people-powered campaigns built on grassroots donations like ours. It’s a way to show how our democracy can run differently, without the control of billionaires and giant corporations. After December’s FEC fundraising deadline, we’ll tally up all the donations we’ve received this quarter. The total amount raised matters, yes, but here’s the number I’ll really have my eye on: The total number of contributions. **Because that’s the number that shows just how many people are not letting this Administration stop us — and are still in this fight for big, structural change.** [**So if making a financial contribution would make sense right now, could you pitch in $28 or any amount today?**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3296?amount=28&t=9&akid=2735%2E4032634%2EC31S5E)

---
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically:_ |
---
| [DONATE NOW: $3](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3296?t=23&express_lane=true&amount=3&akid=2735%2E4032634%2EC31S5E)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $15](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3296?t=25&express_lane=true&amount=15&akid=2735%2E4032634%2EC31S5E)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $28](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3296?t=27&express_lane=true&amount=28&akid=2735%2E4032634%2EC31S5E)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $50](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3296?t=29&express_lane=true&amount=50&akid=2735%2E4032634%2EC31S5E)
---
| [DONATE NOW: $100](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3296?t=19&express_lane=true&amount=100&akid=2735%2E4032634%2EC31S5E)
---
| [OTHER AMOUNT](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3296?t=21&express_lane=true&akid=2735%2E4032634%2EC31S5E)
---

---
I want you to know that I never expect you to donate to every email, and I’m always grateful to work alongside you no matter how much, how often, or whether you’re able to contribute. If you are in a place to make a contribution, your support today will help demonstrate that there’s strong support for what our campaign is fighting for. In order to defeat Trump in 2026 and beyond, Democrats must speak to the real economic anxieties that families are feeling right now, and have the courage to fight for the policies that will make their lives easier — even if pundits say it’ll never happen or if it bothers billionaires. That's what we're fighting for. Now, when our public fundraising numbers come out, political pundits, Republican operatives, special interests, Big Tech moguls, Wall Street executives, and far-right ideologues will scour them for any signs of weakness. They’ll want to use our fundraising results to tell a story about how our movement is unpopular, and we don’t have what it takes to fight for the changes we’re calling for. **This is a chance to prove them wrong.** [**In order to hit our goals, campaign hard in 2026, and make real change for working people, we’re relying on a strong response to this email today. So if you’re able to, please pitch in any amount ahead of our next critical fundraising deadline — and help power our fight.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3296?t=15&akid=2735%2E4032634%2EC31S5E) Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth
| | | |
---
| [DONATE](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/3296?t=13&akid=2735%2E4032634%2EC31S5E)
---

Americans are seeing on full display where Donald Trump and the GOP’s priorities are: Ripping health care away from people. Skyrocketing the cost of everything with their chaotic tariffs. Building gilded ballrooms and bailing out Argentina. Serving billionaires and corporate executives. We need to fight back. One way to do that is by supporting people-powered campaigns built on grassroots donations like ours. It’s a way to show how our democracy can run differently, without the control of billionaires and giant corporations. After December’s FEC fundraising deadline, we’ll tally up all the donations we’ve received this quarter. The total amount raised matters, yes, but here’s the number I’ll really have my eye on: The total number of contributions. Because that’s the number that shows just how many people are not letting this Administration stop us — and are still in this fight for big, structural change. If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | | | | | I want you to know that I never expect you to donate to every email, and I’m always grateful to work alongside you no matter how much, how often, or whether you’re able to contribute. If you are in a place to make a contribution, your support today will help demonstrate that there’s strong support for what our campaign is fighting for. In order to defeat Trump in 2026 and beyond, Democrats must speak to the real economic anxieties that families are feeling right now, and have the courage to fight for the policies that will make their lives easier — even if pundits say it’ll never happen or if it bothers billionaires. That's what we're fighting for. Now, when our public fundraising numbers come out, political pundits, Republican operatives, special interests, Big Tech moguls, Wall Street executives, and far-right ideologues will scour them for any signs of weakness. They’ll want to use our fundraising results to tell a story about how our movement is unpopular, and we don’t have what it takes to fight for the changes we’re calling for. This is a chance to prove them wrong. Thanks for being a part of this, Elizabeth | | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- | Paid for by Warren for Senate All content © 2025 Warren for Senate, All Rights Reserved PO Box 171375, Boston, MA 02117 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com We'll miss you, but you can always .

clean_body: Peter, I'm not alone in believing you truly deserve this. My colleagues and I at House GOP Headquarters were all in agreement. In fact, we've made a unanimous decision. If there's anyone who has a record worthy of this, it's you. First of all, Congratulations! This is reserved only for top supporters of our movement. But I have to say, you've been so outstanding in your record of support that you've built up a profile that falls within the TOP Tier of GOP Patriots. one of House GOP's most trusted patriots, and you deserve to have the status to reflect that! And before you click, I want to let you know that we'll be leaning on you for your opinion on matters as we move forward. I'm putting this deal on the table because we can't afford to lose our most trusted allies when our majority is as thin as it is right now! You, God Bless You and God Bless America! Sincerely, Mike Johnson56th Speaker of the House On behalf of House GOP HQ (Platinum Committee)| | Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. NRCC 320 First St SE Washington, DC 20003 By providing your cell phone or mobile phone number you are consenting to receive calls and texts, including autodialed and automated calls and texts, to that number with campaign notifications from the National Republican Congressional Committee (21818). NRCC is happy to help at 888-606-1023. Reply HELP for help, STOP to end. MessFreqMayVary. Msg&DataRatesMayApply. Message frequency may vary. Terms and Conditions . |

I met my wife, Suzanne, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans in 1989. We married three years later and have two amazing children, Tucker and Troy. _**They continue to make me proud every single day.**_

[](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=8deab83ad5744bdd90bbe7f3eb697677&_e=Be8unUgN3RnUynAsoXI_BLj9WXLnFy1chgGGrmx2vZbWdpTCFHK0w5T5xf4RAmCYVeRTvqXdjJfG69aHC1AwanJbcU3J-itUGTVLsHfzD1vWURCq2cRzDEJhqOMDYNDOp6YIWkhcJBBg9E9Locq6B5RyNhggcFWiCk72-mu3B7SJ4U7TKY36ZiGePMx3PQyNEMepBEH9KjRJL0QWf1DAMHDF7jklIxJzogEmHR2wbg70tza1OpRrgOvVQ7xT9x1YLCZgETQ9L3CV-jK_Q8vaom7QwKJvBpTV0abpbmPG3hens1ose8PGb800B1ZsaDMmGPOq6VczAq6PRHMykHStva4V2O61kHU53Ym8Xz-wtCAcfDFaaEtcNeyIdCdzrDxz0OM0KQDqVfuN_HnZ-cVfzmz2oSQu_2vzwG_dzmqFaKFPwWXch7xVTBznbMRGP7G78wemrNxxCco7G3gbdl1Itj4Frehgap4-V8Nf4dGr43zODJv9TreNqYSyj0oTMcwU-r15syrnIklQy_cBGs-Gh4yd2OdpcMEVJaJwBoYtLy0ZEsben5gJHWiKWSxy1IlW)

Just two years later, I started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, where I went on to become their defensive coordinator. By the time I left the U, we had created one of the most storied programs in college football history. We won three AP national championships, and I coached future Hall-of-Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

[](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=8deab83ad5744bdd90bbe7f3eb697677&_e=Be8unUgN3RnUynAsoXI_BLj9WXLnFy1chgGGrmx2vZbWdpTCFHK0w5T5xf4RAmCYVeRTvqXdjJfG69aHC1AwanJbcU3J-itUGTVLsHfzD1vWURCq2cRzDEJhqOMDYNDOp6YIWkhcJBBg9E9Locq6B5RyNhggcFWiCk72-mu3B7SJ4U7TKY36ZiGePMx3PQyNi681fphGElW1706qdpbX5uE_objIWSr_--_R9MUPb49GboIiTbAp6GS6U5Eov3y4WOOyjKQslLRPlTEUXKZUiuiRFUkfVonl0tMxvs4ZSlcCg2oH2HmNnd2Pr4VPt_kCybaliFPryNIeYxFBuTB9jdfy6wS6Uf5ARQF_76I5GXZat_oD92lYeWZlM8KkewNrwx17rCRRRAtYftjQyhIqZWSZXORR2lgrodaUSZC2rfmXCRKIYqbYJ6qTIptAi0QSoNkk4QR0Mek7eAZRhmU-9yHeTzQSONilhipoWDKTtTHMxgwXQRnrxEJnlD2OFi3AFine94seAfkuAvoMYxqf2cQy2YxJRyFKFKsv_PTG28v_KPjLwnwAuH1aLIaar77-)

I continued coaching at Texas Tech University and the University of Cincinnati until I retired from coaching in 2016 as one of the top 50 most-winning college football coaches of all time. But I wasn't done winning just yet.

**In 2020, I went from Coach Tuberville to Senator Tuberville. After talking to my fellow Alabamians, I was enlightened by President Trump's concerns about the direction of our country, and I decided to do something about it. I ran for the United States Senate and won.**

**Throughout my time in Washington, D.C., I 've fought nonstop on President Trump's behalf.** Whether it was fighting back against the countless witch-hunts, challenging the Biden-Harris Administration's Radical and harmful policies, or working with President Trump to secure our border, protect women in sports, and make our military prioritize readiness over wokeness, I always worked hard. I stood on principle, just like my folks taught me at a young age.

[](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=8deab83ad5744bdd90bbe7f3eb697677&_e=Be8unUgN3RnUynAsoXI_BLj9WXLnFy1chgGGrmx2vZbWdpTCFHK0w5T5xf4RAmCYVeRTvqXdjJfG69aHC1AwanJbcU3J-itUGTVLsHfzD1vWURCq2cRzDEJhqOMDYNDOp6YIWkhcJBBg9E9Locq6B5RyNhggcFWiCk72-mu3B7SJ4U7TKY36ZiGePMx3PQyN7oEp8O_Hy19e79GQOdVEUbyJ4TgTUVG3B4OtDU2AguVxc8kqXigMANQ67EZSV9HH7iW_iNbNkATbYLPSxO4vaNV_ls3yS0x0sGwKRQUxMtTMFHK7rYGwlt2Z4NgZSnXWqqxsBh0OOosv7LqagWY2ADKjd8kxhu699qL9uQdQu9dGhgs9cYjGM53hpLhV68QMFIAjAXEgFSVktfehdCV6sHSu5K1-MiwxewcE3XS8ah7ZNU0gBjIXIj5fB24sf-i30V6DZEx9s63wZ7r-5sp8lIfISpKX8PPsnfjsA_e-S13P10ZRqqdijcQ7f_iH4alyMOnUiXDw9_P3CryukLqGMm558QzJmWsRlYbz9VL-QBciXVW5xNyfqnWNJI8AXwx9)
**Now, I 'm running for Governor in Alabama so I can continue making an impact for my community back home.**

The Radical Left has circled me as one of their top gubernatorial targets to defeat in 2026. They're going to spend MILLIONS of dollars trying to beat me. But if coaching in the SEC has taught me one thing, it's this: there will always be a rival trying to bring you down, but with hard work and a strong team, you can go 13-0.

**I 'm looking to go 2-0 in my lifetime as a political candidate, and I need your help to do so.**

[**Peter, can you chip in just $10 before midnight to give my campaign the resources we need to defeat the Radical Left and protect America First Alabamian values?**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=8deab83ad5744bdd90bbe7f3eb697677&_e=Be8unUgN3RnUynAsoXI_BLj9WXLnFy1chgGGrmx2vZbWdpTCFHK0w5T5xf4RAmCYVeRTvqXdjJfG69aHC1AwanJbcU3J-itUGTVLsHfzD1vWURCq2cRzDEJhqOMDYNDOp6YIWkhcJBBg9E9Locq6B5RyNhggcFWiCk72-mu3B7SJ4U7TKY36ZiGePMx3PQyNSYzEUPd-Gbyvh3MvvF0vWsSfOK7LOoxmdlFsixH-6r9y-q3jZFko0Uadq1wPO9yCLYyfNRJXDxa0e0V-bioB2puxDZdEoMEjeAOcehBZ-44PZfXRV_BDg0GjqNqoEgQDMyDv1b1zENQMVvT6P1rLTcQUp-oZ660q6p9gti2caLAROZDM8jg-RVgIkhM9mN0T4r9PMhrBnlSkRZuplKNYqd9JxLbI9pOI7P6mgJseK4KibWUoEbIcTEOWurgsLcaxvd4N684O91s3qpnLrYdRlgGFhvou9bb0LcEaFFPd2esdGBXzSAbDf0WJ1KCkAob5n3YePiZWtBfrMYwoMqNWr_UO_DP_O3AKkCOI9QxSTXqKDTbfUZib10WqF4Lkf2VW)

I won't take up more of your time.

[**Thank you for reading this all the way through, and please consider donating any amount to help!**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=8deab83ad5744bdd90bbe7f3eb697677&_e=Be8unUgN3RnUynAsoXI_BLj9WXLnFy1chgGGrmx2vZbWdpTCFHK0w5T5xf4RAmCYVeRTvqXdjJfG69aHC1AwanJbcU3J-itUGTVLsHfzD1vWURCq2cRzDEJhqOMDYNDOp6YIWkhcJBBg9E9Locq6B5RyNhggcFWiCk72-mu3B7SJ4U7TKY36ZiGePMx3PQyNtxstHtXuOKe9JBKQi10TG2bhrRQfzp44GNQyz28ObBUmb0wJJZ6jNMshOFGWbD_iZJnyK-NeKTsfkylVUmzZ9hh1hyrnT8f62RvP-xuNCcIW5_5PIYgzzCpf90_MDlLDpJJiWMd-PAn9zq-AAwSlGmYkfd6NhLcRZE6g7lj6fWvjBUTHcHD5B7XzHZR5MoPvSXuQPDqZk0ddNZafXB3VczBdDkJ_M6wbue9z-L-huZLO5rFAu2VqCRf9dqZQxKA9ysUqfnZjbbDNSQUWxmmcDGECi-JKA1BrFhMhWywkXUqmb43fz5XUb71mU_js2c4m1GNRP6w0XrId5HJAzFqb7aLkkX-dL0i-qY8kNaSYVQT2k0LFeQvv3yVV0fKTi89w)

_Coach Tommy Tuberville_

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? _

Whether it was fighting back against the countless witch-hunts, challenging the Biden-Harris Administration's Radical and harmful policies, or working with President Trump to secure our border, protect women in sports, and make our military prioritize readiness over wokeness, I always worked hard. I stood on principle, just like my folks taught me at a young age. Now, I 'm running for Governor in Alabama so I can continue making an impact for my community back home. The Radical Left has circled me as one of their top gubernatorial targets to defeat in 2026. They're going to spend MILLIONS of dollars trying to beat me. But if coaching in the SEC has taught me one thing, it's this: there will always be a rival trying to bring you down, but with hard work and a strong team, you can go 13-0. I 'm looking to go 2-0 in my lifetime as a political candidate, and I need your help to do so. I won't take up more of your time. Best, Coach Tommy Tuberville | Meet Coach Tuberville: Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces. In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud. In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson. In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others. In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime. Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? PAID FOR BY TUBERVILLE FOR GOVERNOR, INC PO Box 43124 Birmingham, AL 35243 Copyright (C) 2025 Tuberville for Governor, Inc, All rights reserved.

body:
Mike Lindell is Donald Trump’s pick for Governor of Minnesota.
| **Mike Lindell is running for Governor of Minnesota.**

The MyPillow CEO and snake oil salesman is bringing his election-denying, con-manning, Trump-sycophantic self to this governor’s race.

name: Sarah McBride (via LeftNet)
subject: What I shared on the Capitol steps
body:
I need you standing with me.
#
It’s Congresswoman Sarah McBride. I want to share what I recently shared on the Capitol steps:
I didn’t have the courage to come out until I was 21.
The truth is, I had known who I was for my entire life, and that meant 21 years of pain. 21 years of a kind of homesickness that only went away when I was finally able to get the care I needed.
My biggest regret in life is that I never had a childhood without that pain.
So many years later, I marvel at the courage of transgender young people today, who are sharing themselves with their families and this world despite the toxicity and the hate that too often comes from Congress and from the politicians inside it.
All any of us want is to live a life of purpose and happiness and wholeness, and I carry that with me every day in Congress — especially right now.
In just days, millions of Americans will see their health insurance premiums skyrocket.
And instead of doing something about it, **Mike Johnson and House Republicans just passed some of the most extreme anti-trans bills we’ve seen — including legislation that risks _jailing_ parents and doctors for affirming transgender children and following medical best practices.**
Republican politicians have made their priorities painfully clear: all they care about is making the rich richer and attacking trans people.
As the only openly trans member of Congress, I refuse to stay silent. I will keep fighting for the dignity, humanity, and fair treatment of every person in Delaware and across the country.
**But if we’re going to tackle this Republican obsession, I need you standing with me.**
**[Please rush a donation to my campaign to help us keep pushing back. Every donation sends a powerful message that we won’t let Republicans get away with weaponizing trans kids as political pawns.](https://act.leftnet.org/go/21450?c0=leftnet_em20251222.luJtga&refcode=em20251222-1417&amount=5&t=1&akid=1417%2E2118727%2ELVy7xX)**
**[DONATE ››](https://act.leftnet.org/go/21450?c0=leftnet_em20251222.luJtga&refcode=em20251222-1417&amount=5&t=2&akid=1417%2E2118727%2ELVy7xX)**
Thank you,
— Sarah

**LeftNet is an online political network fighting for progressive causes and candidates focused on social, racial, economic, and environmental justice.**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leftnet.org/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=3&akid=1417%2E2118727%2ELVy7xX)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leftnet.org/signup/update_your_information/?t=4&akid=1417%2E2118727%2ELVy7xX)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leftnet.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=1417%2E2118727%2ELVy7xX)

Email us: [team@leftnet.org](mailto:team@leftnet.org)

clean_body: | | Peter, Today, the Blue Dogs are proud to endorse Jamie Ager in North Carolina’s 11th Congressional District. Jamie is running to defeat Republican Chuck Edwards. = = = Jamie Ager is a father, business owner, and fourth-generation farmer who has spent his life growing food, building community, and working alongside his neighbors. He knows what it takes to support local businesses, lower costs for working families, and stay loyal to your communities. Jamie was raised on his family’s Hickory Nut Gap Farm, where he learned the values of hard work, public service, and looking out for one another. Those values run deep in his family: his grandfather served in Congress and the state legislature and helped shape early programs like Medicare and Medicaid. His father also served in the State House. Chuck Edwards has taken a very different path. He voted to cut Medicare to fund massive tax breaks for ultra-wealthy billionaires, putting North Carolina families at risk. = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- Thank you for supporting candidates with deep local roots and real-world values, Blue Dog PAC * If you would like to receive fewer emails, we understand. to sign up for only the most important updates, or you can . name: Ruben Gallego
subject: We need people like Bobby in Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
#

Peter,
It's Ruben.
When I ran for this seat, I made it clear we needed leadership that truly represented us and our values – leaders who would stand up for affordable healthcare, better jobs and wages, and our democracy.
I stand by it. As the Trump administration continues its assault on our constitutional rights, and families across the country bear the brunt of Republican-led chaos, we need leaders in Congress who won’t back down when the going gets tough. **That’s why I couldn’t be prouder to support my friend, Bobby Pulido, in his congressional run for Texas’ 15th District.**
[SUPPORT BOBBY](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-bp-em.IsbVUv&refcode=em251222-1-160&t=1&akid=4050%2E734936%2EuBLU6T)
You may know him from his music, a distinct but familiar Tejano sound that made its way into our car radios, living rooms, and family get-togethers. What you may not know about him is his deep commitment to his faith, family, and community in South Texas, as well as his drive to make his community a place of opportunity where every family can thrive.
**These are all values that connect us and what we need more of in Washington. TX-15 is one of the most competitive districts in the country, and flipping it could mean regaining power in Congress.[If you’re with me, I hope you’ll join me in supporting Bobby’s campaign with a contribution of $10 or whatever you can give today:](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-bp-em.IsbVUv&refcode=em251222-1-160&t=2&akid=4050%2E734936%2EuBLU6T)**

Sign my [E-QUAL](https://votekern.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2add33eab54cf78e2fdebc3c8&id=5846fa8e16&e=b78dc6f299) to put me on the ballot!**

| Supporters and Friends,

It’s the season of giving, and when you have a large family like mine, I know it can start to put a dent in your wallet.

**I believe your money is best left in your hands, not with the government.** That was the credo I fulfilled for almost a decade in Phoenix, and I’ll do the same again when elected to represent LD-27.

That begins with you lending your signature at this [**E-QUAL link**](https://votekern.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2add33eab54cf78e2fdebc3c8&id=f06fa320f2&e=b78dc6f299).
In less than five minutes, you can help put my name on next year’s ballot and give yourself a conservative champion who will prioritize YOUR income, not Katie Hobbs’.

_As a member of the**Arizona Freedom Caucus** , I was one of the earliest proponents of 2023's enormous tax breaks, putting over $200 Million back into Arizonans' hands—for groceries, for insurance, and yes, for Christmas presents_.

That can happen again: the process starts with a safe and secure sign-up at E-QUAL.

🎙️ Featuring: Fernand Amandi - Principal at Bendixen & Amandi International: [(https://bendixenandamandi.com/)](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/cb8a3b4c-571e-4be8-8bd7-4e709f1f9fba?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**Chuck Rocha is BACK** from another adventure of a lifetime to break down the SHOCKING **Miami 2025 mayoral election** that has Democrats buzzing and Republicans worried.
Thanks for reading! Subscribe for free to receive new posts and support my work.
[Pledge your support](https://substack..i7NJiO4mrfKwWUb3elUwbg8pEn7yhloK4iIIl1efwgE?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=182372612)
**Esteemed political analyst** **Fernand Amandi** joins Chuck to explain how **Democrat Eileen Higgins crushed her Republican opponent by 19 points** in a city that's **65%+ Hispanic** and where **Trump JUST won by 13 points**. This wasn't some MAGA extremist losing--it was a respected Cuban-American Republican with Trump's full endorsement.
### 🔥 **THE NUMBERS ARE WILD:**
* Hillary won Miami-Dade by 30 points in 2016
* Trump won it by 13 points in 2024
* Democrat just won Miami by 19 points in 2025
* That's a 43-point swing in less than a decade!

Fernand reveals why Democrats are now overperforming by **DOUBLE DIGITS** in special elections across Florida, Georgia, New Jersey, and Virginia. Is Florida back in play for 2026? Are Cuban-American voters shifting left?
Fernand explains why Florida, written off as a red state after 2024, might be back in play if Democrats reinvest and stay focused on kitchen-table economics.

name: Team Deb
subject: Can we be honest with you?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO**
body:
We're worried.

| | | [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/134?t=1&akid=6405%2E400544%2EVDCaxn)
---
Can we be honest with you, friend? We're worried.
Over the past few weeks, fundraising has _really_ slowed down — **so much so that we told Deb how worried we are that we might not hit our critical $50K year-end goal!**
Even worse, a new self-funded GOP opponent just entered the race and is already pledging at least _at least_ $2 million of his own money to buy this seat.
Deb doesn't come from money, and she's never had the means to self-fund a campaign, friend. That’s why we turn to people like you, who are helping us build a people-powered campaign from the ground up.
**With the GOP ready to buy this race, we have to ask:**_[**Will you rush a donation right now to help close the gap on our $50K year-end goal so we can elect Deb the next governor of New Mexico and build an even brighter future for our families?**](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/2932?refcode=jtk103-fr-nd&t=2&akid=6405%2E400544%2EVDCaxn)_
| | [Donate](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/2938?refcode=jtk103-fr-nd&t=3&akid=6405%2E400544%2EVDCaxn)
---
Thank you,

Team Deb
_P.S from Deb Haaland: I know times are tough right now. Like you, I see my grocery bill rising every time I shop, so I understand if you're not in a place to contribute._ _Support comes in all different manners and I appreciate you reading my emails, hearing from my team, answering my surveys, and chipping in when you can. From the bottom of my heart, thank you._
|
* * *
| | [Donate >>](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/2940?refcode=jtk103-fr-nd&t=4&akid=6405%2E400544%2EVDCaxn)
---
| | [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/1102?t=5&akid=6405%2E400544%2EVDCaxn)
---

[**Update Your Information**](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/?&t=7&akid=6405%2E400544%2EVDCaxn)
[**Unsubscribe**](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?&t=8&akid=6405%2E400544%2EVDCaxn)

body:

Donald Trump is pushing through a slate of dishonest, dangerously
unqualified judicial nominees — people who refuse to admit who won the
2020 election and who dismiss January 6 as nothing more than a “political
issue.”

These are loyalists chosen to rewrite the rules, rubber-stamp extremism,
and undermine our democracy from the bench.

And 18 Democratic Senators are still voting YES on these nominees.

Yes — Democrats. Senators who claim to fight for democracy are helping
Trump stack the courts with people who reject basic facts and excuse an
insurrection. It’s unacceptable. And it stops now.

Our [ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/55563?redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fdj-em-20251222-ncj%3Frefcode%3Dem20251222-61017&t=1003&akid=61017%2E1407376%2EYLs6um ]No Crony Judges campaign draws an unmistakable line: Any Senator

clean_body: Peter, this is important: A California AM radio station cancelled Katie Porter’s interview because they were afraid she’d hold Donald Trump accountable—and feared Trump would come after them. Not because of scheduling. Not because of breaking news. Because Katie tells the truth and won’t back down. Katie has taken on Big Banks, Big Pharma, and powerful special interests—and she’s fought the Trump Administration before and won. If they won’t give Katie a microphone out of fear, we’ll take our message straight to voters—fast. Every grassroots donation helps us organize and fight back—no matter who tries to shut us out. Thank you, Team Katie Porter Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change.

subject: What's Your Superpower?
body:

| | | | | |
# What’s Your Superpower?
---
| | With my first fundraising deadline on December 31st and the primary election on March 3rd,**NOW IS THE MOMENT to get involved in our campaign!**
This next week is critical to ensure we have the resources to hit the ground running before early voting starts on February 17th!
**EVERYONE HAS A DIFFERENT SUPERPOWER!**
---
| | **If you don’t have time to volunteer,****then please consider**[**making a donation between**](https://drkristinhook.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fd888d2bb4a2d4cad917af4b9&id=532b24e35b&e=395a33a3d2)[**now and 11:59pm on December 31st**](https://drkristinhook.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fd888d2bb4a2d4cad917af4b9&id=a7fbd42b4f&e=395a33a3d2)******to help us continue building our campaign!**
_No amount is too small, and_ _recurring donations are always appreciated!_

**If you don’t have money to give,****then please **[**sign up to volunteer**](https://drkristinhook.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fd888d2bb4a2d4cad917af4b9&id=5cbce8ff42&e=395a33a3d2)[**your time with us**](https://drkristinhook.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fd888d2bb4a2d4cad917af4b9&id=e26c48430a&e=395a33a3d2)**to help us reach voters in****January and February throughout the district!**
_Even a couple of hours to make calls, knock doors,__or help with events makes a real difference._
---
[|
---](https://drkristinhook.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fd888d2bb4a2d4cad917af4b9&id=6b1789e56e&e=395a33a3d2)
| |
In the meantime, enjoy a well-deserved holiday with your loved ones! We're all going to need it to be ready for 2026!
With Gratitude,

name: Mark Kelly
subject: BREAKING: Escalation from Pete Hegseth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
The Department of Defense is upgrading its preliminary review of Mark Kelly to an official investigation.
Folks, Mark Kelly here.
They are escalating.
[](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251222_2.cC7mxR&refcode=em20251222-2&t=1&akid=4108%2E582294%2EW81nMQ)
We hadn't heard anything significant since December 10th, and then they dropped this.
Honestly, we learned about this the same as everyone else. We found out that Trump called for my arrest and execution by tweet. We heard about this investigation for the first time by tweet. And now that they're escalating, we hear it by tweet — again.
Trump and Hegseth won't let this go — but I refuse to back down. And I need you with me to have any chance against them.
**[Please. If you’ve got my back: Split a donation of $5 between me and Chris Pappas.](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251222_2.cC7mxR&refcode=em20251222-2&t=2&akid=4108%2E582294%2EW81nMQ)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251222_2.cC7mxR&amount=5&refcode=em20251222-2&t=21&akid=4108%2E582294%2EW81nMQ)**
Thank you in advance for the help.
Mark
[](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20251222_2.cC7mxR&refcode=em20251222-2&t=22&akid=4108%2E582294%2EW81nMQ)

subject: We Won. They Apologized. He's Coming Home!
body:
A federal judge ordered Zahid released--after months of unlawful detention and a stunning courtroom collapse by the government.

| |
---|---|---

# [We Won. They Apologized. He's Coming Home!](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3260111&post_id=182373306&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgyMzczMzA2LCJpYXQiOjE3NjY0NDYzNjgsImV4cCI6MTc2OTAzODM2OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMyNjAxMTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.qEIHXt02Mkr3HVKekcJT_u4nyCTB_EavQ34tgPi0va4)
### A federal judge ordered Zahid released--after months of unlawful detention and a stunning courtroom collapse by the government.
| | [Melissa Chaudhry](https://substack.com/@melissa4congress)
---
| Dec 22
---
| [](https://substack.com/@melissa4congress)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3260111&post_id=182373306&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgyMzczMzA2LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc2NjQ0NjM2OCwiZXhwIjoxNzY5MDM4MzY4LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzI2MDExMSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.mkT_AJhYprr6KOZ9HCmUA3wB750aYXkiK9PSlXSa9Yg&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3260111&post_id=182373306&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgyMzczMzA2LCJpYXQiOjE3NjY0NDYzNjgsImV4cCI6MTc2OTAzODM2OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMyNjAxMTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.qEIHXt02Mkr3HVKekcJT_u4nyCTB_EavQ34tgPi0va4&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3260111&post_id=182373306&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgyMzczMzA2LCJpYXQiOjE3NjY0NDYzNjgsImV4cCI6MTc2OTAzODM2OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMyNjAxMTEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.qEIHXt02Mkr3HVKekcJT_u4nyCTB_EavQ34tgPi0va4)
---
| | [](https://substack..l4HEsT3vlMbmYqhYIt7u0zfB4EyO_hQSzkECngOUUdM?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/melissa4congress/p/we-won-they-apologized-hes-coming?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

**A federal judge just ordered Zahid released --and I'm writing this from outside the gates of NWIPC on a cold, blustery solstice day, with the kids asleep in the car and our people on the phone, waiting to receive him.**
We have the court's order in hand.
And right now--**as I type this** --Zahid has told me he's already been processed out from inside the facility. The only thing left is the last administrative step on ICE's side.
We're here. It's happening.
* * *
## What happened in court today (and why it matters)
Within the **first 30 seconds** of the hearing, the government attorney--the one who is supposed to argue _why it 's "fine" that my husband is in detention_--**caved.**
She apologized directly to the Court and to Zahid **for the mistake of his detention.**
Then, under the judge's questioning, the government proceeded to **change the legal basis for Zahid 's detention--twice--right there in open court.** After all the briefing. After all the declarations. After all the posturing.
We had an experienced federal attorney in the room with us--a supporter with roughly **30 years** under her belt--who told me she had _never_ seen anything like it: a government lawyer so visibly uncomfortable, trying to defend something so legally unsupportable, that the posture collapsed almost immediately.
And then the judge did what judges are supposed to do when the government breaks the law:
**He ordered Zahid released.**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/074bb819-79b1-436b-b2cd-3a1d4b347991?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* * *
## What the judge's written order says (plain English)
The Court **granted the petition for writ of habeas corpus** and **ordered ICE to release Zahid from custody.**
The order also makes something else very clear and very important: **as long as the Ninth Circuit 's stay of removal remains in place**, ICE **cannot just grab him again** as if nothing happened. If they try to revoke his release, the order requires **written notice of the basis** and **an appropriate opportunity to respond** first.
And the Court required ICE to **confirm his release in writing** to the Court within **24 hours.**
* * *
## The part I want everyone to see (the "salty footnote")
Federal judges do not write like this casually.
In the Court's order, the judge notes that government counsel admitted they **" erred"** in claiming the wrong detention statute--and then the Court drops this line:
> "At some point... one has to ask, _' where were the lawyers?'_"
That is not a throwaway jab. That is a judge putting a bright, public spotlight on what happened here:
* Zahid was held for **months** in ICE custody,
* based on a **clearly erroneous** legal position,
* and the government only tried to scramble into a new theory **at oral argument** --after all the damage was already done.

A federal court calling the government's position **" clearly erroneous"** is the opposite of "this is a close case." It's the Court saying: **this never should have happened.**
* * *
## The deeper truth underneath the legal drama
This case is not about paperwork.
It's about what it means when the government can take a man's liberty--**a disabled veteran in a wheelchair, a husband, a father of U.S. citizen children, a public servant with a decades-long history of showing up for community** --and then, when finally challenged in federal court, respond with: _We 're sorry. We had the wrong basis. Actually--wait--maybe it's this other basis. Actually--hold on--maybe it's this._
That is not "normal." That is not "how the system is supposed to work."
Due process exists precisely because **power without process destroys human beings.**
Today, in that courtroom, the rule of law held.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0b2a4b48-22a6-4e89-bb31-b56e0bd70390?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* * *
## Right now
I'm outside NWIPC. It's windy. It's winter-bright. It's the solstice.
The kids are sleeping in the car.
We have a camera ready. We have supporters on the line. We have the order.
And my husband is being released.
**We won.**

name: America Fitzpatrick, LCV
subject: URGENT 🚨 34 new drilling leases announced. We need your help to stop them:
body:
To view this mail in a browser, copy https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTMzNDE4NjgS1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjM2MDI3NTIxNAS2&mt=1&rt=0 into your browser.
https://links.messages.lcv. We’re running out of time, Peter. Hundreds of people from around the country have stepped up today for Giving Tuesday, but we’re still running short of the 1,000 members we need to unlock an additional $100,000 for our work before midnight tonight. And with the Trump administration accelerating some of the most extreme anti-environment, pro-polluter attacks in modern history,falling short is simply not an option. We’re asking you, Peter: will you renew your LCV membership right now while membership is only $5 to help us unlock an additional $100,000 to oppose the Trump administration’s attempts to exploit our public lands and roll back climate progress? https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/pNy7f3pX- This isn’t just about hitting a number. It’s about having the resources we need to challenge these increasingly reckless orders and attempts to shred environmental safeguards — and stop the polluter handouts that Trump and his allies are fast-tracking. RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/3Z0ec-~ Every single person who steps up today is critical to our efforts — here’s why this Giving Tuesday is so important: Trump is trying to erase the scientific and legal foundation of climate action. By dismantling the Endangerment Finding, which affirms that greenhouse gas emissions harm our health and welfare, Trump’s EPA would hand fossil fuel companies a free pass to spew climate pollution into our air. He’s also ending the program that required big polluters to report their pollution, making it nearly impossible to track what they’re spewing or hold them accountable.
Decades of established pollution protections are being peeled away. More than a dozen rules that keep toxic pollution out of the air we breathe and water we drink to protect our health are on the chopping block, tossed aside to allow fossil fueled power plants to cut corners and shift the burden of their damage onto our communities.
The Trump administration is giving away the Arctic to corporate polluters, working to allow more drilling in one of the planet’s last intact ecosystems. Mining roads carved through national parks and preserves. Fire-sale auctions in critical ecosystems. Hundreds of millions of acres of U.S. waters off Alaska potentially opened to drilling. It could do irreparable damage to wildlife, our climate, and Alaska Native communities. We’re working every day with our 30 state affiliates, organizing on the ground, exposing backroom deals and corruption, rallying voters, and defending the treasured and unique places that define our country. But meeting this moment requires resources — especially as we go up against big polluters and fossil fuel opponents. This $100,000 match challenge, and how many people step up this Giving Tuesday, will determine how hard we can push back. Peter, your renewal right now powers our work to protect people and the planet. Will you renew before MIDNIGHT TONIGHT to help keep this movement strong when it matters most? $5 is all it takes. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/KybpT- Every contribution brings us closer. And the clock is ticking. Thanks for standing with us, Chris Brooks
Vice President of Membership
League of Conservation Voters This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you,update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=13341868&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjM2MDI3NTIxNAS2&spReportId=MjM2MDI3NTIxNAS2.Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=13341868&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjM2MDI3NTIxNAS2&spReportId=MjM2MDI3NTIxNAS2 from our supporter list.Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, Suite 700
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 DONATE https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/EZ_

My bipartisan bill to ban members of Congress and their families from trading stocks is gaining real momentum, and it’s happening faster than many expected.

body:
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=1175%2E181023%2EMoGaX7)
Folks, this is Wes, finance director for Jocelyn Benson’s campaign.
I get it — your inbox is probably full of political emails. Trust me, mine is too. But will you bear with me for just a moment while I explain why I had to reach out — **[and why a $5 contribution to Jocelyn’s campaign is so key right now?](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q42025.hprbVa&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251222_PM1_V1_S1&amount=5&t=2&akid=1175%2E181023%2EMoGaX7)**
[DONATE](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/854?c0=jmb-em-q42025.hVxyII&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251222_PM1_V1_S1&t=3&akid=1175%2E181023%2EMoGaX7)
---
I won’t sugarcoat it. **Our fundraising is slowing down at the worst possible moment.**
Our campaign’s next major test is just a week and a half away — so while fundraising might be slowing down, our team is moving full steam ahead to hit the ground running in 2026.
**Look, last time around, John James, our Devos-backed opponent, outraised us.**
To be honest, if that happens again, it could give our opponents and their right-wing mega donors reason to cast a lot of doubt on our campaign as we head into the final stretch.
The stakes are too high to fall short. **Let’s show everyone what we’ve got.**
**[If you’re with Jocelyn, can you donate to her campaign right now, ahead of the upcoming year-end fundraising deadline?](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q42025.hprbVa&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20251222_PM1_V1_S1&amount=5&t=4&akid=1175%2E181023%2EMoGaX7)**

clean_body: Folks, this is Wes, finance director for Jocelyn Benson’s campaign. I get it — your inbox is probably full of political emails. Trust me, mine is too. But will you bear with me for just a moment while I explain why I had to reach out — I won’t sugarcoat it. Our fundraising is slowing down at the worst possible moment. Our campaign’s next major test is just a week and a half away — so while fundraising might be slowing down, our team is moving full steam ahead to hit the ground running in 2026. Look, last time around, John James, our Devos-backed opponent, outraised us. To be honest, if that happens again, it could give our opponents and their right-wing mega donors reason to cast a lot of doubt on our campaign as we head into the final stretch. The stakes are too high to fall short. Let’s show everyone what we’ve got. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | We’re really appreciative of this team. We don’t take your support for granted. — Wes Finance Director Team Benson

name: John Fetterman
subject: holiday wishes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
| | |
---
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/50482?refcode=jtk357-ot-fl&t=1&akid=10496%2E434096%2Efim699)
Dear friends,
As Hanukkah comes to an end tonight, I want to wish everyone celebrating a warm last day of the Festival of Lights. I hope it’s filled with good food, good company, and a little extra light. 🕎
To those getting ready for Christmas, I’m wishing you a joyful holiday. 🎄
And to each of you reading this, I hope the New Year brings good health and better days ahead. 🥂
This season is about coming together. Family. Friends. Neighbors. Looking out for each other.
May the last light of Hanukkah, the joy of Christmas, and the promise of the New Year fill your home with love and hope.
Happy Hanukkah. Merry Christmas. And Happy New Year.
From my family to yours,

John ❤️
| |

subject: Bring hope to our heroes this Christmas
body:
Your support ensures our troops aren't forgotten, even when far from home.
[](https://www.uso.org)
[MATCH MY GIFT](https://links.e.uso.org/els/v2/YWdETYq6_6h8r/MkVRUWkyTEthS3lWMVpTS2x6ZldaaW1lZDV3bkoyZ3RJSExoMTNUZUJEeVVYRFc2d2IrYTJMalhYL2NpVEgvUkNmYWtyUjRpUlVXWFZidThqa3Vjdm1TdXpYNjRVRlpNOXdNOFJ6Q2Y0U0k9S0/SFlwTkliQVF6dW8zWjQweUh3a1pDdnl2Qm16eEVlVW10Tmw3QytIakYrVE9Yd0JSdWZyQVZHbVdKU1lJMm5iWXBvSjRncTh5VzVpOUhIMUh5U3JmQ240cmlNYVFyem1BS0)

There's something special about a holiday meal. It's more than food, tradition or comfort -- it's a reminder that you're loved. For our heroes in uniform, that feeling is hard to come by. Troops are stationed far from home, missing family dinners and the magic of the season.
But, you can help change that. **[Your gift today will be matched dollar for dollar-- up to $25,000 -- thanks to our friends at Airbus America Inc. That means every donation goes twice as far to provide warm holiday meals and other critical services for service members who would otherwise go without.](https://links.e.uso.)**

While we gather around tables filled with warmth and laughter, our heroes will be thousands of miles away, protecting our freedoms. A holiday meal may seem simple, but for a service member far from family, it's a powerful reminder that they're not forgotten.
**[We're running out of time before Christmas, and thousands of troops are counting on us to help them feel less alone. Please, make your tax-deductible gift now and help us reach our goal so no hero feels forgotten.](https://links.e.uso.)**
From all of us, and from the service members who felt your support this holiday, **thank you**.
For our troops,
Sydney Jones, USO
